entries.title: Priority yields and card reports
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Dazzling Beauty now works, including the unusual “becomes blocked” effect where an unblocked attacker becomes blocked without any blocker assigned
• Sylvan Echoes now listens for clash wins correctly, so losing or tying a clash no longer creates a stray trigger
• More card text is live for Realmwright, Luxior, Giada's Gift, Shadowspear, the Prophecy Familiar cycle, Axebane Guardian, Doorkeeper, Coral Colony, Vent Sentinel, and cards that care about any one color plus another color of mana
• Perpetual effects and “the number of” quantity phrases now parse more accurately across more card classes

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Jinnie Fay no longer re-prompts for the same token replacement inside nested replacement or choice chains
• Dread Summons now creates Zombies only for creature cards milled this way, not every card that hit a graveyard
• Oblivion's Hunger now draws a card only when the targeted creature actually has a +1/+1 counter
• Plagon, Lord of the Beach and Bill the Pony now grant “assign combat damage equal to toughness” correctly
• Curse of Opulence, Curse of Vitality, Curse of Verbosity, and Curse of Disturbance now let each attacking opponent do the copied reward for themselves
• Single-graveyard targets, named Kookus conditions, older verb-cost clauses, and several quantity grammar forms now preserve their full restrictions

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• MTGO-style priority yields are here: yield one trigger, yield all copies of a trigger source, revoke active yields, and keep auto-pass sessions flowing through yielded triggers
• Phase stops can now be scoped to all turns, your turns, or opponents' turns, and pass-until-turn-boundary behavior is clearer in multiplayer
• Auto-pass no longer gets stuck on an opponent's turn just because you control a mana source with nothing useful to cast
• Manual mana payment has a fallback path when automatic payment cannot finish, and mana-ability choices stay available even if the original source is gone
• Rare stale actions and dangling pending-trigger cursors now recover instead of surfacing as fatal engine errors

🖥️ Interface
• The game menu now has a persistent “Report a card problem” picker that groups visible cards by zone, shows parse coverage, deduplicates copies, and filters out basic lands
• Card reports are now reachable from the picker, the Alt parse panel, and mobile previews while still respecting spectate mode and hidden-zone visibility
• Priority-yield menus, active-yield controls, phase-stop scope cycling, and auto-pass timing now have player-facing controls in the board UI
• Telemetry dashboards can now show reported cards and pending-trigger abandon signals, helping prioritize the cards players actually hit

🌍 Localization
• New card-report, priority-yield, phase-stop, and auto-pass labels are localized across supported languages

🌐 Multiplayer
• Draft admin endpoints now require bearer authentication before exposing draft controls
• P2P draft backup snapshots now redact nested draft-session secrets before storage and echo responses
• Card-report visibility follows each viewer's reveal permissions, so the picker does not leak hidden opponent card names

entries.title: World rule arrives
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• The World rule now works: if multiple world permanents are on the battlefield, only the newest survives, with tied newest worlds all going to graveyards (Nether Void, The Abyss, Living Plane, Concordant Crossroads)
• Altaïr Ibn-La'Ahad now creates the right attacking copies, and freerunning casts are available through the casting modal
• Ghyrson Starn, Kelermorph now sees small noncombat damage and adds his bonus damage trigger
• More card text is live, including targeted perpetual power/toughness grants, choose-a-color-or-colorless branches, and “for each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter” counts (High Sentinels of Arashin, Armorcraft Judge, Inspiring Call, Hamza)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Manifest dread now sends non-permanent cards to the graveyard instead of putting them onto the battlefield face down, and blocked face-down entries no longer strand hidden cards face down
• Helm-style token copies now receive haste on the created token, not the source
• Skullscorch now correctly lets the chosen player take source damage instead of discarding
• Cast-copy-of-card copies now disappear from illegal zones when they should, while permanent-spell copies become token permanents at the right moment
• Player elimination in multiplayer now ends control effects correctly, so stolen permanents do not stay under a player who left
• Named filters, card-name literals, legacy activation timing, optional target counts, opponent-turn activation restrictions, and synthesized basic-land mana choices now parse more accurately

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Simultaneous trigger ordering is more rules-accurate: order-sensitive same-event and delayed triggers now ask for an order instead of being auto-stacked
• Repeated self-counter triggers now batch together, speeding up boards with many identical counter triggers

🖥️ Interface
• Split multiplayer board view is cleaner: opponent panes have roomier rows, compact lands/support summaries, better waiting chips, and target-only click-through
• Whitespace-only deck searches now behave like an empty search instead of swapping to a blank results view
• First-party telemetry can now report engine panics, stuck decisions, JavaScript errors, chunk reloads, and game ends when enabled, without sending identity info

🌍 Localization
• Multiplayer server presets, split-view status chips, freerunning prompts, and telemetry settings now have localized labels across supported languages

🌐 Multiplayer
• Password-protected draft lobbies now actually require the password before a player can claim a seat
• P2P draft backup snapshots no longer expose seat or kicked-player tokens through HTTP storage
• Self-hosted builds can configure a default multiplayer server, and the lobby broker now tracks usage stats such as active games and online players

entries.title: Foretell and excess damage arrive
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Foretell and miracle can now be granted to cards in your hand, so Dream Devourer and Aminatou, Veil Piercer create real reduced-cost cast options
• Excess-damage burn now works: Flame Spill, Gandalf's Sanction, and Ravenous Tyrannosaurus deal lethal damage to a creature and send the rest to its controller
• More card classes are live, including secret ballot votes, secretly chosen creature types, top-of-library historic play, repeated “this way” conditions, and “choose a counter kind” effects
• New and newly supported cards include A Killer Among Us, Celestial Reunion, Malamet Battle Glyph, The Fourth Doctor, Fixed Point in Time, The Face of Boe, Last Night Together, and Ace's Baseball Bat

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Tomb of Annihilation rooms now match their printed costs: Oubliette also sacrifices a creature, artifact, and land; Veils of Fear and Sandfall Cell use the correct discard-or-sacrifice life-loss punishers
• Coalition Victory now wins only when its land-type and creature-color condition is actually satisfied
• Volo, Guide to Monsters now checks shared creature types in the right zones before copying a creature spell
• Rebound and Etali-style exile casts now keep their cast-origin and target parsing straight
• Glittering Frost, Leyline of Singularity, Volo, Monomania, kicked-spell triggers, rounded-half quantities, and “each source you control deals damage” patterns now parse more accurately
• Top-of-library land play permissions are now consumed once per turn, so effects like The Fourth Doctor cannot replay the same permission indefinitely

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Targetless spells no longer ask whether to choose new targets, and tap/untap choices with no legal permanents no longer wedge resolution
• Hidden information is better protected: RNG seeds and library-draw events are no longer exposed to clients
• “Must be blocked by” effects now respect spare multi-blocker capacity, and restricted extra-combat attack rules clear correctly when the turn ends
• Multi-token creation chains now keep every token in the list instead of silently dropping the middle ones

🖥️ Interface
• Split multiplayer games have a new board layout, and commander damage is more compact in split view
• Counter-kind choice prompts now have localized titles across supported languages

🤖 AI
• The AI now avoids committing to X-cost spells that can only be cast for X=0, skips net-negative self-sacrifice/pay-life/discard abilities, and chooses better targets for undying-style grants, copy effects, and mill payoffs

🌐 Multiplayer
• Secret vote tallies now handle very large candidate pools without wrapping the selected object index

entries.title: Directional attacks and modal forms
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Directional attack restrictions now work — Pramikon Sky Rampart, Mystic Barrier, and Teyo Geometric Tactician can force attacks toward the nearest opponent to the left or right
• Creatures that choose a form as they enter now apply the chosen profile correctly (Primal Plasma, Primal Clay, Corrupted Shapeshifter, and Aquamorph Entity's enters mode)
• New cards and card classes now work: Plague Drone, Corrupted Resolve, Ravenous Trap's trap cost, and activated-ability cost modifiers like Suppression Field and Zirda
• Copy effects can now keep their “choose new targets” option even when another clause sits between the copy and the retarget sentence

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Dungeon rooms are more faithful: Lost Level now scries 2, The Atropal has deathtouch, Storeroom can target any creature, and Fungi Cavern lasts until your next turn
• Iona, Shield of Emeria now stops only the chosen color, not every spell your opponents could cast
• Disruptor Flute taxes the named spell correctly, and Oubliette-style phase-out now taps the creature only when it phases back in this way
• Lure-style permanents now actually force all able creatures to block them (Ochran Assassin, Breaker of Armies, Prized Unicorn, and Lure)
• Jabari's Influence now targets only a creature that attacked you this turn and also puts the -1/-0 counter on it
• Shauku, Seer of the Bright Side, Entourage of Trest, Tadeas, Tromokratis, Cairn Wanderer, Tarmogoyf, Ixhel, Denry Klin, The Ozolith, Drizzt, Radiant, and Pride of the Clouds all read their conditional text more accurately
• “That player adds mana” effects now prompt and give mana to the chosen player, not the controller (Spectral Searchlight, Stadium Vendors, Mad Science Fair Project)
• One-shot spell discounts now get used once, and negative discard, mill, and exile-top counts now become zero instead of draining whole hands or libraries
• X plus or minus a number now resolves with the right amount, and target phrases like “an opponent's graveyard” now point at cards in that graveyard

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Resolve All now works in multiplayer, and local hotseat no longer lets AI take over another human player's priority window
• The infinite-combo detector can now recognize growing multiplayer cascades instead of grinding through repeated loops

🖥️ Interface
• During target and board-choice prompts, attached Auras and Equipment can be selected in place, with a fan view for crowded permanents
• Manual mana and Undo now ride with the player HUD, and mobile landscape layouts no longer use portrait-only controls

🤖 AI
• Very large token boards are much faster to search and target — full-board static scans are now skipped when no matching static exists

entries.title: Split attackers across multiple defenders
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Regenerate now works — the card named after its own keyword action correctly regenerates its target
• Role Reversal exchanges control of two permanents that share a permanent type
• Coastal Wizard (and Lady Sun) can now return themselves plus another target creature to hand
• Bound in Gold now shuts off the enchanted permanent's activated abilities and stops it attacking or blocking
• Tinfoil Helm now grants +2/+2 along with its full protection-from list

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Hama Pashar no longer doubles dungeon-room triggers
• Eidolon of Countless Battles now scales both its power and toughness from the same count
• Valakut Fireboar switches its power and toughness when it attacks
• Multani's Presence now triggers when you counter your own spell
• Molecule Man's miracle now works on your first draw of the turn
• Wrenn and Realmbreaker's emblem now lets you play lands and cast permanent spells from your graveyard
• Orvar now copies the permanent you targeted instead of copying itself
• Isochron Scepter can now cast the copy of its imprinted spell
• Zenith Chronicler now draws on your first multicolored spell each turn
• Intimidation Tactics now exiles the chosen card from the target's hand
• Mindskinner now mills the right amount when its combat damage is prevented
• For the Ancestors now digs for cards of the chosen creature type
• Kraken of the Straits now stops low-power creatures from blocking it
• Savor the Moment now correctly skips your untap step that turn
• Bloodthorn Flail's either-or equip cost now works
• Nahiri, the Lithomancer no longer freezes the game when you have no Equipment to attach
• A batch of conditional-restriction and cost-reduction parser fixes (Rock Jockey, Wirecat, Hour of Revelation, Lashwhip Predator, and more)

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• You can now split your attackers across multiple defenders — attack several planeswalkers, battles, or players at once

🖥️ Interface
• New hand organizing controls — sort and filter your hand
• Board HUD polish — the priority indicator now sits on the Hand row with a per-reason glyph (attack / block / target / pay …) tinted to the waiting player's seat color, plus new lands/support collapse controls on the board and in Preferences
• Consolidated the mobile action dock so bottom controls no longer overlap your hand and piles
• Mana symbols and card backs now load reliably again after a service-worker caching regression
• More game data is now cached for offline play

🤖 AI
• Faster AI turns from a search-performance overhaul — per-game session caching, a transposition table with iterative deepening, and determinized sampling (play is unchanged, just quicker)

entries.title: Make mana on an opponent's turn
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• 11 new Standard-set cards across 7 mechanics — including Torch the Witness, Orbital Plunge, Full Bore, Throw from the Saddle, Kylox's Voltstrider, Quistis Trepe, Tinybones the Pickpocket, and Summoner's Grimoire
• Identity Crisis now exiles a target player's entire hand and graveyard at once
• Alchemy "perpetually gains" effects now stick — permanently granting keywords or setting base power/toughness for the rest of the game

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Slaughter the Strong now lets each player keep creatures with total power 4 or less and sacrifices only the rest (previously it sacrificed everything)
• Effects that set a creature's base power or toughness now resolve, including toughness-only and "change … to" wordings (Riptide Mangler, Arni Brokenbrow, Shape Stealer, Eldrazi Mimic, Wall of Tombstones)
• Amalia Benavides Aguirre now wipes the board only when her power reaches 20, not on every life gain
• Twilight Prophet's caster now gains life equal to the revealed card's mana value
• Boros Battleshaper now applies both of its combat effects, not just the "can't attack or block" half
• "Target permanent's controller sacrifices it" abilities now target and sacrifice correctly (Arcum Dagsson)
• Dread Summons now creates a Zombie only for each creature card milled, not every card
• Scarblade's Malice's delayed dies trigger now makes its token
• Agatha now lets you spend mana as any color for the abilities it powers
• Season of the Burrow now enforces its pawprint budget across modes
• "Can't cast until your next turn" restrictions now last their full duration (Sphinx's Decree, Azor, the Lawbringer)
• Divided damage and counters no longer freeze spells that also have other targets (Magma Opus)
• Final Parting now shows the correct destination zones, and Bribery correctly takes control
• "Reveal the card" wording now reveals as intended

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• You can now hold priority to make mana during an opponent's turn
• Paying {X} to attack is no longer capped at the number of attackers
• Combat roles are now cleared when a creature leaves the battlefield, so a returning creature can't inherit stale attacking/blocking status

🤖 AI
• Fixed AI-vs-AI games stalling ("game won't advance") on large multiplayer boards

🖥️ Interface
• You can now back out of a modal activated ability's "Choose one" prompt after clicking the permanent, instead of being locked in
• Replacement-effect prompts now show which card or rule is offering each option
• The "waiting for" indicator now tints the player's name and dot with their seat color

entries.title: Mother of Runes protects again
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• New cards: Athreos, God of Passage and Aven Mindcensor
• Newly released sets now unlock automatically once their release date passes — Marvel Super Heroes cards are now playable
• "Whenever you roll a [number]" dice-roll triggers now fire on the matching result
• "Whenever you activate a loyalty ability of a planeswalker" triggers now work

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Protection and hexproof "from the color of your choice" now grant real protection instead of doing nothing — you're prompted to pick a color when it resolves (Mother of Runes, Aven Liberator, Blessed Breath, and ~60 more)
• Abilities that add bonus mana when a permanent is tapped now fire and give the extra mana to the player who tapped it
• Turning a creature face down into a fixed 2/2 now snapshots its true printed stats, so anthems and other continuous effects no longer compound its power/toughness after it flips back up
• Returning several targeted cards and then doing something "that many" times now uses the right count (Vengeful Regrowth makes one Plant Warrior per land returned)
• Tokens created from the token catalog now pick up their static abilities
• Optional "you may attach" choices for Auras and Equipment are now offered correctly
• Modal triggers that refer to "that player" in bullet-list choices now point at the correct player
• "Where X is…" target filters now bind correctly

🤖 AI
• Fixed AI turn timeouts on very large boards

🖥️ Interface
• A new turn and priority indicator shows who currently holds the pending decision and why the game is waiting — distinct from whose turn it is
• Long animation sequences are now collapsed so big multi-event turns play back smoothly

entries.title: Infinite combos end the game (∞)
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Infinite combos can now be detected and resolved: enable the combo detector when creating a game, and confirmed infinite loops end the game (or draw it) and show an ∞ badge for unbounded mana, tokens, damage, life drain, mill, poison, counters, draws, casts, and triggers
• Alchemy perpetual effects now cover spells that perpetually cost more or less to cast and permanents that perpetually change types (e.g. Second Little Pig)
• Greymond, Avacyn's Stalwart grants two chosen keywords and anthems your Humans
• Koh, the Face Stealer now gains all activated and triggered abilities of the last card you exiled face down (with Sandswirl Wanderglyph)
• New card: Endangered Armodon
• Fractured Identity now works

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Thassa's Oracle now wins even when reanimated with an empty library (e.g. via Dread Return after milling out)
• Incubate tokens now set off "a permanent enters" abilities like Soul Warden, Altar of the Brood, and Panharmonicon
• Heartwood Storyteller now lets each of the casting player's opponents draw, each choosing independently — and never your teammate in Two-Headed Giant
• Three Blind Mice's later chapters can now copy a token you control
• Solitude's "exile up to one target creature" no longer soft-locks the game
• Winter Soldier's attack trigger and graveyard Hero +1/+1 counter now resolve correctly
• Bite Down and other one-sided fights no longer ask for an extra target
• Kari Zev's Ragavan token (and similar delayed exiles) no longer crash when the token already died
• Urza's Saga's second chapter, and other nested token-granting abilities, now create their token instead of misreading the inner ability
• Per-opponent effects now respect hexproof
• Ethereal Valkyrie's foretold cards are no longer castable for free
• Many conditional cards now read their gates correctly: "you lost life this turn" (The Book of Vile Darkness), "more cards in hand than each opponent", "any player / no opponent controls X", and "choose a creature you don't control" (~193 cards)
• "Choose a number" effects now parse when the phrase ends a sentence, and "sacrifice another X or Y" correctly excludes the source on every option

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Continuous effects are more rules-accurate (CR 613): face-down overrides, timestamp ordering, and granted-ability timestamps now layer correctly

🖥️ Interface
• The hand fan now sizes itself by the total cards shown, so Delve and other graveyard/exile payments no longer spill cards off-screen — and Delve now glows the graveyard pile to open its selection modal

🌐 Multiplayer
• Fixed a server hang when creating multiplayer games

entries.title: Fblthp plots from the library
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Fblthp, Lost on the Range can now plot the top card of your library, with plot resolving as a true special action instead of using the stack
• Words of Worship and Words of Wilding work: pay {1} to replace your next draw this turn with life gain or a Bear token
• Locus of Enlightenment now has the activated abilities of the cards used to craft it
• Nowhere to Run now lets you target opponents' hexproof creatures and shuts off their ward triggers
• Fastbond-style extra land-play permission now parses as a continuous effect
• Plot, unlock, and activated-ability cost reducers now apply to cards like Doc Aurlock, Inquisitive Glimmer, and Agatha of the Vile Cauldron

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Deflecting Swat, Bolt Bend, and Redirect can now retarget mass "target player" spells instead of offering only the current target
• She-Hulk, Wallbreaker now puts counters on the blocked Hero, not a missing blocker binding
• Mishra, Eminent One and similar temporary-token makers now sacrifice or tuck the created token at end step, not the source permanent
• Ashling, the Limitless and Satya, Aetherflux Genius now ask for their delayed payment at the next end step, not when the token is created
• Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student now returns from exile transformed after the third-card draw trigger
• Super-Soldier Serum's "attach any number" trigger can now be declined by choosing zero Equipment
• Captain America, Team Leader now puts +1/+1 counters on the entering Heroes
• Heroic Defiance now checks the enchanted creature's color against the most common color among permanents
• Brackish Blunder and similar "if it was tapped" riders now use last known tap state after the creature leaves
• Faller's Faithful and similar "up to one target" riders no longer fire when you declined the target
• Namor the Sub-Mariner now counts blue mana symbols and creates the right number of Merfolk
• Jocasta Nu, Kishla Skimmer, Stridehangar, Weeping Angel, and counter-removal cards like Magma Pummeler now parse and resolve their missing riders more accurately

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Reflexive "if it/that..." riders now stay conditional instead of firing unconditionally
• Discard-then-draw "that many" effects now remember how many cards were actually discarded
• Counter-removal costs and token-counting costs now preserve the correct counts
• Auto-pass timers no longer fire after they go stale

🖥️ Interface
• Oldest-printing art requests now sort by release date and collector number, so old-frame art choices are more reliable
• Top-of-library play and plot permissions now expose your own top card so the action has a visible card to click

🌐 Multiplayer
• Full-mode multiplayer game creation no longer deadlocks

entries.title: Alchemy perpetual buffs arrive
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Alchemy perpetual effects now persist — cards can perpetually get +N/+M or gain evergreen keywords
• Baron Helmut Zemo works: Boast can exile black graveyard cards with enough black mana symbols, then copy and cast up to three of them
• Public-vote cards can now collect votes, tally labels, and use the chosen player or winning vote in the rest of the effect
• "You or a permanent you control becomes the target" triggers now fire for both players and permanents (Loki, God of Mischief)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Omnath, Locus of All now checks the revealed card correctly, adds mana in that card's colors, and puts the card into your hand when you decline the reveal
• The Incredible Hulk's attacking Enrage rider is now gated correctly and untaps Hulk before the extra combat phase
• Incremental Growth now keeps its distinct "another target" choices instead of letting one creature receive every counter pile
• Faith's Fetters and Bound by Moonsilver now lock the enchanted permanent, not the Aura itself
• Guardian of Faith now prompts you to choose any number of other target creatures instead of phasing everything automatically
• Haze Frog now prevents combat damage from other creatures only, so Haze Frog's own combat damage still works
• Read the Runes now repeats the discard-or-sacrifice choice once for each card drawn
• Desperate Gambit now asks you to choose a source you control and applies its prevention/replacement shield to that chosen source
• Glamdring and similar "has a keyword and gets +N/+M for each..." effects now scale dynamically instead of flattening to a static bonus
• Bounty of the Hunt now removes its temporary counters at the next cleanup step
• Mana Severance no longer creates a duplicate exile instruction after searching your library
• Aang, Swift Savior can now airbend spells on the stack
• Exhumer Thrull's haunt payoff now remains one compound trigger
• Activation limits like "activate only during your turn and only once" are now preserved (Loch Larent, Katara, Water Tribe's Hope)
• Displaced Dinosaurs, River Song, River of Tears, and three-color target filters now parse correctly

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Attachment loops are blocked — returned Equipment can no longer create illegal attachment cycles
• Failed convoke payments restore the pending cast cleanly, so cancelling untaps your convoked creatures and returns the spell to hand
• Source-state-gated chained effects now stay conditional instead of firing unconditionally

🖥️ Interface
• If the engine takes too long to answer, the client now recovers with a clear timeout message instead of freezing behind dead buttons

🌍 Localization
• The new engine-timeout recovery message is available across the supported app locales

🤖 AI
• Go-wide boards are much faster for the AI and legality checks — a large squirrel-board attacker step dropped from minutes to about a second in the regression probe

entries.title: Suspend arrives, plus Two-Headed Giant & Planechase
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Suspend is playable — cast spells with time counters that tick down each turn, plus Time Travel time-counter manipulation
• Repeated cost payment arrives on Marvel's Spider-Man cards: Hawkeye, Master Marksman and Hawkeye, Young Avenger (pay a cost several times to scale the effect)
• New cards: Cosmic Cube, The Ruinous Wrecking Crew, False Peace, Empty City Ruse, Lightning Dart, Inquisitor's Snare, Adipose Offspring, and Confession Dial
• False Peace & Empty City Ruse can make a player skip all combat phases of their next turn
• Doctor's companion legendary creatures are now supported

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Drag to the Underworld — devotion cost reduction now applies at cast time
• Predatory Rampage — now forces every creature your opponents control to block
• Wretched Banquet — correctly gates on the creature with the least power
• Visions of Ruin — flashback casts now get the commander cost reduction
• Progenitor's Icon — chosen-type next-spell flash now works
• Fixes for Blademane Baku, Decoy Gambit, and Lethargy Trap

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Game-winning loops now resolve instantly — infinite combos like Sanguine Bond + Exquisite Blood and Marauding Blight-Priest + Bloodthirsty Conqueror end the game immediately instead of grinding through hundreds of triggers
• Much smoother play on huge token boards — declaring attackers and other decisions no longer slow down with hundreds of mana-producing tokens

🌐 Multiplayer
• New format foundations: Two-Headed Giant, Planechase, and Archenemy are now selectable in multiplayer setup

🖥️ Interface
• Sacrificing identical tokens now uses a single "how many?" prompt instead of clicking each one
• Large combat damage is grouped into cleaner, faster animations

entries.title: Cast from graveyard & exile, right in your hand
entries.body:
🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Equipment that enters the battlefield already attached to a creature now attaches correctly instead of falling off
• Mishra, Eminent One — the token copy it makes becomes a 4/4 named Mishra's Warform with its own name, so it no longer dies to the legend rule alongside the original
• Nested Shambler now makes a number of tokens equal to its power including buffs — a pumped Shambler finally makes the full count
• Riptide Shapeshifter and Heirloom Blade now dig to the correct creature type
• Dominaria's Judgment grants each color of protection only when you control the matching basic land (white with a Plains, blue with an Island, and so on)
• Limited Resources only stops players from playing lands once ten or more lands are on the battlefield, not before
• Claws of Gix, Curie, and Master Transmuter can now be activated even when the permanent you sacrifice, exile, or return was paying for the ability's mana — mana is tapped first
• Lava Blister, Blazing Salvo, and Molten Influence now offer their "unless you deal damage to yourself" alternative and resolve it correctly
• Lim-Dul's Hex now offers its "unless a player pays" choice
• Dragonfire Blade's equip-cost color discount now applies
• Auras that read "Enchant creature without flying" can now legally target a creature
• Accumulate Wisdom's alternate dig mode now works
• Lagrella, the Magpie's enter-the-battlefield exile no longer stalls the game when exiling creatures controlled by different players
• Creatures that enter with a dynamic number of extra +1/+1 counters — such as a count equal to another creature's toughness — now get them
• "Each opponent draws" effects now correctly draw cards for your opponents
• You can now tap your lands for mana during an opponent's turn to pay for instants and abilities

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Big token boards no longer crawl — passing priority, declaring attackers, untapping, and combat legality checks are dramatically faster on boards with hundreds of creatures (for example Squirrel decks powered by Cryptolith Rite)

🖥️ Interface
• Cards you can cast from your graveyard and exile — flashback, escape, foretell, adventure, and more — now fan out as colored wings on either side of your hand: exile on the left, graveyard on the right, all on one continuous arc. Flick them up to cast
• Slime Against Humanity and other "any number of copies" cards can now be added without limit to Commander decks instead of being capped

🤖 AI
• The AI no longer gets stuck when a spell it lined up turns out to be uncastable — it recovers and keeps playing

entries.title: iOS crash fixes, deck folders & Rooms
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Rooms now play both halves — the second door of a Room split card is finally castable (Spiked Corridor // Torture Pit and other Rooms)
• Curse of Conformity works — it sets the enchanted player's creatures to base 3/3 and strips their other creature types
• Mad Wizard's Lair (Dungeon of the Mad Mage, room 8) now resolves instead of doing nothing

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Octavia, Living Thesis only gets her cost reduction with eight or more instants/sorceries in your graveyard — no more turn-two Octavia from an empty graveyard
• Court of Cunning now mills every targeted player, not just the first
• From the Rubble correctly reanimates creatures from your graveyard
• Well Rested's untap trigger now gives the life gain and card draw to the Aura's controller
• Braids, Arisen Nightmare no longer runs its life-loss and draw tail when you decline your own sacrifice
• Sanar Vivid keeps revealed cards in your library for its per-color exile
• Committing a crime now triggers on damage that doesn't target, such as a Desert ping to an opponent
• Token copies made "except it's legendary" now actually become legendary (Adagia, Windswept Bastion)
• The Commander 2017 curse cycle now fires its "whenever the enchanted player is attacked" abilities (Curse of Bounty, Curse of Disturbance, Curse of Opulence, Curse of Verbosity, Curse of Vitality, Imprison This Insolent Wretch)
• Equipment and Aura "whenever equipped creature attacks" triggers can now target the defending player (Greatsword of Tyr)

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Lifelink now gains life once when a single source hits multiple targets at once (several blockers, or trample to a blocker plus the player), so "whenever you gain life" abilities trigger once instead of several times (Blech, Loafing Pest)
• Wide boards no longer stall during combat — removed a slowdown that grew sharply with the number of creatures in play

🖥️ Interface
• New "What's New" panel — release notes now live in the app behind the sparkle icon, with search, pagination, and an unread badge
• Organize your decks into folders in My Decks — create, rename, and assign decks to folders
• Fixed out-of-memory crashes on iOS — Very Hard AI and large card pools no longer reload the tab on iPhone and iPad
• Moxfield maybeboard cards are no longer pulled in when importing a deck by URL
• Board hover tooltips now stay on screen near the edges of the window
• Fixed a card-art regression where some cached images showed text instead of the picture

🌐 Multiplayer
• Fixed an out-of-memory crash for the multiplayer host when validating a guest's deck on iOS

entries.title: Stability fixes: graveyard-choice softlock & engine panics
entries.body:
• Fixed a softlock in per-player "choose a card in that player's graveyard" effects where the previous player's selection got stuck (Breach the Multiverse)

🛡️ Stability
• Fixed a recoverable engine panic when sacrificing or targeting a very high-value permanent (Sacrifice/Blight AI valuation)
• Closed a softlock where a replacement-effect choice with no options could wedge the game

entries.title: Player Curses, manual mana payment & card fixes
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Curse auras that affect the enchanted player now work — anthems, debuffs, must-attack, and enters-the-battlefield triggers all scope correctly (Curse of Death's Hold, Curse of the Nightly Hunt, Trespasser's Curse, Curse of Clinging Webs, Curse of the Restless Dead)
• Curse triggers still fire when the curse and the enchanted player's creature leave at the same time (board wipes)
• Cards that read their power/toughness from colored mana symbols in your graveyard now count correctly (Umbra Stalker)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Memory's Journey again lets you return up to three cards instead of dropping its target count
• Lands enchanted by mana-doubling auras now auto-tap for their full output (Wild Growth, Fertile Ground, Utopia Sprawl, Verdant Haven) — including picking the color for any-color auras
• Unexpectedly Absent now actually moves the targeted permanent beneath the top X cards instead of doing nothing
• Kiora's look-then-cast resolves the peeked card correctly
• Rot Wolf draws when it kills a creature with infect, even when it dies in the same combat
• Forked Bolt and other divided-damage spells now let you split the damage instead of dealing the full amount to every target
• Birthing Ritual offers creatures up to the sacrificed creature's mana value + 1 (was capped at 1)
• Fixed Elspeth tokens interacting with Divine Visitation

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Adopted the June 2026 Comprehensive Rules: conniving 0 is now a complete no-op and won't fire "whenever a creature connives" triggers (Spymaster's Vault and similar)

🖥️ Interface
• New manual mana payment flow: tap individual sources to pay, click pool pips to direct exactly which mana is spent, watch the remaining cost update live, and a per-game "Manual mana" toggle to opt in without changing your saved preference
• Dialog windows can now be dragged by their title bar

entries.title: Attachment targeting, faster loops & a freeze fix
entries.body:
• Cards that grant all activated abilities from a set of permanents or graveyard cards now resolve the right source set (Drana and Linvala and similar).
• Prompts to "choose a card type" now restrict you to the relevant types instead of an open-ended list.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Fixed a game freeze (soft-lock) when a triggered ability's only legal target disappeared mid-resolution — most visibly a turn-34 Commander lock (All Will Be One + Red Hulk + Schema Thief). Such triggers are now simply removed, as the rules require.

🖥️ Interface
• Tight, fast loops (e.g. Exquisite Blood + Sanguine Bond) no longer pay seconds of artificial "stack pacing" delay per cycle — the wait now reacts to how fast the stack is actually churning, not just how deep it is.
• Attached Equipment and Auras are now directly clickable as targets and activation sources — a "put a counter on target permanent" effect lands on the attachment you click, not the creature it's tucked behind, and attached Equipment can be re-activated to move it.
• Attachments tapped for mana now stay visible so you can click them to undo the tap.
• Deleting a folder in My Decks now asks for confirmation first.

entries.title: Battle-damage triggers, modal-X scaling & card fixes
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• "Choose up to X" modal abilities now scale with the X you paid — The Ruinous Wrecking Crew can pick multiple modes instead of just one.
• Damage triggers that include battles now fire correctly — 12+ cards from March of the Machine onward (Archpriest of Shadows, Bloodfeather Phoenix, Rankle and Torbran, Zurgo and Ojutai, Deeproot Wayfinder, and more) react when a battle takes damage, not only players.
• "Whenever a creature enters, if it has greater power or toughness than this" triggers now work — Hulkling, Burgeoning Bruiser grows correctly, even when the entering creature dies or is bounced in response.
• Dynamic Endure now reads counters off the source — Warden of the Grove grants the right amount to an entering creature.
• Doctor Doom's indestructible is now properly gated on controlling an artifact creature or a Plan, instead of always being on (the Plan enchantment subtype is now recognized).

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Birthing Ritual — you now sacrifice first and then choose what to dig for, with the mana-value limit calculated from the sacrificed creature (previously the choice appeared in the wrong order).
• Split cards cast from the graveyard now prompt you to pick which half to cast (Jace-style graveyard casting).
• Sliver Gravemother's Encore no longer mis-activates at X=0 or for free.
• Ent's Fury — the chained fight now uses both chosen creatures.
• Wick's "if… otherwise" enters-the-battlefield clause now gates and targets its else-branch correctly.
• "During your turn" leaves-the-battlefield triggers now work — Oni-Cult Anvil, Suki, Courageous Rescuer.
• "Unless you mill / remove a counter / discard N cards" costs are now charged correctly — paying actually prevents the punishment on Deep Spawn, Junk Golem, Magmatic Sprinter, and Avatar of Discord (previously paying did nothing).

entries.title: Two-Headed Giant, bulk-discard grid & UI polish
entries.body:
⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Two-Headed Giant — every effect and cost that reads a player's life total now correctly uses the shared team total (CR 810.9a), fixing life-payment limits, Bond lands, and life-comparison triggers in team games

🖥️ Interface
• Large-hand discards got a real bulk-select grid — sort and group your cards, shift-click to range-select, use the keyboard, and flip on "Keep instead" to pick what to keep instead of what to pitch
• Rearranging your hand now shows a glowing drop-target: the flanking cards slide apart to open a real gap and a bouncing arrow marks exactly where the card will land
• Reset All Preferences and Clear Art Overrides now use a styled confirmation dialog, and deck import asks before overwriting vs. merging
• Importing a deck with no detectable cards now shows a clear validation error instead of failing silently; the home dashboard also lays out better on small screens
• Restored bottom spacing at the end of the format-picker scroll

🖥️ Desktop
• Desktop app cloud sign-in now persists across launches on Windows (per-machine installs under Program Files were losing the session every restart)

entries.title: Contraptions, Marvel Super Heroes & 171 draftable sets
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Contraptions are here — Assemble a Contraption and Crank! now work at runtime, so contraption decks can be built and cranked
• Marvel Super Heroes is live — MSH, MSC, and TMSH sets are unlocked now that they've released on Arena/MTGO (real legalities, set lists, and draft pools included)
• Way more sets are now draftable — older expansions that predate Play Boosters (everything back to Ice Age, Antiquities, Legends, and the ~2018–2024 era) were silently undraftable; the draft pool jumped from 17 sets to 171
• Prowl support extended so effects gated on "if its prowl cost was paid" resolve correctly

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Show and Tell — each player can now decline putting a permanent onto the battlefield (the "may" is honored per player)
• Bloodchief's Thirst — can now be kicked to hit high-mana-value targets that are illegal for the unkicked version
• Adventure & Omen instant halves (e.g. Blow Off Steam) are now castable at instant speed outside your main phase
• Ulvenwald Tracker and similar dual-target fight abilities now fight the two chosen creatures against each other instead of the ability's source
• Macabre Waltz — returned creatures are no longer auto-discarded; the graveyard return now sticks (also fixes Dread Fugue's discard rider)
• Insidious Roots no longer triggers twice when a creature leaves your graveyard
• Excess-damage triggers now fire correctly — Maarika, Brutal Gladiator; Rith, Liberated Primeval; and Overclocked Electromancer read "was dealt excess damage this turn" instead of dropping the condition
• Cast-origin triggers fixed for "if you didn't cast it from your hand/graveyard/exile" — Chainer, Nightmare Adept; Phage the Untouchable; and Epochrasite
• Treasure, Clue, and other noncreature tokens no longer display a spurious 0/0
• Card art that 404s (future-dated sets, uncatalogued tokens) now shows a named placeholder instead of a broken-image icon

entries.title: Marvel Super Heroes released
entries.body: 🚨  Marvel Super Heroes was released today in phase (coinciding with the arena/mtgo release). Enjoy 🙂

entries.title: Deck folders, combat target clicks & a mana-cost fix
entries.body:
⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Fixed false "Cannot pay mana cost" errors and a game freeze when paying multi-color costs with several mana rocks (e.g. two Signets plus basics).

🖥️ Interface
• New deck organization: group your saved decks into folders and star favorites, in both the library and the deck switcher.
• Deck editor now splits cards into per-type sections (Creatures, Instants, Lands, …) with an optional group-by-color toggle.
• Clicking a spell's target during combat now registers (fixed Chain of Vapor and similar targets glowing but not responding).
• Smoother layouts on mobile for the home dashboard and the self-hosted server picker.
• Debug panel dropdowns now render as proper portal menus.

entries.title: Marvel cards, Shelob & artifact mana fixes
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Black Widow, Super Spy — impulse-cast the exiled card until end of turn, paying with mana of any type.
• Klaw, Sonic Subjugator — reveal counts that scale ("one plus the number of creature cards in your graveyard").
• Winter Soldier & Whiplash — abilities that count Equipment/Auras attached to themselves.
• Leader, Super-Genius — connive can now be replaced ("If a creature you control would connive, instead…").
• Cryptex & Chicago Loop — mana abilities with Collect Evidence and Pay-X-speed costs.
• Creeping Peeper, Overgrown Zealot, Tin Street Gossip — "spend this mana only to cast face-down spells / turn a permanent face up" restrictions.
• Effects that grant all of another creature's activated abilities until end of turn (Grell Philosopher).
• Augment now combines host and augment creatures with correct runtime stats and types.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Pentad Prism, Crystalline Crawler, Druids' Repository (13+ cards) — artifacts whose only mana cost is removing a counter can finally tap for mana.
• Morophon, the Boundless — the chosen creature-type cost reduction now actually applies to your spells.
• Shelob, Child of Ungoliant — Food-token copies are now proper Food artifacts that lose their other card types (also fixes Espers to Magicite).
• Blood Scrivener — drawing with an empty hand correctly draws two cards and loses 1 life.
• Carnage Interpreter — hand-size-based effects update immediately after you draw or discard.
• Marang River Prowler — graveyard-cast permission now only counts permanents you control.
• Lotleth-style "{B}: Regenerate [this]" — regeneration shields now install correctly and survive to combat damage.
• Fortifications now unattach correctly when their land leaves, matching Equipment.
• Cancelling a Delve payment now returns the exiled cards to your graveyard.

entries.title: Extra combat phases, escape costs & localization
entries.body:
• Surgical Extraction and other name-hate effects — shuffle the correct player's library
• Escape cards with compound costs (e.g. Uro) now load and resolve correctly
• "Destroyed this way can't be regenerated" now applies even with effects in between (Kirtar's Wrath, Breaking Point)
• Dies-triggers with a token/non-token intervening "if" now check the graveyard, not the battlefield

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Full Throttle — additional combat phases now work
• Champions from Beyond's Full Party — pumps every attacking creature, not just one
• Sphere of Safety — the attack tax now correctly scales with your enchantment count
• Chained "it gains flying" grants now attach to the countered/targeted creature instead of the source

🌍 Localization
• AI difficulty labels in the host seat picker are now translated

entries.title: Stickers land, plus 30+ mana sources that finally tap
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Stickers are here — sticker sheets and sticker application now work, surviving layer recalcs and zone changes (Unfinity)
• New keyword actions: Harness + ∞ Infinity abilities (The Mind Stone, The Soul Stone) and Alchemy's "perpetually" (permanent base power/toughness edits that follow a card across zones, e.g. High Fae Prankster)
• Spider-Woman, Secret Agent — taps a creature and locks it from untapping for as long as you control her (with full handling of control changes, blinks, and phasing)
• Kaya, Spirits' Justice −2 — "for each other player, exile a creature that player controls"
• Sanar, Innovative First-Year — "for each color/type, exile a card of that kind" from a revealed pool
• Vizier of the Menagerie — spend mana of any type to cast your creature spells
• Cast-from-graveyard/exile cards with extra costs: Valgavoth, Terror Eater and Festival of Embers (pay-life riders), plus Osteomancer Adept casting creatures that enter with a finality counter
• Lumbering Laundry — "until end of turn, look at face-down creatures you don't control"

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Millikin and ~30 mana sources can finally tap for mana — covers mana abilities with mill, energy, exert, untap, return, or effect costs (Wall of Roots, Aether Hub, Pili-Pala, Grinning Ignus, Arena of Glory, Oasis Ritualist). Also stops 20 planeswalker loyalty abilities from being mistaken for mana abilities
• Counterspells with redirect riders now register correctly: Memory Lapse, Lapse of Certainty, Remand, Spell Crumple
• Torrential Gearhulk — casts an instant from your graveyard on ETB
• Selvala, Explorer Returned — parley now produces the right mana
• Braids, Cabal Minion — upkeep sacrifice
• Summoner's Pact — upkeep payment now fires as a proper delayed trigger
• Return the Favor — copy mode targeting
• Malevolent Rumble — rest-pile routing
• The Ring Goes South — revealed lands now go onto the battlefield

entries.title: Land-play undo button no longer blocked by the HUD
entries.body:
🖥️ Interface
• The land-play undo button is now clickable instead of being blocked by the player HUD overlay

entries.title: Ojer Taq token-tripling & auto-reconnect fix
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Ojer Taq, Deepest Foundation — token-tripling now works ("three times that many of those tokens are created instead"), and the engine handles any ×N token multiplier going forward
• Necrodominance, Plunge into Darkness, Vizkopa Confessor — "pay any amount of life" is now fully playable: choose how much life to pay, then draw/look at that many cards
• The Kingpin of Crime — "creatures you control with toughness greater than their power assign combat damage equal to their toughness" now resolves for your whole board until end of turn
• Super-Adaptoid — correctly mirrors keyword counters from a chosen creature (gaining flying, lifelink, and more, but only keywords it doesn't already have)
• Construct a Cosmic Cube — its seventh-counter reward now lets you control target opponent during their next turn
• New cost-modifier cards: Skyseer's Chariot (abilities of a chosen name cost {2} more to activate), Firion, Wild Rose Warrior (cheaper equip), Doc Aurlock, and Inquisitive Glimmer

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• The Emperor of Palamecia — "if at least four mana was spent to cast it" now gates the trigger correctly instead of firing every time
• Goaded creatures — "it's goaded for the rest of the game" (and similar) now actually applies the goad
• N'ghathrod and elimination effects — when a player is eliminated, their graveyard and other zones are properly removed, so cards no longer linger
• Cactus Preserve, Ebony Fly, Jolrael Voice of Zhalfir, Sage of the Maze — animated creatures now receive their intended keywords (reach, flying, haste)

🌐 Multiplayer
• Auto-reconnect now dials the correct host, fixing reconnects that silently failed after a recent peer-ID change
• Dropped players are no longer auto-conceded — your seat is held and resumes automatically on reconnect; conceding a disconnected player is now an explicit host-only choice

entries.title: Suspend free-casts; banned cards removed
entries.body:
• "Was cast from a graveyard" now checks the card's owner correctly regardless of who casts it (Rocket-Powered Goblin Glider, Laughing Jasper Flint, Midnight Mangler)
• Sheoldred, the Apocalypse's draw triggers now fire in the sandbox/debug draw path
• More robust handling of revealed-card type + mana-value conditions

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Suspend cards cast as their final time counter is removed now cast for free during resolution as intended

🖥️ Interface
• Format dropdowns in Host Setup and the deck builder now anchor and stay within the viewport on any screen size
• Deck builder shows toast notifications when you save or clone a deck
• My Decks / Subscriptions tabs use a cleaner segmented control on mobile
• Improved mobile layout for the Manage Feeds modal

📚 Card Library
• Removed seven cards that Wizards of the Coast officially banned and pulled for offensive content (2020) — they no longer appear in the card pool or precon decks

entries.title: Coin-flip payoffs now resolve on the stack
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Coin-flip payoffs now resolve correctly on the stack — "When you win/lose the flip, ..." abilities get their own resolution window instead of firing instantly (Breeches, the Blastmaker)
• Prowl is now fully castable — you can pay the Prowl cost, and "if its Prowl cost was paid" abilities check it correctly (Latchkey Faerie)
• Face-down card support expanded: look-at-face-down permissions, "can't be turned face up" restrictions, and granted turn-face-up abilities all work (Found Footage, Karlov Watchdog, Etrata, Deadly Fugitive)
• Modal graveyard-return spells that share one effect across bullets now return the right cards (Call Damage Control)
• Station contribution now counts toward stationing (Tapestry Warden)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Hixus, Prison Warden now only exiles on the turn it entered, instead of every turn afterward
• Ka-Zar of the Savage Land's Zabu token landfall ability fires correctly (ability-word labels no longer hide the trigger)
• M.O.D.O.K.'s ability-word-labeled activated ability ("Pay 3 life: ... connives") now works
• Sliver Gravemother's granted Encore now parses and resolves its mana cost correctly
• Veilstone Amulet's "can't be the targets" protection now applies (was dropping its whole effect)
• Crystal Skull can now play/cast the historic card on top of your library
• Lands enchanted by Song of the Dryads (and similar) correctly lose their rules-text abilities
• Homarid Warrior keeps its "until end of turn" duration on keyword grants
• Lightstall Inquisitor's exile-and-play riders now resolve
• Adamaro, First to Desire reads opponent hand sizes correctly
• "Each player ... they control" effects now count each player's own permanents, not the caster's (Acidic Soil, Biorhythm, Shaman of Forgotten Ways)
• Chroma counting now resolves as devotion (Outrage Shaman, Primalcrux)
• Licid creatures no longer treat their pay-to-end cost as an optional activation

entries.title: "Whenever you investigate" abilities now fire
entries.body:
🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• "Whenever you investigate" abilities now fire (Erdwal Illuminator) — previously they did nothing.
• Reveal-your-hand-then-choose effects now actually reveal and let you choose/exile a card (Biting-Palm Ninja was silently doing nothing).
• Equipment that creates a token and attaches to it now equips the new token (Field-Tested Frying Pan).
• Granted "Cumulative upkeep" abilities now charge the upkeep cost (Mana Chains, Dreams of the Dead, Decomposition).
• Lolth's emblem now correctly drains life equal to the difference (#922).
• Phase-based delayed triggers on spells now fire — "At the beginning of each combat this turn…" (Full Throttle).
• Gemstone Caverns' free-land ability is now correctly limited to players who weren't the starting player.
• "Spend this mana only to activate an ability or cast an artifact spell" now parses (Automated Artificer), as do equip-ability spend restrictions (Ronin Shadow Stalker, Freya Crescent).
• "Otherwise…" fallback clauses and Role-token attachment now resolve correctly (Wick the Whorled Mind, Royal Treatment).
• Several parser correctness fixes for multi-clause abilities — preserving turn constraints on spell-cast triggers, leading cost conditions, and resetting the player anchor when a clause's subject switches between players.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Willie Lumpkin's deterrent now works — the targeted player can't attack you or your permanents during their next turn.
• Maximum Carnage now goads each creature, forcing it to attack a player other than you if able.
• Anthem effects targeting attackers now apply correctly — trample for creatures attacking one of your opponents (Oviya, Selfless Safewright), and grants scoped to a chosen creature type.

entries.title: Avatar bending triggers arrive
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Avatar bending triggers are here — cards that care when you waterbend, earthbend, firebend, or airbend now trigger correctly (Avatar Aang, Fatal Fissure).
• "Repeat this process" loops now resolve, re-running an ability's effect while a game condition holds (Claim Jumper, Sin, Spira's Punishment).
• Graveyard recursion grants now work: cards that give a creature embalm, harmonize, or flashback for a cost equal to its own mana cost (Cursecloth Wrappings, Songcrafter Mage, Sphinx of Forgotten Lore).
• Discover and Blight can now be aimed at another player — "target opponent blights 2" / "that player discovers X" (Champion of the Weird, Zoyowa's Justice).
• Cost reduction that scales with life you lost or gained this turn (Rowan, Scion of War & Will, Scion of Peace), locking in the amount when the ability resolves.
• Setting a creature's base power/toughness to a dynamic count now works (Porcelain Gallery, Pupu UFO, Sita Varma).
• Cast-from-exile permissions now honor "as though it had flash" and "spend mana of any type" riders (Azula, Cunning Usurper).
• Spending mana to unlock Room doors is now a legal mana use (Smoky Lounge).
• Land animation that keeps its land subtype now resolves correctly (Cavernous Maw stays a Cave Land creature).
• Control-exchange of two target creatures controlled by different players (Kitsune, Dragon's Daughter), and saddle/become-an-artifact-creature effects (Alacrian Armory).
• A wave of Standard long-tail cards now play in full, including: Maximum Carnage, Roxanne Starfall Savant, Blossombind, Temporal Intervention, Kellan Daring Traveler, Take for a Ride, Elixir, Chandra Flameshaper, Spider-Woman Stunning Savior, All-Out Assault, Fortune Loyal Steed, Aerith Rescue Mission, Connecting the Dots, Omenpath Journey, Expensive Taste, and more.

entries.title: Cleaner trigger targeting; smarter AI X-spells
entries.body:
• Swords to Plowshares no longer asks you to choose two targets when cast
• Teferi's Ageless Insight now correctly doubles multi-card draws (a draw-four becomes a draw-eight)
• Gadrak now makes the right number of Treasures, counting only nontoken creature deaths
• Emet-Selch no longer exiles the target card when you decline its optional graveyard cast
• Kozilek's graveyard-shuffle trigger now fires correctly
• Cards cast using Teamwork now apply their conditional bonuses correctly (Beast Mode, Earth's Mightiest Heroes), fixing a case where the bonus applied even without paying
• "Sacrifice unless you pay its mana cost" upkeep taxes now work, including the rules-correct handling of costless permanents (Pendrell Flux, Disruption Aura, Pendrell Mists)
• "Whenever enchanted player draws a card" triggers now fire (Curse of Fool's Wisdom, Psychic Possession)

🖥️ Interface
• Improved trigger targeting and reduced battlefield clutter
• Bestowed Auras no longer show up as a duplicate permanent on the battlefield (Springheart Nantuko)

🤖 AI
• The AI no longer wastes activations pumping X=0 into pointless effects (Helix Pinnacle)

entries.title: Suspect support; countered-spell zones fixed
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Suspect is now fully supported — creatures can lose the suspected designation and be blocked from becoming suspected, with printed menace correctly preserved (Absolving Lammasu, Airtight Alibi, Deadly Complication, Eliminate the Impossible, Frantic Scapegoat)
• Rooms doors can now be locked and unlocked, with a new in-game prompt to pick which door (Ghostly Keybearer, Keys to the House, Marina Vendrell)
• Marvel Super Heroes additions: damage-doubling and token-replacement effects (Mjölnir, Divine Visitation, Wolverine), cross-zone power calculations and power-over-base triggers (Dragon Man, Ms. Marvel), plus honesty fixes that surface several cards now confirmed working (Armed Assailant, Patriot, Fleecemane Lion, Intrepid Ace, Captain America)
• Cards that grant the abilities of a referenced set of permanents now work (Marvin, Territory Forge, Agatha's Soul Cauldron)
• Color-changing effects ("becomes a color" / "is a color") supported across a batch of Standard cards (Tam Mindful First-Year, Possessed Goat, Puca's Eye, Mondo Gecko, Leyline of the Guildpact, Shimmerwilds Growth, Questing Druid)
• New counter-placement options: choose-the-kind counters, moving only a named counter type, and "additional" counters (Reluctant Role Model, Selfless Police Captain, Toph)
• Activated-ability cost reductions now extend to Exhaust abilities (Boom Scholar)
• The Phyrexia: All Will Be One Dominus cycle is now playable, including Tekuthal, Inquiry Dominus
• Damage-redirection cards now resolve correctly (Razia, Zhalfirin Crusader, Daughter of Autumn, Vassal's Duty)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Memory Lapse, Spell Crumple, and Remand now send the countered spell to the correct zone (library top/bottom or hand) instead of the graveyard
• Tithe Taker and Paladin Class only tax opponents during the right player's turn — they no longer tax your spells on your own turn

entries.title: Cube draft gains a bot-difficulty selector
entries.body:
🖥️ Interface
• Cube draft now has an AI bot difficulty selector.
• Cube drafts with pre-reveal placeholder card names no longer fail to start — cards resolve by oracle ID with a fallback, and import errors are shown instead of a generic failure.

🌍 Localization
• Draft bot difficulty labels are now translated across all 7 supported languages.

entries.title: "As long as" buffs no longer stick forever
entries.body:
• More casting permissions and mana rules: cast the top card of your library once per turn (Assemble the Players, Johann), restricted mana that excludes your hand (Mm'menon) or only pays for certain spells (Hydraulic Helper, Karn, Legacy Reforged), and cost reductions gated by timing, attacks, or domain (Hylda's Crown of Winter, Thaumaton Torpedo, Jodah's Codex).
• Set base power/toughness from another creature's power (Belligerent Yearling, Azure Beastbinder), set everyone to a chosen creature type (Conspiracy), and damage equal to a source's power or counters to any other target (Iron Fist, Red Hulk).

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• "As long as" abilities no longer stay on permanently. Buffs and granted keywords gated on being attacking/blocking/blocked, modified, enchanted, or while an opponent controls something now correctly switch off when the condition ends (Grasping Scoundrel, Soltari Lancer, Pillar of War, Thran Golem, Orochi Merge-Keeper, Obstinate Gargoyle, Tide Shaper, the Scarab cycle, and many more).
• Counter-duration effects now expire when the counter is removed instead of lasting forever (Mathas, Fiend Seeker; Makeshift Mannequin; Obsidian Fireheart; Minas Morgul).
• "Whenever combat damage is dealt to you" triggers now fire (Risona, Asari Commander; I Am Untouchable).
• Triggers that watch you or a planeswalker you control no longer get mis-split and dropped — 13 cards fixed (Revenge of Ravens, Blood Reckoning, Marchesa's Decree, Sarkhan the Masterless, Thantis the Warweaver, and more).
• "Remove one or more counters" abilities now let you choose how many (Simic Manipulator, Ooze Flux, Arcee, Jetfire, Rasputin).
• Keyword-denial auras (the Archetype cycle), subtype-filtered "also gain" grants (Gallant Fowlknight), and "{X} in mana cost can't be cast" (Gaddock Teeg) now apply.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• "Resolve all" is faster — stack resolution batches are collapsed in the engine.

entries.title: Marvel Super Heroes cards begin to play
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• (UNDER THE HOOD ONLY) Marvel Super Heroes is here: a large wave of MSH cards now play, including Captain America, Hulk (Gamma Goliath), Ultron, Iron Monger, Glorious Purpose, Klaw, Moon Girl and Devil Dinosaur, Kid Loki, Iron Fist, Red Hulk, and many more.
• New keyword — Teamwork: tap any number of creatures with enough total power as you cast, unlocking the spell's bonus (Team Tactics, HULK SMASH!, Atlantis Attacks, and 6 others).
• New keyword — Power-up: a once-per-game super-ability with its own cost reductions and restrictions (Kang, Wonder Man, Marvel Boy, Nick Fury, Jack of Hearts, and more).
• New keyword — Hustle: "attacks or blocks this turn if able."
• Connive triggers ("whenever this creature connives") and "play a card from exile" triggers now fire correctly.
• 15 more Standard-legal cards via new building blocks: team-up damage where up to two of your creatures each deal damage equal to their power (Allies at Last, Band Together, Coordinated Clobbering, Terrific Team-Up), if/else "Otherwise" spell text, "behold" cost-paid damage (Monstrous Emergence), and reveal-until-you-find-X with a choose-any-number payoff (Aurora Awakener).
• Doubling and tripling power/toughness (Tifa's Limit Break), conditional counter-doubling (Turtle Van), and dynamic enter-with-counters scaling (Gev, Scaled Scorch).
• Craft cards can now read their exiled material pile (Jadeheart Attendant, Mastercraft Raptor, Sunbird Effigy).
• Face-down support: turn a creature face up and reveal-then-act chains now work (Bustle, Manifest Dread, Hauntwoods Shrieker).
• "Becomes saddled" effects (Guidelight Matrix, Kolodin), token copies that gain extra keywords and abilities (The Apprentice's Folly, Chandra, Flameshaper), and "lands gain all basic land types" (Energybending).

entries.title: Cleaner optional multi-target prompts
entries.body:
• Strixhaven Pest tokens now gain life when they die.
• Sméagol now targets the opponent for reveal effects and correctly puts stolen lands under your control.
• Gendered self-reference wording like “her power” / “his power” now gates abilities correctly.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Optional multi-target prompts now complete cleanly when you skip the remaining optional targets.
• Target selection and legal-action generation are faster, especially in target-heavy board states.

🖥️ Interface
• Battlefield summary tiles are cleaner, with better support-card breakdowns and commander damage presentation.
• Targeting prompts now render richer labels for modes, copy choices, and spell text.
• My Decks, draft pod setup, cube setup, and precon filtering now use the anchored menu control for better mobile alignment and less clipping.
• Precon deck loading and failure states are clearer.

🌍 Localization
• Precon catalog loading and error messages now have translated UI strings.

entries.title: Heist now works end-to-end
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Heist now works end-to-end: cards like Grenzo, Crooked Jailer can look at an opponent’s library, exile the chosen card face down, and let you cast it with flexible mana.
• Multi-option mana restrictions are now respected, including “spend this mana only to cast X or Y” patterns (Maelstrom of the Spirit Dragon, Brotherhood Headquarters, Chandra’s Embercat).
• Graveyard play/cast permissions now handle split “play a land or cast a spell” wording (Serra Paragon, The Eighth Doctor).
• Will-of-the-council threshold votes and vote-based Saga chapters now resolve the winning or tied outcome correctly (Plea for Power, Trial of a Time Lord).
• “Whichever is greater” damage quantities now work for cards like Triumphant Chomp.
• Max-attacker restrictions and “defending player can’t cast spells” effects now parse for cards like Judoon Enforcers and Xantid Swarm.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Toxic riders now recognize toxic creatures correctly (Hexgold Slash, Compleat Devotion, Porcelain Zealot).
• Avatar-style leading “If … this spell costs less” conditions now stay attached instead of applying unconditionally.
• “An opponent has no cards in hand” and “you have more life than an opponent” conditions now work correctly (Guul Draz Specter, Rekindled Flame, Avatar of Will, Survival Cache, Feudkiller’s Verdict).
• Grievous Wound now prevents life gain for the enchanted player.
• Force of Negation now exiles countered spells directly when its rider applies.
• War’s Toll now taps the lands of the player who activated the mana ability.
• Jace, the Mind Sculptor’s -12 now shuffles the targeted player’s hand correctly.
• Knowledge Seeker’s Nth-draw trigger is no longer lost during Kwain’s optional draw flow.
• Shared Trauma’s Join Forces payment no longer incorrectly skips the mill effect.
• Sanwell and Chaos Wand linked-exile cleanup now stays attached to the right source.

entries.title: Smarter stated-quality search filters
entries.body:
🖥️ Interface
• Card/search filtering now handles stated-quality filters more accurately, including dynamic stated qualities.

entries.title: Damage-persists effects; mana doublers stack
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• “Damage isn’t removed during cleanup” effects are now supported, so cards like Ancient Adamantoise, Patient Zero, Uthgardt Fury, and Case of the Market Melee can keep marked damage across turns.
• “Chosen type enters” triggers now work for patterns like Dawn-Blessed Pennant, Molten Echoes, and Rimefire Torque.
• Attack-count triggers phrased as “a player attacks with N…” now parse and work for any player.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Nyxbloom Ancient and Mana Reflection now stack their mana multiplication correctly.
• Stinging Study now binds X to your commander’s mana value correctly.
• Grim Lavamancer now chooses its damage target before paying the exile cost.
• Victimize-style “preserve” continuations now keep the right tracked cards moving through the effect.
• Extinction Event now honors the odd/even mana value choice.
• Orvar, the All-Form now only triggers when your own spell targets your other permanents.
• Kappa Cannoneer’s evasion now attaches to the Cannoneer itself.
• Guardian of the Guildpact and Providence of Night now handle “protection from monocolored” correctly.
• Walking Bulwark can now grant defender creatures permission to attack.
• Tempt with Bunnies offers now resolve correctly.
• Copied abilities now preserve their source more reliably.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Filters combining “nontoken” with colors, supertypes, adjectives, or modified status now keep all parts of the filter.
• Static anthem and keyword-grant behavior has broader runtime coverage, including team pumps, opponent debuffs, Sliver grants, first strike, flying, menace, haste, lifelink, double strike, and dynamic self-pumps.
• Menace and indestructible received direct runtime coverage for valid blocking, destroy effects, and lethal damage.
• Base power/toughness cleanup has stronger end-to-end coverage for comma-list modifier text.

entries.title: Smarter mutate targeting; HUDs survive eliminations
entries.body:
⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Mutate targeting is smarter for AI: it now prefers the AI’s own creatures as hosts.
• Mindslaver-style turn control no longer lets the server AI override a human controlling that seat.
• Ninjutsu and commander ninjutsu castability received fixes.
• Board-choice prompts can now be answered by clicking battlefield objects directly.
• Conditional end-step token triggers now re-check the correct event at resolution.
• Copy effects now preserve starting loyalty for copied planeswalkers.
• One-shot “dies/exile instead” riders now apply when they should.

🖥️ Interface
• Commander opponent HUDs now collapse and refocus correctly after player eliminations, including the one-rival-left case.
• Draft pick timers now stay synced with the server, and missed picks are swept more fairly.
• Turn-control action buttons now appear for the player currently authorized to make decisions.
• Card art lookup now handles accented names like Éomer/Éowyn more reliably.
• Card preview mana symbols now render correctly.
• Cube setup’s addable-card policy control works better on mobile.
• Lobby protocol versioning is now shared with the worker to avoid mismatch issues.

entries.title: Megamorph face-up replacement effects work
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Face-up replacement effects now work rules-correctly for megamorph/disguise-style cards, so “As this is turned face up…” effects happen during the turn-face-up event instead of as respondable triggers.
• Delve now tracks which graveyard cards paid for the spell, including UI support from the graveyard viewer and Murktide Regent-style payoff handling.
• Ichormoon Gauntlet now grants functional planeswalker loyalty abilities.
• Yare and Giant Ox are now supported, covering extra-blocker grants and alternate crew contribution.
• Energy-focused AI decks now understand energy reserves and payoff timing better.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Inferno Titan’s trigger now supports choosing multiple targets and distributing damage correctly.
• Expressive Iteration now completes its hand, bottom, and exile choices correctly.
• Isochron Scepter now copies imprinted spells from exile correctly.
• Sakashima’s Student now enters as a copy properly when cast with ninjutsu.
• Paradigm-style exiled spell offers now continue after you cast one, instead of stopping early.
• Abigale now correctly removes Death’s Shadow’s life-based power/toughness ability.
• Inalla and Flameshadow Conjuring now exile the created token, not the original creature.
• Coin of Mastery now counts artifact mana spent to cast the entering spell.
• Emeritus of Abundance prepared spells now charge their alternate cost instead of becoming free.
• Dina, Essence Brewer-style sacrifice abilities now choose sacrifice costs before downstream targets.
• Fall of the First Civilization now makes the chosen opponent draw both cards.
• Grim Hireling-style combat damage triggers now batch correctly when multiple creatures connect.
• Tzaangor Shaman, Evendo, Gilgamesh, Iroh, Trygon Predator, and tap/untap “up to” targeting patterns gained parser fixes.

entries.title: Request-takeback added; faster Delve
entries.body:
• Created tokens now keep their keywords when a name follows (Crow Storm, The Hive, Hornet Cannon, Wall of Kelp — ~14 cards no longer lose Flying/Haste)
• "Target opponent sacrifices … for each X" now makes the targeted opponent sacrifice, not you (Urborg Justice, Rakdos Riteknife)
• Commander mana-value abilities now parse their multi-zone wording
• ETB triggers now key off a creature's final types after layer effects (Ashaya landfall and similar)

🖥️ Interface
• The Ring-bearer badge is no longer hidden behind grouped Army tokens

🌐 Multiplayer
• Added "request takeback" — any human can request to undo, and it applies only with unanimous human approval
• Face-down exiled cards (Hideaway, Foretell) are now hidden from players who aren't allowed to see them

⚙️ Performance
• Treasure Cruise and other Delve cards pay much faster with a large graveyard

🤖 AI
• Bots now recognize Mill as a deck strategy and value mill effects based on how close an opponent's library is to empty

entries.title: Cast split cards from either half
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Split cards can now be cast from either half — casting Life // Death prompts you to pick a face (and Fuse cards keep their fuse option)
• Blood Scrivener — drawing from an empty hand now draws two cards and costs 1 life
• Draw/lose-equal-to-a-dynamic-amount effects now resolve, including the "half your library / half their life" class (Peer into the Abyss, Tamiyo Seasoned Scholar, Morbid Curiosity, Narset, Mr. Foxglove)
• Twelve cards with "-es" plural creature types (Heroes, Sphinxes, Leeches…) and the Synth type now work — fixing their anthems, target filters, and type-adding effects (Zarda the Power Princess, She-Hulk Wallbreaker, Shaun Father of Synths, Furgul, Avengers Assemble!)
• Urza, Discover, and other "exile then you may play that card" effects now correctly grant the play permission instead of being declined immediately
• Amass "where X is" wording now resolves

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Gix — the optional draw now goes to the creature's controller (the player who paid), not the wrong player
• Garnet — lore-counter removal can now target any number of permanents instead of nothing
• Smuggler's Share now only draws/makes Treasure based on what opponents actually did, instead of triggering every end step
• Consign to Memory now counters only triggered abilities, as written
• Turtle Lair's mana can now pay for Ninja spells (spell-subtype mana restrictions are honored)
• One-sided "fight" cards now deal damage equal to the boosted creature's power (Ambuscade and ~19 siblings)
• Song of the Dryads now correctly strips the enchanted permanent's abilities the moment it attaches
• Tetsuko Umezawa's unblockable ability now applies to the right creatures (small creatures you control) instead of just itself
• Ob Nixilis, Captive Kingpin's Casualty copy is no longer legendary and enters with the correct starting loyalty

entries.title: AI learns blink, voltron & reanimator decks
entries.body:
🤖 AI
• Bots now recognize blink/flicker, equipment/voltron, and reanimator/graveyard-recursion as deck strategies and play to those payoffs
• Bots no longer sacrifice a land for protection when there's no payoff

entries.title: Double-faced cards revert after blinking
entries.body:
• Impostor Syndrome now copies the damaged creature instead of itself
• Good King Mog's chapter II/III noncreature copy now resolves instead of fizzling
• "Vehicles you control have crew 2" now overrides the printed crew cost instead of stacking (Kotori, Pilot Prodigy)
• For Mirrodin!, Specialize, and Offering cards now load correctly (~35 cards that were wrongly counted unsupported: Specialize Backgrounds, Kamigawa Offering creatures, and "living weapon" Equipment)

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Terra and other double-faced cards revert to their front face after being blinked
• Ninjutsu and Sneak can no longer return attackers that already died or left combat
• Queen Marchesa's goad-the-table upkeep trigger only fires while an opponent is the monarch
• Per-player upkeep "you may" choices now prompt the upkeep player, not the trigger's controller (Braids, Cabal Minion; Conjurer Adept)
• Summon: Yojimbo's saga chapters now enforce their attack tax
• Reaver Cleaver no longer leaves a stuck trigger when combat damage ends the game
• Blockers are no longer requested against attackers that have left the battlefield
• Duplicate "enters tapped/untapped" replacements (token copies, Kismet + Frozen Aether) no longer ask for a pointless ordering choice
• Counterspells can no longer target themselves on the stack
• Abilities whose cost sacrifices/discards/exiles a permanent can no longer also target that same permanent
• "One or two target creatures and/or players" divided-damage spells now offer both target slots (Electrolyze)
• Fixed an infinite-explore loop with Hakbal of the Surging Soul
• "Only your opponents may activate" abilities are now enforced at the correct timing (Oft-Nabbed Goat)
• "Choose at random" modal effects now respect the random selection

🖥️ Interface
• The Choose X overlay now shows affinity-adjusted costs before you commit (e.g. Witherbloom)
• Delve now shows a mana-payment hint in the cost overlay
• Fixed a status-display recursion in the frontend

entries.title: Darksteel Reactor wins; color-target fixes
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Darksteel Reactor — win the game at 20+ charge counters
• Unravel — counters a spell and draws you a card when it was cast for less than its mana value
• Ertai's Trickery — counters a spell only if it was kicked
• The Mimeoplasm — exile-from-graveyard replacement, becoming a copy with +1/+1 counters
• Ensnared by the Mara — losing the villainous choice now deals damage equal to the total mana value of the cards it exiled
