• Undercity's Throne of the Dead Three — the final dungeon room now resolves (reveal ten, put a creature onto the battlefield with counters and hexproof)
• Tiered "enters with a counter for each…" abilities now parse

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Color-or-color targeting fixed so a "green or white creature" spell can no longer hit a green noncreature (~35 cards: Deathmark, Tidebinder Mage, Self-Inflicted Wound, Combust, Surge of Righteousness, Wallop)
• Protection and keyword-granting Auras with trailing rules text now actually grant the keyword (~14 cards: Benevolent Blessing, the Ward cycle, Spectra Ward, Pledge of Loyalty)
• Fight-back "deals damage equal to its power" cards now hit correctly — the source deals damage and is dealt damage back (Karplusan Yeti and ~14 siblings)
• "That creature/land doesn't untap" now locks only the tapped permanent instead of every matching one (Chandra's Revolution, Glacial Grasp)
• Self-referential static conditions using "it" now work (Giant Tortoise, Dragonlord Ojutai, Paradise Druid, Iymrith)
• "This combat" delayed triggers and self-targeting "becomes prepared" now resolve (Stensian Sanguinist)
• Untap-step replacements implemented (Freyalise's Winds, Edge of Malacol now keep their counters and stay tapped)
• Cosima, God of the Voyage keeps triggering its landfall counters while exiled
• Landfall "becomes prepared" effects with no explicit target now resolve to their own source (Tam, Observant Sequencer)

entries.title: AI holds Mother of Runes for combat
entries.body:
🤖 AI
• AI patience on reusable abilities: Mother of Runes (and the reactive self-protection class) is held for combat instead of being tapped every turn for nothing; Evolving Wilds and tapped fetch lands are cracked at end step rather than instantly.
• New artifacts-matter and enchantments-matter deck awareness, so the AI values affinity/constellation-style synergies in matching decks.

entries.title: Modal spells hide illegal modes
entries.body:
• Killian, Decisive Mentor triggers for enchanted/equipped attackers under any player's control.
• Joyful Stormsculptor now hits opponents and the battles they protect, instead of all opponent creatures.
• Syr Konrad's zone-change trigger stays unified and no longer double-fires damage.
• Hordewing Skaab now makes you discard the number you drew.
• Rite of the Raging Storm grants haste/trample and its sacrifice trigger to the Lightning Rager token, not the enchantment.
• Adeline's tokens (and the Myriad class) now enter tapped and attacking.
• "Gained or lost life this turn" conditions now parse — Star Charter, Starseer Mentor, Starlit Soothsayer.
• Halving Season's opponent scope now applies to counters placed on permanents.
• Astral Dragon's token copies are now 3/3 Dragons with the right type overrides.
• Persist (and other synthesized keyword triggers) now survive being copied.
• Cybership puts the top two cards of the damaged player's library onto the battlefield as 2/2 Cybermen under your control.
• Tekuthal's proliferate-doubling now flows through the replacement pipeline.
• "Creatures that would enter from exile are shuffled into the library" temporary replacements now parse correctly.
• Newly recognized creature subtypes flip ~25 more cards to supported: Villain (Visions of Villainy, Venom's Hunger), plus Hero, Spy, Scientist, Cyborg, and Sorcerer.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Modal spells now hide modes whose targets are illegal — Izzet Charm's counter mode can't be chosen with no noncreature spell on the stack (X-cost modes are deferred until X is announced).

🖥️ Interface
• The chosen {X} value now shows as a prominent always-visible badge on stacked spells, instead of hiding among the small cost chips.
• Mana and tap symbols ({T}, {1}, {R}) now render properly in stack-card trigger/ability labels instead of showing literal braces.
• Mobile battlefield polish: more compact overflow pill and the creature overview no longer clips its first card row.

entries.title: Exchange-life-total cards now work
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Exchange life totals between two players now works — Soul Conduit, Axis of Mortality, Magus of the Mirror, and Mirror Universe (with the proper all-or-nothing rule when a player can't gain or lose life).
• Opponent-scoped draw replacements: Notion Thief, Hullbreacher, and the "Chains" class now steal opponents' extra draws (first draw each turn excepted).
• "Whenever an opponent plays a land/permanent, it enters tapped" — Uphill Battle and Contamination class now parse correctly, distinct from control-based enter-tapped effects.
• Explore replacements with a scry prelude and double-explore (Twists and Turns, Topography Tracker).
• "For each different power/mana value among…" now counts distinct values — Golden Ratio draws the right number of cards, plus Celebrate the Harvest, Lunar Insight, and Sudden Insight.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• "Target creature attacks if able" now binds to the chosen creature instead of doing nothing (Boiling Blood, Heckling Fiends, Rage Nimbus, Basandra Battle Seraph, Imps' Taunt, Incite, Into the Fray, Shipwreck Singer, Koma, Toski).
• One-sided fight ("it deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls") now hits the opponent's creature instead of the attacker itself — Ambuscade, Clear Shot, Rabid Gnaw, Wolf Strike, Burrog Barrage.
• Spells with two separately-targeted halves joined by "and" no longer drop the second target — Skulduggery, Armistice, Game of Chaos.
• One-shot damage prevention/redirection shields now resolve for 13 cards: the en-Kor cycle, General's Regalia, Soltari Guerrillas, Jade Monolith, Beacon of Destiny, Goblin Psychopath, Nova Pentacle, Zealous Inquisitor, and more.
• Dagger Caster now deals its damage to each opponent (previously dealt none).
• Granted Toxic now stacks with printed Toxic — Skrelv giving Toxic 1 to a Toxic 1 creature correctly deals 2 poison counters.

entries.title: Smarter Phyrexian auto-tap; refreshed Preferences
entries.body:
• Agent of Treachery only draws when you actually control three+ permanents you don't own (it was drawing every end step).
• Seasoned Pyromancer now makes the right number of tokens, counting discarded nonland instants and sorceries.
• Fractal Harness enters, makes its Fractal token with counters, and attaches to it instead of letting a 0/0 die.
• Springheart Nantuko's landfall now only fires while it's attached to a creature you control.
• Sevinne's Reclamation no longer re-triggers itself on flashback spell copies.
• Explore that grants "play an additional land this turn" now actually grants it.
• Manifest dread resolves correctly when the looked-at land pauses on an enters-the-battlefield choice.
• Spiders-Man's "if they were cast using web-slinging" bonus now checks how it was cast instead of always firing.
• Umbral Mantle-style {Q} (untap) pump costs are paid correctly — and refuse to fire on an already-untapped creature.
• Face-down cards (manifest/morph) now reveal their real identity when they leave the battlefield or stack.
• "Deals damage" triggers that reference the damaged permanent or its owner now match properly.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Phyrexian mana auto-tap is smarter — it now reserves flexible dual lands for strict color costs instead of spending them on Phyrexian symbols you could pay with life.

🤖 AI
• The AI no longer casts pile-separation spells (Fact or Fiction-style) when no opponent has creatures to split.

🖥️ Interface
• Refreshed Preferences — new dropdown control with smoother board-background and audio-theme selection.

entries.title: New format: Momir's Madness
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• New format: Momir's Madness — play with the engine's fixed snow-basic deck and the command-zone emblem ({X}, Discard a card: create a token copy of a random creature with mana value X). Random tokens now correctly exclude transform/flip back faces.
• Halving Season now works both ways — it halves the tokens and the +1/+1 / loyalty counters your opponents would get (and correctly makes you choose replacement order when it interacts with doubling effects).
• Counterspells with non-mana "unless" costs now parse — "counter unless its controller pays N life / sacrifices a permanent / discards a card."
• Double-all-damage effects (Furnace of Rath / Gratuitous Violence-style) now apply globally.
• Vine Gecko and friends — "the first kicked spell you cast each turn costs less" cost reduction.
• Absolute Virtue — "you have protection from X" now grants protection to the player, not your permanents.
• Path of Ancestry, Ghostfire (colorless despite its red mana cost), and Nix ("if no mana was spent to cast it") now fully supported.
• Spider-Sense and similar counters can now target any of their listed spell types and triggered abilities.
• Effects that count "for each card you've discarded this turn" now scale correctly (Change of Fortune, Living Laser, Astonishing Spider-Man, and 7 more).
• Legend-rule exemptions for base-type/token/commander wording (Cadric-class), "your opponents can't search libraries," "creatures can't have counters put on them," divide/distribute damage, and named coin-flips ("Chandra flips a coin").

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Breach the Multiverse — per-player reanimation now hits each player's graveyard correctly.
• Top-of-library tutors (Mystical, Vampiric, Worldly, Personal, Enlightened) no longer error when they fail to find — the spell still shuffles.

entries.title: No auto-pass when you can sacrifice for mana
entries.body:
• Fractured Sanity's cycling now triggers properly
• Fixed dropped scopes and clauses on Fight/attacks triggers, Sagas with chosen names, escape costs, die-roll "equal to the result" counters, "attacking or blocking alone" death triggers, and "didn't attack or enter this turn" counter targets
• Manifest dread no longer prematurely sends a card to the graveyard while a battlefield-entry prompt is open

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• The game no longer auto-passes your priority when you could still sacrifice a permanent for mana

🖥️ Interface
• Peregrine Drake's untap prompt is no longer mislabeled as a sacrifice prompt
• Card hover previews now work on tablets that have a mouse attached (touch-primary devices)
• New mobile filter sheet in the deck builder, rendered above the app shell via portals
• Settings modal layout, sidebar navigation, and scrolling improved
• Card search now uses a more flexible dropdown menu

entries.title: Momir Basic & Madness now playable
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Momir Basic and Momir's Madness formats are now playable — the classic "discard a card, {X}: make a random creature of that mana value" game built on a reusable token-copy-from-pool engine primitive
• Added "can't untap more than one <type>" restrictions, with a new prompt for choosing which permanents to untap when you're over the cap (Winter Orb-style effects)
• Shadow creatures can now be granted permission to be blocked by static effects
• "Prevent that damage and remove that many +1/+1 counters" effects now work
• Lots of new parser coverage unlocking more cards:
   – Extra-token replacements (Tippy-Toe, Xorn, Peregrin Took) and extra-energy replacements
   – Lose-life doublers that target opponents
   – Basic lands that tap for triple mana
   – "Choose a keyword … gains that ability" and multi-keyword grants ("they gain flying, vigilance, …")
   – Per-kind counter add/remove, "remove all of them and transform" clauses
   – "One or more target creatures become <color>", "<player> may have you draw a card"
   – {TK} ticket counters and named tokens (Vibranium, Mutavault, and more)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Magus Lucea Kane (Psychic Stimulus) now correctly copies your next X-spell
• Vexing Puzzlebox now rolls its d20 on the stack instead of resolving instantly
• Incinerate, Flamebreak, and Jaya Ballard now correctly stop creatures they damaged from regenerating
• Misfortune's Gain, Path of Peace, Thieving Amalgam, and The Matrix of Time now route "its owner" life changes to the right player
• Spell Stutter and Concerted Defense now charge the full "{N} plus an additional {M} for each …" counter cost
• Haunted One now buffs only the commander and matching creatures, not everything
• Airbend now lets the exiled card's owner cast it, even when an opponent controls the airbender
• Song of the Dryads now correctly strips abilities (CR 305.7)

entries.title: "The Ring tempts you" triggers now fire correctly after the ring-be…
entries.body:
• "The Ring tempts you" triggers now fire correctly after the ring-bearer is chosen (#1017).
• Equipment auras/statics that key off "equipped creature is attacking" now apply to the right creature under the right condition.

entries.title: Archenemy schemes arrive
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Archenemy is here — full schemes runtime: the Scheme card type, a scheme deck, setting schemes in motion, and abandoning them (CR 904).
• Conspiracy cards now work, including their command-zone / face-down draft rules (CR 905).
• "Has hexproof if it hasn't dealt damage yet" now works as a real conditional keyword — the creature loses hexproof the moment it deals damage, and regains it cleanly if it leaves and re-enters the battlefield (Palladia-Mors, the Ruiner; Karakyk Guardian; Oyaminartok, Polar Werebear).
• New trigger for "When a spell or ability an opponent controls causes you to discard this card…" (Guerrilla Tactics, Sand Golem, Quagnoth, Mangara's Blessing, Ajani's Last Stand, Pure Intentions).

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Taii Wakeen, Perfect Tempo now draws when a source you control deals damage equal to a creature's toughness — and the broader class of "a source you control deals damage plus N instead" boosts now actually fire (I Call for Slaughter, Rankle and Torbran).
• "Otherwise, put it into your graveyard" branches now relocate the revealed card correctly instead of doing nothing (Call of the Wild, Neurok Familiar, Skirk Drill Sergeant, Zoologist).
• Escape to the Wilds now grants standing permission to play the exiled cards through your next turn, and its extra land drop is actually playable.
• "This ability costs {N} less to activate if…" conditional cost reductions are no longer dropped (Esquire of the King, Starport Security, Raft Security Officer, Razorlash Transmogrant).
• Villainous-choice branches like "Destroy all X and…" no longer collapse their second effect.
• Compound "deals damage to a player and a creature/permanent" effects now parse correctly.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Level Up creatures now double their +1/+1 counters when attacking, and the matching draw clause only fires when it's supposed to (#1020).

entries.title: New Flex Layout table-editing mode
entries.body:
⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Fixed a crash when a player conceded in a 3-player game while one of their triggers was paused mid-resolution
• Decks can run all nine copies of Nazgûl in Commander, even with mixed "Nazgul"/"Nazgûl" spellings

🤖 AI
• The AI no longer animates a man-land (e.g. Shambling Vent) when the only way to pay is tapping that same land — it stopped wasting them into tapped creatures that can't attack or block

🖥️ Interface
• New Flex Layout edit mode — customize your table: drag the HUD, stack, log, action rail, and zones; resize the board bands and the lands↔support divider; reorder the lands/support/command cells; scale widgets; align cells; snap-to-home; save up to three layout presets (Ctrl+Shift+L, right-click the board, or Preferences → Visual). Fully touch/mobile friendly. Your default layout is unchanged unless you customize it.
• Richer status display — player condition badges, a Ring-benefits hover popover, per-land tapped/untapped mana availability, and a scrollable overflow grid for creatures with combat participants pulled to the front
• The Learn modal now renders so Learn cards no longer hang silently (rummage or skip)
• Assist now shows proper overlays — the caster picks a helper, who can then pay toward the cost
• Removed a misleading board glow on PairChoice cards that couldn't actually be clicked

🌍 Localization
• All new interface text (flex layout, Learn, Assist, status badges) ships translated across all 7 supported languages

entries.title: Mayhem: cast from your graveyard on discard
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Mayhem is here — cast cards from your graveyard the turn you discard them (Green Goblin now grants it too)
• Gonti, Night Minister steals and casts spells off the top of opponents' libraries
• Expropriate's money vote now works correctly — each "money" ballot lets the caster seize a permanent owned by that specific voter

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Endurance shuffles a graveyard onto the bottom of its owner's library (it was silently doing nothing)
• Rishkar's Expertise and other Expertise cards now actually cast their free spell instead of stalling
• Recurring Nightmare correctly returns itself to hand as part of its activation cost
• Oversold Cemetery only triggers when you have four or more creature cards in your graveyard
• Heraldic Banner's +1/+0 now applies once you choose its color (Black, etc.)
• Peregrin Took makes its bonus Food token
• "Up to that many target" reflexive abilities resolve properly when you sacrifice (Swashbuckler Extraordinaire, Loamcrafter Faun, Miasma Demon, and ~9 more) — and no longer fire at all if you decline
• Untap-self triggers point at the right permanent again (Alexios, Deimos of Kosmos; Amulet of Vigor; Genji, the Storyteller; Raggadragga)
• "Enters under the control of an opponent" now puts the permanent under the opponent's control (Xantcha, Sleeper Agent; Abby, Merciless Soldier; Pendant of Prosperity; Captive Audience)
• Villainous-choice cards prompt the correct opponent — the one chosen or the affected card's owner, not you (The Master, Gallifrey's End; This Is How It Ends)
• "First/each [type] spell you cast each turn has [keyword]" static abilities now grant the keyword
• Searches for a card "of a stated quality" can correctly fail to find (no more freeze when your library can't supply the match — affects Aang's Journey and ~10 others)

entries.title: AI only removes what it can actually kill
entries.body:
• Removed a spurious loading spinner flash when switching dashboard tabs
• Frontend cleanup/optimization pass for a lighter, faster board

🤖 AI
• The AI now only casts creature removal (burn, -X/-X, -1/-1) when it can actually kill the target, and won't aim at warded creatures it can't pay for (red-mirror win rate 60% → 70%)

entries.title: Gideon planeswalker-creatures animate
entries.body:
🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Shelob, Child of Ungoliant now makes Food when a creature your Spiders damaged dies
• Equipment that triggers on combat damage (The Key to the Vault) now fires when the equipped creature hits a player
• Sunforger and milled "you may cast it" cards no longer grant an endless free recast — the permission is spent after one cast
• Ocelot Pride correctly counts the token it just made when checking for the city's blessing, and Siege cards can be cast from exile
• Taigam, Sidisi's Hand now exiles the spell you cast with time counters (not itself)
• Gonti-style "look, exile face down, then play it" now exiles the card you dug, not the source
• Mass "return to the battlefield" effects (Planar Birth-style) now keep enter-tapped and enter-with-counters behavior
• "Gains no life instead" now correctly prevents the life gain
• Sacrifice triggers from tokens that have ceased to exist now resolve via last-known information
• Effects that look at the top of your library and keep cards on top now route the kept cards correctly (Dig effects)
• "For each ..." multiplier clauses on effects now scale properly
• Search effects with a trailing filter across a "type or type" list now apply the filter to every type
• ETB-replacement "as it enters" choices now correctly fire enter-the-battlefield triggers afterward

✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Gideon, the Oathsworn / Gideon Blackblade-style "during your turn this is a creature that's still a planeswalker" animations now work
• Sarkhan's +1 "becomes a legendary 4/4 Dragon" now applies full power/toughness and color, not just keywords
• "The tokens are goaded" riders on token-creation effects (3000) are now honored

🖥️ Interface
• Multi-card top-of-library reveals (Lead the Stampede, "reveal the top N") now fan out face-up for every player to watch, not just the first card
• Fixed a stale battlefield background when switching background modes or seats mid-game

entries.title: Many died/drew-this-turn targeting fixes
entries.body:
• Free-cast and graveyard-cast fixes: cast from an opponent's graveyard now resolves (Memory Plunder), and Bring to Light's free cast no longer lingers as a permanent permission.
• Combat-prevention and attack-trigger fixes: Suppressor Skyguard correctly checks for an unattacked opponent; Lulu, Loyal Hollyphant's Stern Guardian only stuns attackers.
• Cost-reduction accuracy: Heliod, the Warped Eclipse no longer over-reduces your spells.
• "Draw cards equal to the difference" now resolves inside triggers (Kozilek the Great Distortion, Damia, Krang, The Ten Rings, Doctor Octopus).
• Counter and token fixes: Currency Converter stops making Rogue tokens on an empty tap; Wall of Mourning's ETB exile resolves cleanly; Broodspinner-style tokens keep their flying.
• Damage and cost interactions: spells targeting Terror of the Peaks now pay the extra-life tax; Blast-Furnace Hellkite's offering and attacking-opponents grant work.
• Stuck-game fixes: Bronzehide Lion no longer hangs when its return-as-aura has no target, and impossible "choose" effects now resolve as a no-op instead of wedging the game.
• Commander-zone fix: auras no longer appear still attached after a commander leaves and returns.
• More cards corrected: Agitator Ant (end-step counters and scoped goad), and creatures that return as face-down Forest lands.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Numerous targeting and scoping fixes so "creatures that died under your control," "cards your opponents drew this turn," and similar counts now tally exactly the right objects.

entries.title: Planechase format arrives
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Planechase is here! Full runtime support for the format — planes and phenomena, the planar deck, planeswalking, rolling the planar die, and chaos triggers (CR 901).
• Conspiracy / "draft matters" cards now load and play correctly — their draft-time text is recognized and skipped, so 12 of these cards work in constructed play (Conspiracy cards).
• Mana that cares how you spend it now triggers — "when you spend this mana to cast a [type] spell" effects fire properly (Lapis Orb of Dragonkind, Scaled Nurturer, Gilanra).
• Restricted-mana sources that allow ability activation now parse correctly (Sage of the Unknowable, Purple Dragon Punks, Guidelight Optimizer).
• New abilities now working: Zack Fair's sacrifice/counter-move/re-equip ability, Master of Cruelties' "can only attack alone," Telepathy's hand reveal, and Baldin's toughness-based damage. Enlist is now modeled as an attack cost.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Planeswalkers keep their loyalty correctly — combat damage and loyalty costs now stick, even on walkers that started without a counter entry (Teferi).
• Teferi's Protection no longer wrongly prompts you to pick a single permanent for its mass phase-out.
• Magecraft now fires when a spell is copied mid-resolution (Professor Onyx).
• Flashback fixes: Sevinne's Reclamation can copy itself again, and Dragon's Rage Channeler's cast trigger fires with correct timing on flashback.
• Token fixes: Mechtitan's token keeps haste and becomes all colors; copy-tokens of a creature with myriad behave correctly (Anikthea).
• Extra-combat fixes: Najeela's untap and keyword grant now apply with the additional combat step.
• "When you do" reflexive triggers now wait on their optional cost — Caesar, Legion's Emperor only offers its choose-two after you actually sacrifice.
• Modal activated abilities now charge their sacrifice cost (Breya).

entries.title: Alternative-cost prompts no longer crash
entries.body:
• Effects that count “each counter on this [permanent type]” now count any counters on the source correctly.
• “From anywhere to graveyard” triggers now route through the correct trigger index.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Divided-damage spells such as Shatterskull Smashing no longer offer more targets than the damage can legally be divided among.
• Repeated modal “unless they pay” choices now charge each repeated mode independently.
• Unblocked attack triggers against opponents now fire at the correct point after blockers, fixing cards like Coveted Jewel.
• Damage triggers now bind “them” to the correct player for upkeep, draw, and damage-source conditions, fixing cards like Roiling Vortex, Razorkin Needlehead, and Mindblade Render.
• “No creatures attacked this turn” conditions now parse correctly.
• Token-related intervening-if and goad anaphors now bind correctly for Life of the Party-style text.

🖥️ Interface
• Alternative-cost prompts no longer crash for Spectacle, Emerge, Impending, or Prototype; the modal now has display copy for every engine alternative-cast keyword.

🌍 Localization
• Added localized alternative-cast prompt text for the newly covered keyword prompts.

entries.title: Meld now works at runtime
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Meld now works at runtime, including correct pair identity checks and battlefield entry handling.
• Venture into the dungeon and take the initiative triggers now resolve correctly.
• Mass control-change effects now work, so cards like Hellkite Tyrant can steal all matching permanents from the right player.
• Zone-based keyword grants now work for cards like Six, letting eligible graveyard cards use retrace.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Muxus, Goblin Grandee now puts all matching Goblins onto the battlefield and bottoms the rest instead of asking for a single choice.
• Mox Diamond now actually requires and pays its discard cost before entering.
• Nexus of Fate now shuffles itself back correctly when it resolves from the stack.
• Worldfire now sets every player’s life total to 1.
• Future Sight-style effects now keep the top card of the library revealed at runtime.
• The Tarrasque now only gets its “was cast” bonuses when it was actually cast.
• Craterhoof Behemoth and Xenagos-style “+X/+X where X is …” boosts now use the correct dynamic value.
• Chandra, Hope’s Beacon now restricts her exile-cast permission to the intended instant or sorcery and only allows the single granted cast.
• Archangel Elspeth’s mass return now resumes properly after choosing an Aura attachment, so later cards are not skipped.
• Prized Amalgam now triggers from the graveyard with the correct “entered or was cast from your graveyard” condition.
• Amareth, the Lustrous now gates reveal choices on shared card type.
• Unbreathing Horde now prevents only damage that would be dealt to itself.
• Mog, Moogle Warrior now preserves “may” on each-player discard.
• Blinkmoth Urn now routes subject-led mana to the correct player.
• Zimone, Infinite Analyst-style “first qualified spell each turn costs less” effects now keep their spell filter and once-per-turn gate.

entries.title: Granted keyword triggers fire on leave
entries.body:
• Phyrexian Dreadnought's "sacrifice creatures with total power 12 or greater or sacrifice it" now resolves correctly
• Ali from Cairo's life can't be reduced to 0 (life-floor damage replacement)
• Astarion, the Decadent's "Feed" mode now drains the target for the life they lost this turn
• Kibo, Uktabi Prince only counters creatures that are an Ape or a Monkey
• Arc Trail can no longer aim both halves at the same target
• Trystan's Command can return up to two permanents in its graveyard mode
• Molten-Core Maestro reads its power after the +1/+1 counter is added
• Library of Leng's discard-to-top replacement now applies
• Lost Monarch of Ifnir mills only when a Zombie dealt combat damage this turn
• Saga back faces seed their first lore counter when a card enters transformed
• Shiko and Narset, Unified (Flurry) only copies targeted second spells, and draws only when no copy was made
• Krark, the Thumbless keeps its copy-and-retarget in one resolution
• Deflecting Swat can choose new targets
• Fixes for Alexios (can't attack its owner), Grenzo (controller/targeting), Rampant Frogantua ("for each player who has lost the game"), Resonating Lute, dual-subject anthem effects, conditional opponent-control activation restrictions, and up-to-N bounce opting out of all targets

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Runtime-granted keyword triggers now fire correctly when a creature leaves the battlefield

🤖 AI
• The AI now avoids casting spells into a Chalice of the Void it can't beat

🖥️ Interface
• Improved mobile lobby — cleaner format filter (now a proper menu) and tidier server chip layout

entries.title: Cloak arrives; Omnath grows live
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Cloak is here (Bloomburrow) — cards like Cryptic Coat and Ransom Note now cloak the top of your library face down as a 2/2 with ward {2}, turnable face up for its mana cost
• Imprint "flip" cards work — Clone Shell, Summoner's Egg, Compleated Clone Shell, and The Creation of Avacyn now turn the exiled card face up and put it onto the battlefield
• Master of Cruelties can now only attack alone, as printed
• Detective's Phoenix can be cast with Bestow from your graveyard (paying its Collect Evidence cost)
• Harvest Pyre can pay its "exile X cards from your graveyard" additional cost
• New conditional cost reductions — abilities that "cost {N} less to activate if [condition]" now apply the discount correctly (Razorlash Transmogrant, Esquire of the King, Starport Security, Sewer Crocodile, Imoen)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Omnath, Locus of Mana now grows +1/+1 for each unspent green mana you have, live, instead of a flat +1/+1
• Swords to Plowshares (and any "equal to its power/toughness" exile/destroy effect) now counts the creature's counters — a 3/3 with eight +1/+1 counters gains 11 life, not 3
• The Vow cycle (Vow of Lightning, Duty, Flight, Torment, Wildness) now actually stops the enchanted creature from attacking you
• Name-lock hatebears finally lock — Meddling Mage, Nevermore, and Voidstone Gargoyle now prevent spells with the chosen name from being cast
• Leyline of the Void / Rest in Peace no longer wrongly exile an opponent's dying tokens, so death triggers (Blood Artist, etc.) fire as they should
• Plot cards work — Make Your Own Luck, Lilah, Undefeated Slickshot, Kellan Joins Up, and Jace Reawakened now mark the exiled card plotted so you can cast it for free later
• Torment of Hailfire resolves each X iteration fully per opponent
• Torrential Gearhulk now exiles the instant/sorcery cast from your graveyard instead of letting it return

entries.title: Token-leaves triggers; polished format dropdown
entries.body:
⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Nadier's Nightblade now triggers when your creature tokens leave the battlefield.
• Merged Mutate creatures fire their "dies"/"leaves" triggers once when they leave, not once per card in the pile.
• Token copies now keep their real abilities (Magecraft, "whenever you cast…") instead of being stripped, while one-time cast-only riders are correctly dropped; Offspring tokens also show the right art.
• You can now pay with mana from sources that produce more than one color/type, and the engine counts it toward whether a spell is castable.
• Modal double-faced commanders cast as their back face now return to the command zone as their front face.
• Graveyard-hate effects (Rest in Peace, Leyline of the Void) now correctly catch cards sent off by cipher decline, madness decline, and the legend rule.
• When you look at and choose from the top of a library, those cards are now properly revealed.

🖥️ Interface
• Format selection in the deck builder, My Decks, and the load-deck menu now uses a polished dropdown with dark-mode support.
• The deck builder now honors per-card copy-limit overrides (e.g. Seven Dwarves) for cards in your search results, not just after they're in the deck.

entries.title: "Enters under an opponent's control" works
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• "Enters under an opponent's control" now works — Xantcha, Sleeper Agent, Captive Audience, Pendant of Prosperity, and Abby, Merciless Soldier finally hand the permanent to the right player.
• Conjure-a-duplicate is live — "conjure a duplicate of" a referenced card now resolves (~47 cards), including the "that creature / that spell / that permanent" wording (Goblin Morale Sergeant, Vodalian Tide Mage, Spellchain Scatter, Vona de Iedo).
• Mass put-into-play under another player's control now resolves correctly — Show and Tell, Tempting Wurm, Hypergenesis, and Warp World no longer stall mid-resolution.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• The extra-turn-with-a-catch cards now actually catch you — Final Fortune, Last Chance, Warrior's Oath, and Chance for Glory correctly make you lose the game at that turn's end step (previously a downside-free extra turn).
• Archon of Cruelty now asks you to pick the opponent once, not three times — its sacrifice / discard / lose-life clauses all target the same player.
• Shield of the Oversoul and similar "as long as enchanted creature is [color/type/basic]…" auras now actually buff the creature they're attached to.
• Nissa, Who Shakes the World keeps haste (and vigilance) on her animated lands — the "still a land" rider no longer eats the second keyword.
• Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer can dash when Dash is granted to it, matching how Blitz and Evoke already worked.
• Anim Pakal, Thousandth Moon's tokens now enter tapped and attacking as written.
• Tireless Provisioner now prompts you to choose Food or Treasure on landfall.
• Pest tokens now gain you life when they attack.
• "Destroyed this way" count effects now read the right number.
• Weathered Wayfarer can be activated when an opponent controls more lands than you (correct even in multiplayer).
• Glademuse's bonus now triggers correctly on other players' turns.

entries.title: Self-host a server without port-forwarding
entries.body:
• Blinked creatures with self-referential triggers no longer misfire against their pre-blink selves.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• "Can block only creatures with flying" restrictions are now enforced (Drone tokens, Cloud Sprite) — illegal blocks are rejected.
• "Becomes the target of a Backup ability" triggers now fire (Huge Truck).

🤖 AI
• The AI stops wasting Alchemist's Refuge-style flash activations when no spell in hand would actually benefit.

🌐 Multiplayer
• Self-hosters can now run a server for friends without port-forwarding — an optional built-in tunnel surfaces a shareable join link to copy and send. (Requires ngrok sign-up)

entries.title: Prototype cards read their alternative stats
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Prototype now works — the alternative power/toughness on the full Brothers' War cycle is read correctly, so prototyped creatures enter at their reduced stats (Phyrexian Fleshgorger and friends).
• Embalm & Eternalize now charge their full cost — non-mana costs like "Discard a card" are no longer dropped (Champion of Wits).
• Cases now auto-solve — every "To solve" condition the engine understands (life totals, hand size, permanents you control, and more) now resolves, so a Case's "Solved —" ability comes online instead of staying dead.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Wishclaw Talisman now hands control to the chosen opponent after its search.
• Aven Interrupter exiles the spell you target instead of exiling itself.
• White Sun's Twilight makes its tokens and "destroy all other creatures" now spares the tokens it just created.
• Serpent's Soul-Jar properly exiles and lets you cast from exile.
• Arabella, Abandoned Doll and similar "deal damage to each opponent" cards deal the right amount instead of 0.
• Solitude and cards like it grant the targeted creature's controller life equal to its power.
• Mirror Image and Waxen Shapethief can now copy "a creature you control."
• Grand Master of Flowers and other planeswalkers that become creatures using "he's/she's a..." now gain their full stats, types, and keywords.
• Harvest Season correctly counts your tapped creatures for X; Slime Against Humanity counts your Oozes and named cards.
• Self-spell cost reductions now apply when casting from the graveyard.
• Free-cast emblems (Tamiyo) and ability-granting emblems (Koth of the Hammer) now do what they say.
• Exploit payoffs that watch other creatures now fire, including self-exploit cases.
• Emperor of Bones' delayed sacrifice binds to the creature it returned; Gathering Stone, Obsessive Pursuit, Delver of Secrets, and Abundance all behave correctly now.

entries.title: Redesigned two-column board with command dock
entries.body:
• Council / vote cards now tally votes correctly (Emissary of Grudges, Truth or Consequences class).
• Impulse-draw "play from exile" now routes lands through the proper cast path, and "until end of next turn" durations expire correctly (Clockwork Percussionist, Alania's Pathmaker).
• Paradigm copies no longer drop the copied spell's other abilities.
• Unstoppable Plan's end-step untap now fires even when phase entry is briefly paused for a mana choice.
• Compound triggers and the Afflict keyword now parse correctly.
• Escape cards refuse an illegal zero-card exile.
• "Each of N target ..." now applies to exactly N chosen targets instead of every creature (e.g. Rot-Curse Rakshasa).

🖥️ Interface
• Redesigned two-column board layout with a dedicated command-zone dock — choose an always-visible inline cluster or a collapsed compact pile (auto-selected by screen size, overridable in settings).
• Emblems now render as Arena-style chips showing the creating card's art, a "from <name>" label, and the emblem's rules text.
• Distinct tokens that share a name but have different abilities (like differing Pest tokens) no longer stack into a single group.
• Graveyard and zone-viewer art now displays correctly for transformed and double-faced cards.
• Card search now finds split, Aftermath, and Fuse cards by their combined name (e.g. "Commit // Memory").

⚡ Under the Hood
• X-cost spells (bestow, ravenous, foretell, devour) compute their maximum X much faster, clearing the lag when announcing the cost.

entries.title: Mounts & Saddle arrive
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Mounts & Saddle (Outlaws of Thunder Junction) — saddle a Mount to switch on its abilities; the saddled designation now powers anthems and "saddled creature" effects, and clears correctly at end of turn.
• Reconfigure Equipment now stops being a creature while attached to one — and can no longer equip itself.
• Toxic and Infect poison now flows through replacement effects, so "players can't get poison counters" and poison-doublers finally apply; multiple Toxic instances sum into one total.
• Craft now links its exiled materials to the crafting permanent, so abilities that "refer to the cards used to craft it" work.
• Granted keywords now do their thing — Fabricate, Blitz, Riot, Encore, and Scavenge produce their effects even when handed out by another card, not just when printed.
• Training creatures now install their combat trigger.
• Alternative-cost "as it enters this way" riders (Surge, Spectacle, Ninjutsu, Evoke, and friends) now fire only when that alternative cost was actually paid.
• Awaken cards are now matched by effects that look for "a card with awaken."

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Sol Ring (and Mind Stone, Wastes) now auto-tap for generic costs — spells payable only by colorless rocks are no longer reported uncastable.
• Planeswalkers drained to 0 loyalty now die instead of snapping back to their printed loyalty.
• Double-faced planeswalkers that enter transformed (Sorin, Ravenous Neonate) now arrive with the correct back-face loyalty.
• Auras re-apply their continuous effects after phasing back in.
• Luminarch Aspirant — its begin-combat trigger now works when you control multiple copies.
• Final Parting now correctly splits its search between hand and graveyard.
• Star Athlete deals its 5 damage to the chosen permanent's controller (and deals nothing when no permanent is chosen).
• Thalisse now counts tokens created this turn correctly.

entries.title: New reveal-aware library viewer
entries.body:
🖥️ Interface
• New reveal-aware library viewer — hover the top card of a library when it's revealed to preview it, click to open a top-first library view, and play or cast from the top right inside it
• Emblems now render as card-shaped art tiles showing their granted ability, and stay on-screen instead of sliding off the board edge
• Commander damage column now hides itself when empty and no longer warps adjacent board rows; support-area planeswalkers stay on one line
• Fixed manual +1/+1 counter addition in the debug menu
• Closed a single-player leak where an opponent's top library card (and full library in the new viewer) could be seen

entries.title: Alchemy spellbook conjuring works
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Alchemy spellbook draft — cards that conjure from a spellbook now let you choose which card to pull and bring it into play
• Alchemy Intensify — intensity tracking and "intensify by X" mutations are now fully simulated, including starting intensity on double-faced back sides

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Thespian's Stage keeps its copy ability after copying a land (no longer becomes a plain copy)
• Banner of Kinship correctly applies fellowship counters and +1/+1 bonuses after you pick a creature type
• Lifecraft Engine no longer lets Vehicles crew each other
• Not of This World only applies its {7} cost reduction when the discount actually qualifies
• The Ozolith and Reyhan, Last of the Abzan now see the counters a creature had when it left the battlefield (instead of reading 0)
• Mockingbird (and any creature copying a token) now displays the copied token's art
• Eladamri, Korvecdal can again reveal a card from your hand
• Marath, Will of the Wild supports removing a variable number of counters as a cost
• Nita, Forum Conciliator correctly triggers on spells you don't own
• Electrodominance and similar "cast from hand" effects no longer silently fizzle when picking a spell
• Homing Sliver's granted typecycling now works at runtime
• Cumulative upkeep paid by exiling from the top of your library (e.g. Thought Lash) now resolves as an all-or-nothing payment

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Creatures with +1/+1 counters now deal combat damage equal to their actual boosted power
• Triggers that watch for combat damage dealt to a player now report the correct triggering player

entries.title: Epic spells now fully playable
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Epic spells are now fully playable — casting one locks you out of casting other spells for the rest of the game, then copies it on each of your upkeeps (Enduring Ideal and the Saviors of Kamigawa Epics)
• "Bands with other" combat now works end-to-end — declare and assign damage across the band correctly
• Invoke Calamity now resolves into an interactive free-cast window: pick spells to cast for free up to its total mana-value budget, with the spells exiled afterward

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Dromoka's Command now only prevents damage from the spell you choose (instead of shutting off all damage on the board)
• Rise of the Dark Realms now reanimates every creature in all graveyards without stalling
• Bucknard's Everfull Purse correctly creates Treasure and transfers control
• Chaos Warp now reveals and shuffles the targeted permanent's owner's library, not the caster's
• Doubling Chant searches once per creature you control
• Sin Spira and similar random exile-to-copy effects now copy the right card
• Planar Genesis lands enter tapped, and Broken Bond no longer eats your land drop
• Sugar Coat ("Enchant creature or Food") can now be cast at all
• Immovable Rod, Fog on the Barrow-Downs, and Observed Stasis now actually stop creatures from attacking or blocking
• Omnath conditional triggers fixed (plus a corrected Obuun animation)
• Broader parsing for enchant targets (either/or choices and library-origin zones), uncapped "dig" selection, and excess-damage triggers

🖥️ Interface
• Draft pod deckbuilder now renders the mana curve again

🤖 AI
• Fixed a 4-player Commander game that could hang forever when the AI was forced to attack under goad / "must attack" rules — it now declares legal mixed-target attacks

entries.title: Peeked opponent library tops display right
entries.body:
• Daretti (and battle defense) loyalty is now preserved correctly instead of resetting to printed values
• Domain no longer counts phased-out basic lands (Tribal Flames, Matca Rioters, etc.)
• A second legendary copy entering no longer clobbers a targeted enter-the-battlefield trigger

🖥️ Interface
• Privately peeked opponent library tops (e.g. Mishra's Bauble) now display correctly

entries.title: Ripple cascades through your library
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Ripple now works — revealing the top N cards when you cast a spell and casting the same-named ones free (Coldsnap's Surging cycle, Thrumming Stone)
• Delve is live — exile graveyard cards to pay generic mana, making Dig Through Time and Treasure Cruise castable as intended (~28 cards)
• Spectacle now lets you cast for the discounted cost when an opponent lost life this turn
• Assist now works — another player can help pay a spell's generic mana (~16 cards)
• Devoid cards are now correctly colorless in every zone (~all Devoid cards)
• Transfigure now works (Fleshwrither) — sacrifice to search up a creature of equal mana value
• Self-spell cost reductions of the form "costs {X} less, where X is …" now apply correctly (devotion, total power/toughness, differently-named lands, etc. — ~16 cards)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Hazel now creates a token when copying one
• Mobilize tokens are now sacrificed at the next end step instead of end of combat
• Anti-Venom now only prevents damage involving itself, not all creature damage
• Vexing Sphinx now properly demands a discard each upkeep (cumulative upkeep with a discard cost)
• Arachnogenesis prevent-all and its non-Spider filter now resolve correctly
• Scroll Rack's exile/draw/reorder sequence now works
• Kenessos now reads multi-subtype library reveals ("if it's a … creature card") correctly
• Desynchronization no longer bounces historic permanents
• Hada Spy Patrol no longer has Shroud until level 3+
• Semblance Anvil now only discounts spells sharing a type with the imprinted card
• Timber Paladin no longer applies its max-level stats with no Auras attached
• Vesuva no longer keeps its copied name and types after leaving the battlefield
• Mox Amber now offers only the colors of legendary creatures and planeswalkers you control
• Devour no longer eats creatures entering alongside it, and two devourers entering together can't eat each other

entries.title: Online P2P now supports 6 players
entries.body:
⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
 • "Whenever ~ becomes blocked" abilities now fire once per combat regardless of blocker count — double-blocked Bushido and Rampage no longer double up
 • Excess-damage triggers now fire when planeswalkers and battles take more than lethal damage
 • Cost increases are now applied before reductions, so the {0} floor is computed on the true aggregate (a {1} spell with +{1} and -{2} correctly costs {0})
 • Werewolves: the day/night transition now depends only on the active player's spells, so an opponent's instant on your turn no longer skews it

🤖 AI
 • Improved chump-blocking math: the AI no longer mistakenly concludes a survivable board is lethal and takes preventable damage; it now reserves its biggest blockers against trample
 • The AI can now make mandatory sacrifice choices (e.g. Deadly Brew)

🌐 Multiplayer
 • Online (P2P) games now support up to 6 players, matching play-vs-AI and the lobby server

entries.title: Fuse split cards cast both halves
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
 • Split cards with Fuse now cast both halves at once for the combined cost (Breaking // Entering)
 • Splice onto Arcane — reveal and merge spliced cards onto an Arcane spell you're casting
 • Frenzy now works, including Frenzy Sliver's "all Slivers have frenzy 1" grant
 • Surge — cast eligible spells for their cheaper Surge cost after you've already cast a spell this turn
 • Time Travel keyword action (Doctor Who) — advance suspended cards and Vanishing/Fading permanents
 • Granted Conspire now functions (Wort, the Raidmother; Rassilon, the War President)
 • Echo with non-mana costs now triggers correctly (Rakdos Headliner, Deepcavern Imp)
 • Overload spells are now castable even when their normal mode has no legal target (Mizzium Mortars into an empty board)
 • New card: Solemnity

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
 • Fable of the Mirror-Breaker's final chapter now transforms into Reflection of Kiki-Jiki instead of returning as a Saga
 • Goryo's Vengeance: the reanimated creature now gains haste and is exiled at the next end step
 • Demanding Dragon's "unless you sacrifice" prompt now resolves instead of being skipped
 • Deadly Brew's return rider now fires after sacrificing a planeswalker
 • Aura Graft only moves an aura onto a permanent it can legally enchant
 • Riot and Unleash ETB prompts now label the counter option vs. the haste/aggro option
 • Counter doublers (Doubling Season, Vorinclex, Hardened Scales) and counter prevention (Solemnity, Melira's Keepers) now apply to "double the counters" effects
 • Keyword counters can no longer re-grant a keyword that an effect has denied (Theros Archetype cycle, Arcane Lighthouse)
 • Leveler creatures no longer have their level-gated keywords (first strike, flying, etc.) active at level 0
 • Flicker effects on tokens (Cloudshift, Ephemerate, Restoration Angel, Eldrazi Displacer) now correctly let the token cease to exist instead of returning

entries.title: AI stops taking blockable lethal damage
entries.body:
• Anti-Venom (and Phyrexian Hydra, Stormwild Capridor, Hostility) now shield only their own creature instead of every creature on the board
• Eradicate, Crumble to Dust, Counterbore, and Deicide now correctly exile all same-named cards
• "Create X tokens that are copies of…" now works (Devastating Onslaught, Nacatl War-Pride, Rionya, Fire Dancer)
• "Any player may activate this ability, but only…" now keeps its timing restriction (Endbringer's Revel, Volrath's Dungeon, Lightning Storm)
• Cards gated on "during any turn you attacked with…" now enforce that condition (Neyali, Suns' Vanguard; Boros Strike-Captain; Neriv)
• Teferi, Time Raveler is now fully supported
• Kutzil's Flanker counts creatures that left the battlefield this turn
• Seven Dwarves counts its copies correctly
• Token copies of legendary cards (e.g. Miirym's dragons) no longer wrongly vanish to the legend rule when you reload a game
• Shifting Woodland's Delirium copy now reverts at end of turn instead of staying a copy permanently
• "Each of one or two targets" damage spells now parse correctly
• Crew's once-per-turn limit is now recognized

⚔️ Combat & AI
• The AI no longer takes lethal damage it could have blocked — fixed a flaw where it miscounted how much a chump-block-plus-trample situation could absorb
• The AI now makes profitable attacks it previously declined — fixed an overestimate of return damage when your board mixes flyers and ground blockers

🖥️ Interface
• Counterspell and similar spells now show "target spell" in the targeting banner instead of mislabeling it as a permanent

🌐 Cloud Sync
• Significantly reduced cloud-sync data usage and made syncing more reliable, with self-healing on stale or conflicting saves

entries.title: A wave of keywords (Dredge & more) now work
entries.body:
✨ New Keywords & Mechanics
• A huge wave of keywords now actually work in-game (they parsed before but did nothing): Dredge (Life from the Loam, Stinkweed Imp, Golgari Grave-Troll), Blitz, Dash, Emerge, Prowl, Conspire, Transmute, Amplify, Enlist, Undaunted, Hideaway, Haunt, Forecast (Pride of the Clouds, Sky Hussar), Forage, Compleated, Read Ahead, Fortify, Mayhem (Green Goblin), and Offering
• Read Ahead Sagas now let you choose your starting chapter and skip straight to it instead of always beginning at chapter I
• Compleated planeswalkers cast by paying life enter with the correct reduced loyalty (−2 per Phyrexian symbol paid with life)
• Undaunted spells are now cheaper in multiplayer — {1} off for each opponent (was always charged full price)
• Amplify creatures enter with +1/+1 counters for matching creature cards in your hand
• Enlist lets an attacker tap another creature to add its power to the attack
• Dredge replaces your draw with milling and returning the card from your graveyard
• Crew, Saddle, and Station now respect power-boost text — Reckoner Bankbuster crews for 3, and Giant Ox can crew using its toughness (24 cards including the "Roads" cycle, Shorikai)
• Affinity for card types now works (Tomik "affinity for planeswalkers", Urza "affinity for artifact creatures")
• Scavenge and Encore are now granted to graveyard cards by Varolz, Wire Surgeons, and similar

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Fixed a hard game freeze in multiplayer Commander: searching for "a X, a Y, or a Z card" (Search for Glory, etc.) wrongly demanded multiple cards and could deadlock the game with no legal choices
• Fixed a crash (game would abort) when loading certain 4-player Commander games involving Speed / max-speed cards like Racers' Scoreboard
• Spectral Shield now actually protects — "can't be the target of spells" was being silently dropped
• Assault Suit's "can't be sacrificed" lock now holds

entries.title: Infinite mandatory loops no longer crash
entries.body:
• "If that spell's power/toughness is N or greater" cast triggers now check the spell's power (e.g. Eshki, Temur's Roar) instead of always firing.
• Party Thrasher now offers a choice between exactly the two exiled cards, not three.
• Shatterskull Smashing and other "divided among up to two targets" spells can now hit two targets.
• Temporary buffs and keyword grants with an "until end of turn" duration are no longer dropped early.
• "You may have it deal damage equal to its power"-style optional triggers now resolve correctly (Pandemonium, Immersturm, Nettling Nuisance).
• Cards that restrict casting during a player's first turns are now enforced per player.
• Face-down permanents (Morph, etc.) can now be inspected by their own controller.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Infinite mandatory loops (e.g. Atla Palani + Thornbite Staff + Goblin Bombardment) no longer crash the game — the engine halts the runaway cleanly, and a genuinely repeating game state now correctly results in a draw (CR 104.4b / 732.2).

🖥️ Interface
• Convoke payment overlays no longer linger when starting a new game.
• Added a per-player "Infinite Mana" toggle to the developer menu for testing.

entries.title: Murktide Regent works end-to-end
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Murktide Regent now works fully — its Delve cost, "leaves your graveyard" trigger, and "enters with a +1/+1 counter for each instant/sorcery exiled with it" all resolve correctly (also unlocks Oasis of Renewal).
• Characteristic-defining creatures that count "the number of [type] on the battlefield with [keyword]" now set their power/toughness correctly (Dauthi Warlord, Pride of the Clouds, Radiant Archangel, Strata Scythe).

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Satoru Umezawa now triggers on your normal creature casts, not just ninjutsu/no-mana casts.
• Kozilek's Command (and similar Eldrazi spells) can now be paid for with colorless mana from Eldrazi Temple.
• Wayta, Trainer Prodigy now doubles only triggers caused by your creatures being dealt damage, instead of every ability.
• Anti-Magic Aura and Consecrate Land now actually prevent other Auras/Equipment from attaching — the second half of the card is no longer dropped.
• Duskmantle Seer now makes each player lose life equal to their own revealed card's mana value.
• Slicer, Hired Muscle now hands control to your chosen opponent as written (it previously just untapped).
• Drannith Magistrate now stops opponents from casting spells from anywhere but their hand.
• "Each player who controls a permanent named …" effects (e.g. Bonder's Ornament) now affect only the right players instead of everyone.
• Flash-granting permissions work again — Vivien, Champion of the Wilds; Leyline of Anticipation; and Vedalken Orrery now let you cast at instant speed.
• Wish-style cards can now play a card from outside the game.
• Academy Manufactor and Xorn now modify only your own token creation, not your opponents'.
• Delver of Secrets and other "look at the top card of your library" effects now actually reveal that card to you.
• Tablet of Discovery's restricted mana can now pay for both instant and sorcery spells.

entries.title: Convoke payment overhaul
entries.body:
• Urza, Lord High Artificer — exiles the blind top card instead of letting you tutor any card
• Eriette of the Charmed Apple — attack restriction now correctly scopes to your enchanted creatures
• Steadfast Armasaur — deals its toughness in damage even after being destroyed in response
• Halana and Alena — where-X counter count binds to source power correctly
• Herald of Hadar — "each opponent loses life" now fans out to all opponents on a d20 roll
• Lotleth Troll — "discard a creature card" cost now enforces the creature restriction
• Cagemail & Flood the Engine — "and can't attack" / "and doesn't untap" drawbacks no longer dropped
• Ob Nixilis, Captive Kingpin — triggers on "loses exactly N life" thresholds now supported
• Protection Racket & Momentum Breaker — "repeat for each opponent" now iterates per player in turn order
• Tergrid + Mirrormade — "enter as a copy" choice now goes to the player taking control
• Broad parser fixes for optional "you may" effects and conditional "if" clauses across many cards

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Combat damage assignment modal now renders above the board instead of behind it

🖥️ Interface
• Convoke payment overhaul: the ability picker no longer shows duplicate mana entries,
  only offers taps for colors the spell actually needs, lets you tap creatures mid-payment,
  and the payment panel is now collapsible so it stops covering the creatures you need to tap
• Wishboard optional-warning detection fixed

🤖 AI
• Smarter AI activation around flash-granting, land animation, mill targeting,
  control-change awareness, and combat tax payment

🌐 Multiplayer
• Conceding mid-cast (e.g. an in-progress convoke spell) no longer strands a stuck
  payment window in your next game
• Per-opponent effects with a conditional rider now correctly continue through every opponent

entries.title: A dozen dormant keywords now work
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• A dozen keywords that were recognized but did nothing now actually work:
   – Unearth — pay to return a creature from your graveyard with haste, exiled at end of turn
   – Cipher — encode a spell onto a creature and recast it free on combat damage
   – Champion — exile a creature you control as your champion enters (Lorwyn tribal)
   – Recover — pay to get a card back from your graveyard when another creature dies
   – Embalm & Eternalize — make a token copy from the graveyard
   – Unleash — enter with a +1/+1 counter at the cost of being unable to block
   – Fading & Vanishing — time-counter permanents now tick down and sacrifice on schedule
   – Ingest, Gravestorm, Afflict, Training, Poisonous — their triggers now fire
• Combat keywords now resolve: Rampage, Melee, Battle cry, and Flanking
• Evoke is now offered as an alternative cast even when the full printed cost is unaffordable
  (cast Solitude or Endurance with no mana by exiling a card; Ingot Chewer for just {R})
• Umbra / Totem armor now actually protects its enchanted creature from destruction
• Targeted proliferate now works (Skyship Plunderer, Maulfist Revolutionary, Fuel for the Cause)
• New card: Muraganda Petroglyphs ("creatures with no abilities get +2/+2")
• New card: Ashling, the Limitless (grants evoke to your Elemental spells)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Crypt Ghast (Extort) — drains every opponent instead of stopping after the first
• Shared Animosity — counts shared creature types correctly when pumping attackers
• Talion, the Kindly Lord — chosen-number spell trigger now matches mana value/power/toughness
• Chandra's Incinerator — cost reduction now counts noncombat damage to opponents
• Embiggen — scales with a creature's full typeline (Glistener Elf gets +4/+4, not +1/+1)
• Eldritch Evolution — library search now respects the sacrificed creature's mana value

entries.title: Server hardened against malformed messages
entries.body:
🌐 Multiplayer
• Hardened the server against oversized state snapshots, malformed lobby/draft messages, and lobby-subscriber floods
• Wired production trigger matchers, draft match spawning,

entries.title: First-strike opens a priority window
entries.body:
• Teferi's Ageless Insight + Temmet no longer double-resolves the draw
• Fire Lord Azula only copies spells while it's attacking
• Unstoppable Slasher respects its "if it had no counters" gate and returns with stun counters
• Garna, Bloodfist of Keld, Reckless Cohort, The Master, Davros, Conversion / Glaciers, Espers to Magicite, The Raven Man, Caller of the Hunt, and the Cyberman face-down-creature cards (The Cyber-Controller, Cybership, Death in Heaven, Missy, Cyber Conversion) all parse and resolve correctly now
• Affinity for Daleks no longer wrongly reduces costs
• Aether Vial only pulls from your own hand
• Dies/leaves triggers now fire when you decline an echo or "sacrifice unless you pay" cost (Mogg War Marshal), and when a spell's sacrifice cost is paid before targeting

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• First-strike damage now opens a priority window before regular damage, so cards like No Mercy can destroy a double-striker before it hits twice
• "Two or more [type] attack" triggers count only the matching attackers (e.g. Dinosaurs)
• Taking control of a turn (Mindslaver, Emrakul, Word of Command, Opposition Agent) now correctly hands the controlling player their actions instead of freezing

🤖 AI
• Stops spamming Spellskite when there's no spell to redirect
• Stops re-equipping Equipment to the creature already holding it
• Honors legend-rule exemptions (Mirror Gallery, Sakashima, Sliver Gravemother) instead of refusing legal second copies
• Won't accept lethal "pay life" optional costs hidden in modal/else branches
• Better copy-spell retargeting and no longer wastes zero-effect counter abilities

🖥️ Interface
• Spectator mode, draft-watch, and game-log tools added
• Deck-builder and app shell overhaul — sticky side rail, cleaner top bar, fixed filter drawer, and a mobile-hand drawer that reliably reopens on tap
• Board targeting UI for Populate choices
• New home masthead wordmark + WotC legal disclaimer in the footer

entries.title: Soulshift returns Spirits on death
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Soulshift now works — when a Kamigawa Spirit with Soulshift dies, you may return a cheaper Spirit from your graveyard to hand (~28 cards)
• Battle cry, Flanking, and Bushido combat keywords are live — attackers pump the team, flankers shrink non-flanking blockers, and Bushido creatures grow when they block or are blocked (~45 cards)
• Replicate — pay the cost extra times to copy the spell (e.g. Pyromatics, Train of Thought)
• Sunburst — artifacts and creatures now enter with counters based on the colors of mana spent (~16 cards)
• Freerunning — cast eligible spells for their cheaper cost after an Assassin or commander connects (debuts with Ezio Auditore da Firenze)
• Increment, Specialize (20 Alchemy cards), and energy "whenever you get one or more ⚡" triggers (Fabrication Module, Territorial Gorger, Brotherhood Scribe) all parse and fire
• Mutate fully supported on the merge side — multi-mutate stacking, command-zone casting, and reverting your own card when the pile leaves (Otrimi, the Ever-Playful)
• "Can be attached only to" Equipment/Aura restrictions are now enforced — illegal hosts are rejected and become-illegal attachments fall off
• Lands animated en masse into creatures that are still lands (Living Plane, Nature's Revolt)
• Persistent "play cards exiled with this" permissions (The Matrix of Time)

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Dracogenesis grants the free cast to Dragon commanders in the command zone
• Doubling effects (Doubling Season, Parallel Lives, Anointed Procession, Mondrak, Adrix and Nev) now correctly double copy-tokens
• Dark Depths → Marit Lage: the legendary 20/20 Avatar is actually created (including off a Thespian's Stage copy)
• Suspended cards (e.g. Treasure Cruise) now actually get cast when the last time counter is removed
• Teferi's Protection locks your life total even with everything phased out

entries.title: Mindslaver-style turn control no longer crashes
entries.body:
⚔️ Turn Control & Multiplayer
• Emrakul, the Promised End / Worst Fears / Mindslaver no longer crash the game when a human takes control of an AI's turn (or vice versa) — actions now route to the player who actually has priority.

🤖 AI
• The AI no longer wastes removal or bounce on creatures it can't legally target — protection, hexproof, and shroud are all respected before it commits a spell.

🖥️ Interface
• Hovering a card is dramatically smoother — it no longer re-renders the entire battlefield (profiled from ~236 down to ~18 components per hover).
• Bigger, more readable cards in the mulligan, companion-reveal, London-bottom, and zone/choice prompts (exile, graveyard, scry, surveil, search).
• Menu polish: a shell-level social bar on all viewports, hover ember-glow on the nav rail, a breathing glow on the host panel while seats are open, smoother menu backdrop, and a clearer version/refresh badge.
• Expanded sandbox debug menu: toggle ETB effects on spawned cards/tokens, a true Sacrifice action (fires dies/leaves triggers), Reveal Top N, and a Browse Library viewer.

entries.title: Offering creatures now castable
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Offering is now playable — cast an Offering creature by sacrificing a creature of the named type as you cast it.
• Craft now works (Tithing Blade // Consuming Sepulcher and friends) — exile the materials you control or in your graveyard at sorcery speed, then return the card transformed.
• Banding combat is in: attackers can declare bands, and a band's blocks propagate across the whole band during combat.
• Cards that "phase out" now trigger correctly (Teferi's Imp).
• "Whenever you gain or lose life" triggers work, including the "during your turn" variants (Moonstone Harbinger, Wax-Wane Witness).
• Rolling multiple or variable dice is supported — "roll two six-sided dice", "roll X six-sided dice", "roll two d12".
• "Enchant creature with another Aura attached to it" is recognized (Daybreak Coronet).
• "Enchanted land is the chosen type" Auras now work and correctly strip the land's old abilities (Phantasmal Terrain, Convincing Mirage).

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Explore correctly keeps a revealed nonland on top of your library or sends it to the graveyard — it no longer wrongly goes to your hand.
• Granted activated abilities keep their use restrictions — "Activate only as a sorcery" and "only once each turn" are no longer dropped (Skygames, Mindwhip Sliver, Squirrel anthems).
• Token-doubling effects (Doubling Season, Academy Manufactor, damage doublers) now stack correctly and stop asking for an order when the choice doesn't matter.
• Creatures that enter with +1/+1 counters no longer die as a 0/0 while you choose how multiple replacement effects apply (Walking Ballista with Branching Evolution + Ozolith).
• Echo: declining to pay the echo cost now correctly fires the creature's dies triggers.
• Carpet of Flowers produces the right amount of mana.

entries.title: AI stops re-granting keywords it already has
entries.body:
🤖 AI
• The AI no longer wastes a self-buff on a creature that already has the keyword (e.g. re-granting hexproof to Prognostic Sphinx)

entries.title: Disturb: cast transformed from your graveyard
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Disturb — cast eligible cards from your graveyard for their Disturb cost; they enter transformed (Moorland Rescuer and friends)
• Shield counters — a creature with a shield counter is protected from destruction and damage; the counter is removed instead
• Afterlife — creatures with Afterlife now leave behind the right number of 1/1 flying Spirit tokens when they die
• Double Team — attacking with a Double Team creature now makes a tapped, attacking copy
• "Whenever you play a card" triggers now fire on both casting a spell and playing a land (Recycle, Null Profusion)
• Commander-matters triggers — "Whenever your commander enters or attacks" now works (Tome of Legends, Search for Dagger, Vivi's Persistence)
• Per-turn spell triggers — "the first spell you cast during each of your turns" (Rashmi and Ragavan)
• "When you cast or cycle this card" now resolves as two separate triggers (Warped Tusker, Drownyard Lurker)
• "Play a legendary land" triggers (Shanid, Sleepers' Scourge)
• Malignus now has its correct power/toughness (half the highest life total among your opponents, rounded up)
• Slumbering Trudge enters with the right number of stun counters scaling with X

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Red/green cost reduction now applies to red-or-green spells (Goblin Anarchomancer reducing Doors of Durin)
• Proliferate no longer touches counter types a permanent has zero of
• "Mana spent to cast" conditions now evaluate correctly
• Spells granted a free cast can now be cast without paying their mana cost, including pending next-spell modifiers

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• "Attacks you this combat if able" is now enforced when declaring attackers — you can't dodge it by holding the creature back or attacking a planeswalker instead

🖥️ Interface
• Kor Skyfisher and similar effects now show "return to hand" wording in the choice prompt instead of "put onto the battlefield"

entries.title: Fixed an "up to X targets" freeze
entries.body:
• Hexproof-bypass effects now actually ignore hexproof when targeting.
• Madness and other replacement choices now prompt correctly when triggered by a discard or sacrifice cost instead of silently continuing.
• Return-to-battlefield-as-Aura effects now let you pick the host — including player hosts for Curses and enchant-player Auras.

⚔️ Combat & Stability
• Fixed a game-freezing hang when choosing targets for "up to X target creatures" triggers (The Wise Mothman, Lathiel).
• Multi-target spells and abilities now correctly require distinct targets within a single instance of "target" (CR 601.2c).
• Fixed an Ancient Greenwarden softlock where its doubled landfall trigger left the game stuck on "Waiting."
• The starting-player die roll-off now plays out round by round, fixing an intermittent display bug where a tie reroll made it look like the wrong player won.

🌐 Online & Multiplayer
• Fixed a 10-second join timeout when joining a peer-to-peer game after picking a deck — guests now send their display name, and the lobby always replies with an error instead of silently dropping bad frames.
• Hidden-information fix: opponents can no longer read your unrevealed Attraction deck off the wire.
• Spectators are now capped per game and per draft, and oversized network payloads and out-of-bounds decks are rejected at the boundary — hardening against abuse.

entries.title: A fresh redesigned menu & home screen
entries.body:
🎨 A Fresh New Look
• The entire out-of-match experience has been redesigned — a new centered menu shell, atmospheric home screen, redesigned Host/Draft/Decks/Online pages, refreshed typography, themed hover effects, and a restored card-data loading bar.

✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Prototype — cast eligible cards for their smaller alternative cost and stats.
• Specialize — pay to choose a color and transform into the matching specialized face.
• "End the combat phase" now works (Mandate of Peace) — clears pending triggers, exiles the stack, and skips to your second main.
• The en-Kor damage-redirection cycle now functions (Nomads, Lancers, Outrider, Shaman, Spirit, and Warrior en-Kor) — redirect the next point of damage to a creature you control.
• Characteristic-defining power/toughness that counts "the chosen player" (Entropic Specter, Sewer Nemesis, Lost Order of Jarkeld).
• "Creatures you control enter with an additional +1/+1 counter" statics (Kalain Reclusive Painter, Bard Class, Gorma the Gullet, Master Chef).
• "Becomes that type" creature-type changers (Imagecrafter, Unnatural Selection, Mistform Mutant, Standardize).
• "Put +1/+1 counters on it equal to its power" (The Roaring Toeclaws, Experiment Twelve).
• "Your life total becomes equal to your starting life total" (Oketra's Last Mercy, Resolute Archangel).
• Mana that can only pay for spells with an exact number of colors (e.g. "spells with exactly two colors").

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Myrkul, Lord of Bones — its token copy now correctly becomes an enchantment that loses its other card types.
• "Can't crew Vehicles" restrictions are now enforced (Bound in Gold).
• "Can't attack alone" / "can't block alone" restrictions are now parsed and enforced.
• Junk, Incubator, and Shard predefined tokens now have their full abilities (play-from-exile, scry-then-draw, and incubate transform).

entries.title: Oathbreaker format added
entries.body:
🖥️ Interface
• The Improvise / Convoke payment screen and target prompts no longer hide behind your hand or the board
• The mulligan modal can now be collapsed to a thin sliver so you can peek at the board, then restored
• Changeling cards show a clean "— Changeling" type line instead of an overflowing list of every creature type

🏆 Formats
• Oathbreaker format support added

🤖 AI
• Fixed AI mulligan bottoming in multiplayer when multiple players owe bottoms at once — the AI now bottoms the right number of its own cards instead of erroring

🌐 Multiplayer
• Live games now enforce a per-game spectator cap when viewers join

entries.title: "End the turn" cards now playable
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• "End the turn" is now playable — Time Stop, Sundial of the Infinite, Obeka, Brute Chronologist, Glorious End, Discontinuity, and Day's Undoing all correctly exile the stack, clear pending triggers, end combat, and jump straight to cleanup (20+ cards total)
• Ancient Bronze Dragon and Ancient Brass Dragon now work end-to-end — rolling a d20 and using "the result" to place +1/+1 counters, and reanimating any number of creatures whose total mana value is at most the roll
• Unfinity Attractions are in — building an attraction deck, opening attractions, and visiting them
• "Can't be regenerated this turn" as a standalone effect — Hurr Jackal, Furnace Brood, Lim-Dûl's Cohort, and similar cards now actually suppress regeneration shields

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Keywords printed more than once now trigger the right number of times — Maelstrom Wanderer cascades twice, Apex Devastator four times, and Scurry of Squirrels triggers Myriad twice (previously all collapsed to a single trigger)
• Subtype-wide grants and evasion now apply — Crystalline Sliver actually grants shroud to all Slivers, and Signal Pest / Amrou Seekers correctly "can't be blocked except by" the right creatures (~42 cards)
• X spells with cost reductions cost the right amount — e.g. Exsanguinate cast while Witherbloom, the Balancer grants affinity now lets you pay for the X you can actually afford instead of overcharging
• Verb-named spells parse correctly — Search for Tomorrow, Seek New Knowledge, Choose Your Weapon, and Double Trouble no longer mangle their opening instruction
• Myriad on copy effects with "except" clauses now synthesizes its triggers correctly

entries.title: Live spectator mode arrives
entries.body:
• Mass "phase in the permanents you control" no longer phases in your opponents' permanents too.
 • Pawpatch Recruit, Cascade, Bloodchief's Thirst (kicked), and Jackdaw Savior triggers/targeting all behave correctly again.
 • Player references like "that player" now reliably bind to the right player in attack triggers and chosen-target effects.
 • Loading older saved/imported card data is more robust, preventing rare card-load failures.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
 • "Can't be blocked by more than N creatures" is now enforced per creature (CR 509.1b).
 • A creature forced to block a specific attacker can no longer satisfy the requirement by blocking a different one.
 • Goaded creatures now check who they can actually attack — they're no longer forced toward phased-out or untargetable players (multiplayer).
 • Fewer pointless prompts — when you control two identical simultaneous triggers, the engine orders them for you instead of asking (matching MTG Arena, CR 603.3b). Trigger ordering for deferred/parked triggers is also more correct.

🤖 AI
 • The AI now picks a meaningful X on X-cost spells instead of casting them for X = 0 (Fireball, Banefire, Comet Storm, the Hydra family, and more).

🌐 Multiplayer
 • Live spectator mode — watch games in progress with privacy-safe state (hidden information stays hidden).
 • Preliminary ELO system. (Self-hosted only)
 • Hardened the server against malformed or oversized network messages across handshake, seat changes, spectator/draft codes, reconnects, emotes, and game-join payloads, improving stability and security under load.
 • Fixed a LobbyOnly deck-handling order-of-operations bug before validation.

entries.title: Impending: time counters, then a creature
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
 • Impending is here — cards now enter with time counters and become creatures only once they're gone (CR 702.176a).
 • Rebound now works end-to-end — cast a Rebound spell from hand and you may recast it for free on your next upkeep (Consuming Vapors, Distortion Strike, Staggershock, See Beyond, Surreal Memoir, Recurring Insight, and the rest of the cycle, plus granted-Rebound effects like Cast Through Time).
 • Krark's Thumb finally does something — coin flips now route through the replacement system, so "flip two coins and ignore one" applies to every flip you make.
 • Reanimation color/type riders parse correctly — "It's a black Zombie in addition to its other colors and types" now grants both the color and the type (Rise from the Grave, Grave Betrayal).
 • Mana that can only pay for spells cast from your graveyard or exile is now enforced, and "costs that contain {X}" reads the same as "costs that include {X}".

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
 • Obeka, Splitter of Seconds gives you the right number of extra upkeep steps — "that many" now matches the combat damage dealt, not just one.
 • Well of Lost Dreams draws X cards instead of 0.
 • Currency Converter now makes its Treasure or Rogue token when returning an exiled card.
 • Emperor of Bones puts haste and the delayed sacrifice on the returned creature, not on itself.
 • "Gain lifelink" now grants the keyword instead of silently doing nothing (Blessing of Belzenlok, Bre of Clan Stoutarm, Archon's Glory, and several more).
 • Walls that can attack now attack — "gets +N/-M and can attack as though it didn't have defender" works (Wall of Wonder, Mobile Fort, Nivix Cyclops).
 • "Its activated abilities can't be activated" riders now apply (Dovin Baan, Xathrid Gorgon, Braided Net).
