 • Baral's Expertise no longer asks for a phantom extra target — the free spell is chosen when it resolves.

entries.title: Fixed a multi-trigger combat hang
entries.body:
⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Fixed a game-ending hang on turn 18 when multiple combat-damage triggers (Coastal Piracy) fired at once — trigger ordering, including first-strike, now resolves cleanly
• Clash now lets you choose which opponent to clash with when you have more than one, instead of auto-picking
• "You"-effects from a villainous choice now resolve for the source's controller, not the opponent who made the choice

🖥️ Interface
• Keywords in the card info panel now show reminder-text tooltips on hover
• Mana payment prompts now display correctly for activated ability costs
• Player-attached Auras can now be tapped/interacted with on mobile
• Life totals no longer freeze at an old value when steps advance quickly
• Mulligan bottoming clicks are responsive again (stale selection no longer leaks in)
• Fixed Archidekt and Moxfield deck imports from pasted links

🌐 Multiplayer
• Kicking a player from a full lobby no longer silently starts the game; the Start button works as expected
• Lobby reservation tokens are now bound to the connection that issued them (security hardening)
• Buffered peer-to-peer messages now flush in order, fixing dropped/interleaved messages on connect
• Long-running servers now prune stale draft sessions and P2P backups, not just finished games

entries.title: Animated 3D dice decide who goes first
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Transformers cards now convert! "More Than Meets the Eye" lets transformer double-faced cards (Flamewar, Brash Veteran // Flamewar, the Transformers Secret Lair) be cast for their alternative cost, entering the battlefield already transformed
• Mirror Match now works — it creates token copies that block each attacker, then exiles them at end of combat
• Cascade and Discover now cast the revealed spell directly during resolution, including instant- and sorcery-speed hits that previously got rejected mid-resolution

🎲 New: Animated Dice Rolls
• A real 3D dice roll now decides who goes first — a d20 high-roll contest with a per-player VS layout, winner reveal, and result badges
• In-game card dice rolls use the same animation; simultaneous rolls play one at a time
• Tap or press Esc to skip the roll, with graceful fallbacks for reduced-motion and no-WebGL devices

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Baleful Mastery no longer demands an opponent's creature when cast for its alternative cost
• Grove's Bounty and other "distribute X counters" spells can now be cast with X=0
• "Becomes a [type]" effects now correctly replace a creature's existing subtypes instead of stacking them (CR 205.1a)
• Braids, Conjurer Adept now lets each player put a card from their own hand, prompting the right player
• Mass phase-out (e.g. Teferi's Protection) now keeps attached Auras/Equipment with their hosts correctly
• Auras and Equipment now detach when their host gains protection or otherwise can't be attached
• "Destroyed this way" and "each of those [creatures]" counts now track the correct filtered set of permanents
• Thriving Grove and similar lands now enter untapped after you choose their color

entries.title: AI no longer freezes on illegal attacks
entries.body:
• Card preview now shows chosen attributes (e.g. a chosen color or type) that were locked in earlier
• Quirion Ranger's activation cost is now shown separately from its cast cost
• The deck builder now pairs Doctor's Companion commanders correctly (Amy Pond)
• The game no longer hangs if a network send fails — it recovers and surfaces the error instead of waiting forever

🌐 Multiplayer
• Lobby seat reservations can no longer be hoarded by one client, and password-lobby reservations now expire instead of lingering forever
• Lobby player counts no longer reset after reservations are consumed
• Host seat changes now route to the correct lobby backend
• Names, passwords, and timers sent to a lobby are now size-limited at the server

🤖 AI
• The AI no longer freezes the game by repeatedly attempting an illegal attack

entries.title: Simultaneous loss now ends in a draw
entries.body:
• Valiant triggers fire only when YOU target your creature, not when an opponent does (Heartfire Hero, Emberheart Challenger)
• Kaldheim gods and other spell//spell commanders can now be cast as their back face from the command zone (Esika // The Prismatic Bridge, Valki // Tibalt)
• Bolas's Citadel now stops you from casting library cards whose life cost you can't pay
• Exotic Orchard now prompts you to choose which color of mana to make
• Cycling now fires "when you cycle" triggers
• Recoil now resolves "that player" correctly even after the bounced token is gone
• Non-spell Auras entering the battlefield now respect attachment restrictions and pick a legal host
• Harmonize's cost now accounts for its creature-tap reduction
• "Repeat this process for [keywords]" now expands fully (Kathril)
• Lands that enter tapped and ask for a color as they enter now do both correctly (the "Thriving" lands)
• Convoke, Odric's gated keyword grants, and Pantlaza's discover-on-enter now behave as printed after a card-data refresh
• You can now play opponent-owned exiled or graveyard cards you've been granted permission to play (Hostage Taker, Gonti, Captivating Crew)
• Fixed The Rise of Dark Realms, Pyrogoyf's enters damage, Angel of Destiny's end-step loss, and Emergence Zone's flash grant

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Two players losing at the same time now correctly ends the game in a draw
• Damage prevention combined with a damage doubler (Furnace of Rath, Torbran) now asks you which to apply first, since the order changes the result

🖥️ Interface
• Life totals now always match the authoritative game state
• The deck builder honors "a deck can have any number of cards named ~" from the tile + button, not just drag-and-drop (Relentless Rats, Rat Colony, Persistent Petitioners, Shadowborn Apostle, Dragon's Approach, Seven Dwarves)
• New configurable card-hover preview delay (defaults to instant)

entries.title: Living Metal animates Transformers Vehicles
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Living Metal now works — Transformers Vehicles (Flamewar, Streetwise Operative, and friends) become artifact creatures on your turn, so they can finally attack and block
• Mentor now works — attacking creatures move +1/+1 counters onto smaller attackers
• Reconfigure now works — Equipment creatures can attach to and unattach from other creatures
• Riot now works — choose haste or a +1/+1 counter as the creature enters (plus Uncivil Unrest's damage trigger)
• Backup now works — every Backup creature fires its enters-the-battlefield trigger
• Bucknard's Everfull Purse — rolls its die for the Treasure count and hands control to the player on your right

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Roll-a-die effects that scale "equal to the result" now read the actual roll (Ancient Copper/Gold/Silver Dragon, Adorable Kitten)
• Cascade, Storm, and Casualty triggers fire reliably again — their cast origin was being lost mid-resolution (also fixes Chatterstorm)
• Scry no longer silently fizzles when two or more "whenever you scry" triggers are out (e.g. Track Down with Matoya, or Archon Elder + Elrond)
• "Target player gains N life" now heals the chosen player instead of you (Kenrith, Healing Salve, Hope Charm)
• "Draws X cards and loses X life" no longer drops the life-loss half (Pact of the Serpent, Shadrix Silverquill)
• "Until the end of your next turn" effects now last the full turn — impulse-draw cards keep their exiled cards playable (Light Up the Stage, Reckless Impulse, Wrenn's Resolve), and buffs like Slip Out the Back stay on
• Conjured permanents now fire enters-the-battlefield triggers (Soul Warden, Panharmonicon) and properly have summoning sickness
• "Exile this <permanent>" activated abilities can now be paid from the battlefield (Ominous Cemetery)
• Harmonic Prodigy now doubles only your Shamans' and Wizards' triggers, not every permanent's (also Echoes of Eternity, Delney)

entries.title: Smarter AI combat against planeswalkers
entries.body:
• Multiplayer & Commander: when several abilities trigger at once, they now go on the stack in full turn order around the table, fixing both resolution order and the order you're asked to arrange them.
• "Each opponent" effects now skip opponents who have no legal target instead of stalling.
• Phased-out permanents are no longer counted as available mana sources.

🤖 AI
• Combat smarts: the AI now attacks enemy planeswalkers to kill them, stops trading its commander into blocks it won't survive (unless it's lethal), and no longer chump-attacks just to trigger lifelink.
• Better planeswalker play: it uses loyalty abilities the turn a walker lands and stops sacrificing a walker for a one-shot combat trick.
• Stops wasting mana: no more endless every-turn Equipment shuffling, no more activating "do X if [condition]" abilities (e.g. Mosswort Bridge hideaway) while the condition is false, and no more burning resources on self-protection abilities with no threat on the board.
• Smarter lands: plays a normal land before a Karoo bounce-land to keep tempo, and taps colorless/non-creature sources first so it doesn't waste colored mana or tap potential blockers.
• Draft: bots now value and play nonbasic dual/fixing lands instead of ignoring them.

entries.title: Dark Depths makes Marit Lage
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Dark Depths now works — the "remove an ice counter / when it has none, sacrifice it to make Marit Lage" land enters and transforms correctly.
• Omo, Queen of Vesuva's "everything counter" now does what it says — marked lands gain every land type (and their mana abilities) and marked creatures become every creature type. The "up to one target land and up to one target creature" trigger now targets both halves instead of dropping the creature.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Kozilek's Command and other modal X-cost spells now show the correct per-mode target labels when X is chosen before targets (no more blank prompts).
• Wurmcoil Engine — its dies-trigger token sequence (a 3/3 lifelink and a 3/3 deathtouch) now parses and creates both tokens.
• Mendicant Core, Guidelight, and similar copy effects now copy the right spell even when triggers like Rhystic Study sit above it on the stack, instead of fizzling.
• Lathiel, the Bounteous Dawn no longer lets you pick more creatures than counters to distribute, which could deadlock the assignment.
• Morophon, the Boundary now buffs creatures of the type you chose as it entered — the +1/+1 is applied after the choice is made.
• Carpet of Flowers' upkeep mana trigger now fires with correct timing.
• Vanguard-style and commander anthem bonuses that count commander casts from the command zone now apply correctly (no more dropping to +0/+0).
• Source-linked "chosen player" effects now resolve correctly at runtime.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Switch-power-and-toughness effects combined with asymmetric counters now compute in the right order (e.g. a 2/2 with a +0/+1 counter under a switch is now correctly 3/2, not 2/3).
• Conditional lords and set-power/toughness effects now apply in the correct dependency order relative to power/toughness comparison filters.

entries.title: Trample can keep its excess on the blocker
entries.body:
• Self-destroy effects, "attacking or blocking" targeting, Outlaw spell-type grants, opponent-graveyard return choices, and shared-quality count effects all parse and resolve correctly
• Discard triggers now scope to the player who actually discarded
• "X target permanents" spells now choose X first, then targets, and pay X-based sacrifice costs correctly

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• A trample attacker blocked by a single creature can now keep the excess damage on the blocker instead of being forced to trample it through (enables excess/lethal-damage triggers) — in both single-player and multiplayer

🖥️ Interface
• Mulligan bottoming now lets you deselect and swap your picks instead of locking in the first click
• The cEDH toggle now appears only in Commander and Duel Commander formats, and no longer silently forces AI difficulty after switching to another format

🤖 AI
• Fixed a deadlock where the AI would freeze the game under heavy stack pressure (10+ items) when a mandatory mid-resolution choice surfaced (e.g. wide boards piling up triggers)
• AI trample attackers still trample through by default

🌐 Multiplayer
• Hosts can no longer accidentally join their own lobby game
• Sandbox debug actions now work for the host in P2P multiplayer games

🌍 Localization
• Updated Spanish (es) translations across all menus and gameplay (contributed by Mortis)
• Fixed Spanish grammar in exile-source labels ("del" contraction) and standardized "banquillo" for sideboard

entries.title: Multi-zone tutors search every zone
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Multi-zone tutors now search across graveyard, hand, and library — and "card named X" searches — unlocking God-Pharaoh's Gift, Gate to the Afterlife, Dark Supplicant, Say Its Name, Boonweaver Giant, and Mishra, Artificer Prodigy (Ancient Vendetta / The Rise of Sozin now correctly raid the targeted opponent's zones)
• "Partner with" creatures now fetch their partner when they enter (Rocksteady, Mutant Marauder pulling Bebop) — and reveal the searched card
• Khârn the Betrayer now works: switches control when it deals combat damage, and its former controller draws when control is lost
• Etali, Primal Conqueror now offers a free cast for every nonland exiled from all players' libraries
• Lathiel, the Bounteous Dawn now distributes its end-step counters based on life gained this turn
• Counter-a-spell triggers now fire (Lullmage Mentor, Baral, Chief of Compliance)
• "Becomes the target of an instant or sorcery" triggers now work (Wild Defiance)
• "Phases in" triggers now work (Warping Wurm)
• Ability-activation triggers can now filter by source type (Crackdown Construct, Ashnod the Uncaring)
• Newly supported: Lurking Predators, Nefarious Imp, Psionic Entity, Twilight Diviner, Dragonstorm Globe, Oversimplify, High Perfect Morcant

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• "Exile until this leaves the battlefield" cards now reliably return what they exiled (Journey to Nowhere, Oblivion Ring, Static Prison, Haytham Kenway, and leave-the-battlefield exile riders in general)
• Protection from creature subtypes is now enforced (e.g. protection from Assassins)
• Graveyard-hate replacement effects now load and apply (Valgavoth, Stone of Erech, Dauthi Voidwalker, Leyline of the Void, Rest in Peace)
• Klauth, Unrivaled Ancient's "don't lose this mana" no longer empties at step/phase boundaries
• "Each [type] you control enters with a counter" now applies to the source itself (Dragonstorm Globe)

entries.title: Wernog works; faster huge-token boards
entries.body:
🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Wernog, Rider's Chaplain — now works end to end. Each opponent may investigate; each opponent who declines loses 1 life; and you then investigate one plus the number of opponents who chose to investigate. Previously it investigated only once and made every opponent lose life regardless of their choice.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Huge token-swarm boards are now far faster to resolve. A battlefield of hundreds of Scute Swarms generating thousands of landfall triggers no longer grinds the game to a halt — resolution that used to take the better part of a minute is dramatically quicker, and AI turns on big boards speed up too.

🖥️ Interface
• Added a "Resolving N / Total" progress overlay that appears while a large stack is draining, so you can see resolution advancing instead of staring at a frozen board during go-wide blowups.

entries.title: Peter Parker // Amazing Spider-Man supported
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Peter Parker // Amazing Spider-Man — full support for the modal double-faced card, including casting the Amazing Spider-Man back face and its web-slinging grant to your legendary, multicolored spells (return a tapped creature you control as an alternative cost).
• Inspirit, Flagship Vessel — added (partial support).

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Primo, the Unbounded — Fractal tokens now enter with +1/+1 counters equal to the combat damage dealt to a player, instead of arriving as a blank 0/0. Double strike and extra combats no longer inflate the count.
• Militant Angel — now creates the correct number of Knight tokens based on how many opponents you attacked this turn (previously it made zero).
• Estinien Varlineau — correctly counts opponents dealt combat damage by Estinien or a Dragon this turn, even if that Dragon later died or changed types (previously counted zero).
• Coat of Arms, Morophon, and Changelings — creature-type effects now see the full universe of creature types, including ones that only exist on tokens (Saprolings, Golems) or on Kindred/Tribal cards (e.g. Bitterblossom's Faeries). At the same time, non-creature subtypes (Forest, Equipment, Shrine, Saga, Aura) no longer leak into those choices.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• X-cost spells under a cost floor (e.g. Trinisphere) will no longer let you choose an X value you can't actually pay once the floor locks the cost in.

🖥️ Interface
• While you're casting an X-cost spell, the stack now shows the real cost you're locking in, instead of the card's printed mana cost.

🌐 Multiplayer
• Fixed a severe slowdown where boards with many "add one mana of any color" sources (e.g. a pile of Treasure tokens from Professional Face-Breaker) could freeze a game for minutes while triggers resolved. Also corrected a rare case where a permanent granted the same ability by multiple Auras could be wrongly skipped during bulk mana activation.

entries.title: AI weighs attacks against the best block
entries.body:
🤖 AI
• The AI evaluates an attack against the defender's best possible block, so it stops suiciding creatures into obvious lethal blocks (e.g. a 1/1 swinging into a 2/1 first striker).

🌐 Multiplayer
• P2P drafts reject match results reported by players who aren't in that match.
• Dig effects validate kept cards against what was actually looked at, closing a path that could move foreign cards into a hand or corrupt library order.

entries.title: Fights are now rules-correct
entries.body:
• "Set a player's life total to X" effects work with dynamic amounts (Repay in Kind, Arbiter of Knollridge, Mortal Flesh Is Weak).
• The Scarab God's upkeep drain and 4/4 black Zombie copy tokens resolve correctly.
• Balance once again makes each player sacrifice down to their own lowest count, not the caster's.
• Chatterfang's variable squirrel sacrifice flow is fixed.
• Liliana, Waker of the Dead's +1 now only drains opponents who can't discard — not its own controller.
• Gonti, Canny Acquisitor actually exiles the looked-at card (and lets you play it with any mana).
• Trigger-doublers now respect their source restriction (Splinter and Radical Rat double only Ninjas; Harmonic Prodigy is correctly scoped) instead of doubling every trigger.
• Nalia de'Arnise's grant reaches the whole party.
• "Cast as though they had flash" timing grants survive an opponent stealing the source (Teferi).
• Soulbond pairs break when either creature changes controller.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Fights are rules-correct: no damage when a fighter has left the battlefield, stopped being a creature, or phased out; a creature fighting itself takes a single instance of twice its power.
• Sacrificing two or more permanents at once now correctly triggers "whenever you sacrifice" / leaves-the-battlefield observers for each co-sacrificed permanent.
• Static abilities that care about attackers (e.g. "as long as ~ is attacking") re-evaluate the moment attackers are declared.

🖥️ Interface
• Convoke, Improvise, and Waterbend creatures can be tapped by clicking them on the board during mana payment — the dialog no longer swallows those clicks.
• The Arena-style card slam now plays for big identical-creature swarms; every attacker shows its hit instead of falling back to a plain number.
• Hovering (desktop) or long-pressing (touch) a card in the "View full hand" modal now shows the card preview.

entries.title: "The number of…" abilities now compute
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Plaguecrafter joins the card pool.
• Awaken now works end to end — pay the awaken cost to put +1/+1 counters on a land you control and turn it into a 0/0 Elemental with haste that's still a land (16 Battle for Zendikar / Oath of the Gatewatch cards).
• Cleave is in: cast spells with the bracketed text removed, and the text correctly reverts when the spell leaves the stack (so a recast later uses the printed text).
• Recover comes online for 9 Coldsnap cards (Grim Harvest, Icefall, Krovikan Rot, Garza's Assassin, and more).
• Changeling-style "is every creature type" grants now work in all zones (Mistform Ultimus, Dr. Julius Jumblemorph, Maskwood Nexus, Arachnoform, Runed Stalactite).
• The Mirrodin "Shard" cycle can pay its "{T} or {mana}" cost (Granite, Crystal, Skeleton, Pearl, and Pearl/Heartwood Shard).
• 17 storage- and charge-counter cards can now pay "remove any number of counters" (Mage-Ring Network, Mercadian Bazaar, Geistflame Reservoir, and others).
• Cards that return a creature "tapped and attacking" now do so (Alesha Who Smiles at Death, Olivia Crimson Bride, Yore-Tiller Nephilim, Dauntless Avenger).

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• A large group of "the number of…" abilities that silently did nothing (dealt 0, drew 0, made 0 tokens) now compute their real value: Ajani Nacatl Avenger, Sorin Grim Nemesis, Glissa's Retriever, Wolfcaller's Howl, Heidegger, Shinra Executive, Priest of the Blessed Graf, Oreskos Explorer, Journey On, Zedruu the Greathearted, Summon: Yojimbo, Laughing Jasper Flint, Thundering Raiju, Collision Course, Monstrous Onslaught, Lukka Bound to Ruin, Lifestream's Blessing, Calamitous Cave-In, Reckless Crew, and more.
• "Half X, rounded up/down" effects resolve correctly (Chainer's Torment, Endless Ranks of the Dead, Ghoulcaller's Harvest, Imskir Iron-Eater).

entries.title: Announce X before the cost locks in
entries.body:
• "Put a +1/+1 counter on that creature" riders land on the correct creature (Dig Deep, Grave Strength, Mask of the Schemer, Raffine // Scheming Seer, Spymaster's Vault).
• Phase triggers comparing "that player controls more … than you" now evaluate correctly.
• "Total power/toughness" target filters work.
• Combat-damage triggers now distinguish damage dealt to a creature from damage dealt to a player, and triggers that reference a target's controller resolve before firing.

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Spells with {X} in their cost now wait for you to announce X before the cost is locked in.
• Suspend-only cards with no printed mana cost (Inevitable Betrayal, Ancestral Vision) can no longer be cast for free from your hand — they must be suspended.
• Creatures that enter the battlefield attacking now actually attack (not merely tap) and join the assault against the declared defender.
• When several of your beginning-of-step triggers fire at once, you're prompted to order them — so multiple suspended cards (e.g. via Jhoira of the Ghitu) all tick down, and stacked upkeep/draw triggers (two Howling Mines) all resolve.

🖥️ Interface
• The graveyard and exile zone viewer now shows the Arena-style purple glow on castable cards — click a card to cast it directly, matching the overlay used in your hand.

entries.title: Vigor converts damage into +1/+1 counters
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Vigor joins the roster — its combat-damage shield now correctly converts each point of prevented damage into +1/+1 counters on your other creatures.
• Exert is live: you can choose to exert attackers as they attack (Combat Celebrant), firing the linked "when you do" ability and earning an extra combat phase.
• Reinforce now works (Earthbrawn, Hunting Triad, Break Ties, Fowl Strike, Swell of Courage), including the "Reinforce X" variant.
• Council's-dilemma voting now tallies correctly (Emissary Green).
• Phyrexian-hybrid mana symbols now parse, unlocking the cards that use them.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Type-changing Auras fully replace the enchanted creature's types, subtypes, and color instead of leaving the old ones behind (Frogify, Imprisoned in the Moon, Lignify, Kenrith's Transformation, Darksteel Mutation).
• Alternative-cost grants apply to matching spells you cast (Rooftop Storm for Zombies; Fist of Suns and Jodah for {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}).
• Cast-from-exile permissions work — once each turn you can cast from cards exiled with the source (Maralen, Fae Ascendant; Court of Locthwain).
• "Deals combat damage to a player, they lose half their life" now resolves for the right amount and the right player (Unstoppable Slasher, Dark Leo & Shredder).
• Protection from each of your opponents is now genuine protection — covering targeting, blocking, aura attachment, and damage (Figure of Fable).
• Mycoloth's upkeep creates a Saproling for each +1/+1 counter on it.
• Jodah's legendary anthem now buffs your legendary creatures.
• Fallen Shinobi's free cast and impulse-draw resolve their targets correctly.
• Heroes in a Half Shell's combat-damage trigger fires.
• Giggling Skitterspike and the "becomes the target" trigger family now work (Goldspan Dragon, Tectonic Giant, Shield Mare, Brine Comber).

entries.title: Accented-name card art (Éomer, Éowyn) fixed
entries.body:
⚡ Performance
• Massive speedup on huge token boards — Scute Swarm landfall storms and similar stacks that used to crawl (multi-second per resolution, hours-long drains) now resolve smoothly (~170× faster display updates, plus batched resolution of identical token triggers)
• Faster trigger handling overall via a maintained battlefield trigger index

🖥️ Interface
• Cards with accented names (Éomer, Éowyn) now show their art correctly
• Mana pips are now centered
• Collapsible groups for tidier organization

🌐 Multiplayer
• Drafts now bind each action to your own seat and restrict host-only controls — closing a trust gap in the draft flow

entries.title: New cEDH AI difficulty for Bracket 5
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• "Put your choice of counter" cards now play correctly — choose which counter to place as the ability resolves (Bribe Taker, Owen Grady, Invoke the Ancients, Aragorn, Company Leader)
• Denry Klin, Editor in Chief now lets you pick which counter it enters with, and entry triggers see the chosen counter (previously it silently applied a broken catch-all counter)
• Added Gogo, Mysterious Mime

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Maelstrom Pulse (and similar "destroy/exile/return all others with the same name") no longer wipe the whole board — they correctly hit only same-named permanents
• Kodama of the East Tree no longer loops forever — it won't re-trigger on permanents it placed itself
• Cloud Key, Umori, Stenn, and Herald's Horn now apply their chosen-type cost reduction instead of discounting every spell
• Equipment and Aura keyword grants that were being dropped now apply (Whispersilk Cloak, Swashbuckler's Whip, Multiclass Baldric, Hunter's Blowgun)
• Conditional buffs that depend on a creature's type now turn on and off correctly instead of being always-on (Depala, Earth Surge)
• Sakashima of a Thousand Faces, Mirror Gallery, Mirror Box, and Sliver Gravemother now correctly exempt permanents from the legend rule
• The Ozolith now moves counters to itself correctly, and Betor, Kin to All resolves its life-loss clause against the right players
• "Tap or untap target" (and the reversed "untap or tap") now targets correctly
• Flagship Vessel's shared counter-choice now targets the artifact once instead of mis-collecting targets

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Phased-out permanents no longer fire triggered abilities while they're gone

🤖 AI
• New cEDH AI difficulty for Bracket 5 games — it now actually engages at the table (the difficulty was previously falling back to Medium)

entries.title: Dice rolls work; import decks from URLs
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Dice rolls now work — "Roll a d20", result modifiers ("and add/subtract N"), and full d20 result tables resolve correctly and trigger die-roll-watcher cards (The Deck of Many Things, Diviner's Portent, Arden Angel, Revivify)
• Graft is implemented — Graft creatures now enter with their +1/+1 counters and offer to move one onto each creature that enters afterward (Vigean Graftmage and the rest of the Dissension Graft cards)
• Life ↔ power/toughness exchange now works — swap a player's life total with a creature's stat (Tree of Perdition, Tree of Redemption, Evra, Halcyon Witness); these previously couldn't even pick a target

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• The Ring emblem behaves correctly
• Mizzix's Mastery now casts its copy properly
• Death Baron's stacked static bonuses apply correctly
• Battle spells resolve correctly
• Inspirit's shared counter choice resolves correctly
• Non-targeted "return a creature you control" ETBs let you choose at resolution instead of mis-targeting (Whitemane Lion, Stonecloaker, Aether Channeler, Dream Stalker, Emancipation Angel, and more)
• Prepared copies now enforce their mana cost

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Triggered abilities that ask you to choose a target now appear on the stack before you choose, so you can see what you're targeting for (e.g. Lulu, Stern Guardian)

🖥️ Interface
• Import decks directly from Moxfield and Archidekt URLs — paste a public deck link in the new "From URL" import tab (works across every game format, localized in all 7 languages)

🌐 Multiplayer
• Fixed the opponent HUD collapsing into an unreadable strip after players are eliminated in 4-player Commander games
• You can no longer accidentally join your own hosted lobby game

🤖 AI
• Fixed an infinite loop where the AI would re-cast Whitemane Lion forever (and capped repeat-casts of the same card per turn as a safety net)

entries.title: Cube & Pod draft graduate from Experimental
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Council's-dilemma "Whenever players finish voting" triggers — Model of Unity, Erestor of the Council, and Grudge Keeper now fire correctly once voting wraps up (CR 701.38)
• "Returned to hand" bounce triggers — Warped Devotion, Azorius Aethermage, Stormfront Riders, and Tameshi, Reality Architect now recognize "is/are returned to its owner's hand"

🎲 Draft
• Cube draft and Pod draft graduate out of Experimental — both are now first-class options on the Draft and Multiplayer landing pages, no preferences toggle required
• Multiplayer cube draft — host a cube draft pod with friends, including a Set/Cube tab on the host setup screen, cube name in the lobby header, and resumable cube sessions

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Suspend granted by another permanent (Jhoira of the Ghitu, The Tenth Doctor) — cards cast via granted Suspend are now properly tagged as Suspend casts and pick up "gains haste" per CR 702.62a
• Gruff Triplets — token copy loop no longer misbehaves
• Frodo, Adventurous Hobbit — lifelink animation now plays correctly

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Conceding an AI or local game now actually ends the game — the engine processes the concede, state-based actions run, and GameOver fires (previously the game survived in the background worker and was reachable by navigating back to its URL)

🖥️ Interface
• Card hover previews in dialogs now route through the dialog shell, giving consistent hover behavior across single-card modals (Top-or-Bottom, Tribute, Optional Effect prompts)

🌐 Multiplayer
• Security fix: rejected forged `SetSeatConnected` draft messages from clients so a malicious peer can't fake another seat's connection state
• Refreshed metagame deck feeds for the deck builder

entries.title: Renown grants counters on first damage
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Renown — creatures that become renowned when they deal combat damage to a player now grant +1/+1 counters and trigger renown abilities correctly (M15-era keyword unlocked)
• Plural-form batched triggers — "Whenever one or more creatures become tapped/blocked/dealt combat damage/become the target of a spell or ability" now parse, unlocking Deeproot Pilgrimage, Mindblade Render, Fog Patch, Hezrou, Choking Vines, Big Spender, Tui and La, Blossombind, Amulet of Safekeeping, Dormant Gomazoa, and Professor Hojo

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Forgotten Ancient — the upkeep "move any number of +1/+1 counters to other creatures" trigger no longer silently drops when there are no other creatures yet; counter distribution across multiple creatures is now atomic
• Innkeeper's Talent — the level-3 "double the counters" replacement no longer fires at levels 1 and 2; it now correctly waits until the Class hits level 3
• Betor, Kin to All — the "each opponent loses half their life, rounded up" cascade now actually fires when your creatures' total toughness is 40 or more (was checking the opponent's board by mistake)
• Urza's Mine / Power Plant / Tower — pipeline regression coverage added so the "control all three → 3 colorless" mana ability stays locked in

entries.title: X-cost pump cards (Kessig Wolf Run) fixed
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Night Dealings now plays — parser recognises "deals damage to another player" triggers
• Squad (additional-cost keyword) is supported, with copied spells correctly clearing Squad payment history
• Hezrou and the broader "Whenever one or more creatures you control become blocked" batched-trigger class now fire correctly

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Kessig Wolf Run and 10 other X-cost pump cards (Tovolar Insatiable Frugivore, Duelist's Flame, Finale of Devastation, Frantic Confrontation, Lunar Frenzy, Mishra's Command, Pedal to the Metal, Tyvar's Stand, Unwilling Recruit, plus +X/+X variants) now actually grant +X/+X when activated
• Bloodroot Apothecary correctly distributes its token creation across each target opponent
• Vengevine now properly waits for the second creature spell each turn before returning
• Deep Gnome Terramancer is gated on lands you haven't played
• Dreadhorde Arcanist's cast-from-graveyard target is parsed correctly
• Cards that return same-named graveyard cards now parse
• Cards that filter by exact base power (e.g. "creatures with base power 2") now parse
• Comma-less copy-token exception clauses now parse
• Statically granted Cascade (e.g. from another effect) is honored
• Secret Entrance and other dungeon-room triggers no longer vanish when Take the Initiative resolves — they hit the stack like natural triggers (closes #587)

🖥️ Interface
• Improvise castability preview now reflects payment correctly

🃏 Draft
• Pod draft: an auto-pick from one seat no longer advances the round for everyone — each seat must actually pick before packs pass
• Pod draft: pick timer no longer freezes at 0 after an already-picked seat is re-queued
• Pod draft: mid-draft disconnects are now visible to the rest of the pod (host + spectators), and in-flight saves from before this fix render seats as connected by default

entries.title: Hover-to-preview in the Limited deckbuilder
entries.body:
• Conditional search destinations pick the right zone.
• "Without dying" leave-the-battlefield triggers fire correctly.
• Tapped-ETB counter replacements and max-speed replacements gate correctly.
• Carrying targeted-player predicates through ability chains (so downstream "that player" clauses resolve to the same player).
• Any-number put-counter choices can be made at resolution.
• Non-targeted untap choices are made at resolution rather than on cast.

🖥️ Interface
• Hover-to-preview now works in the Limited deckbuilder (Quick Draft, Pod Draft, and between-games sideboarding) on both the pool and main-deck tiles, plus the match-in-progress pool review panel.
• Lands that produce a chosen color show fixed alternatives in the mana menu instead of asking again.

🌐 Multiplayer
• Pending-trigger ordering no longer leaks the firing event, modal choice, or mode descriptions to the opposing player — only the public "opponent is ordering N triggers" spine is visible.

🛠️ Under the Hood
• `setup.sh` auto-detects Tilt and defers WASM + card-data builds to `tilt up`, and gained an `--agent` mode for LLM contributors that skips the Scryfall image sidecars.

entries.title: Spells using non-tap mana no longer blocked
entries.body:
⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Spells that need mana from non-tap abilities (Krark-Clan Ironworks, Cabal Coffers chains) are no longer falsely flagged uncastable — the cost check now knows you can crack rocks mid-payment.
• Phyrexian costs no longer deadlock when life is the only payable option (e.g. commanders with no mana available) — the engine auto-pays the life and resolves.
• Ward can be paid without the mana buttons going dead mid-payment.
• X-cost spells with life as an additional cost now prompt for X correctly.
• Modal spells with X targets validate target legality against the chosen X.
• Commander free-cast / cost-reduction options behave correctly from the command zone.
• Damage prevention is scoped to the controller of the prevention effect (not all players).
• High Alert and friends correctly identify "creatures with defender" as the subject.
• Trial-style "bounce if it attacked/blocked" combat-relation triggers fire properly.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Ghost Quarter, Consult the Star Charts (dig alternative), Saw in Half (copy exception), Char (damage rider), Arcade Cabinet (target selection), Titans' Nest (mana exile cost), Ugin's Labyrinth (mana condition), Myrsmith (optional token), Spacecraft (self-counter riders + continuation statics), Kuja (Wizard-count transform), Endurance-style milled-this-way returns, equipped-creature counter hosts.
• Token copies now bind correctly when the source was exiled, and "except it's not a token" clauses on copy effects (contracted form) are recognized.
• Greatest-power sacrifice filters ("sacrifice the creature with the greatest power…") parse.
• Source-power block restrictions ("can't be blocked by creatures with power N or less") parse.
• Discarded-this-way and sacrificed-this-way object tracking now feeds count-based riders.
• Anaphoric for-each pump targets resolve to the right creatures.

entries.title: Opponent Aura badges in multiplayer
entries.body:
🖥️ Interface
• Multiplayer opponent tabs now show a corner badge listing player-attached Auras (Curses, Faith's Fetters, Dictate of Kruphix) with the same hover preview as 1v1.
• Sandbox: every seat is debug-permitted by default, you can now see your own library's card names in the debug picker, and the mobile hand drawer opens the per-card debug menu on tap.

🌐 Multiplayer
• 3-player Commander P2P bring-up: AI seats now get random format-legal decks (instead of always the first), human/AI seat names propagate end-to-end, the AI wakes correctly on guest actions, and deck-init failures surface as hard errors instead of silently starting with empty libraries.

entries.title: Exalted, Extort & Dethrone now trigger
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• New keywords now actually trigger: Exalted, Extort, and Dethrone were parsed but silent — they now synthesize their real triggered abilities (attacks-alone pump, post-cast {W/B} drain, +1/+1 on attacking the life leader).
• Twinning Staff now adds its extra copy when you copy an instant/sorcery, with the bonus copy able to choose new targets (interacts correctly with multi-copy effects like Mirari).
• Dosan, the Falling Leaf and City of Solitude now actually lock down off-turn casting (and City also blocks off-turn activations, mana abilities excepted).
• New cards added: Old-Growth Troll, Ur-Drago, March of the Machines, Cecil Dark Knight, Mage Hunter, Aether Tradewinds, Mindlock Orb (partial), Fugitive Druid (partial), Roiling Vortex (partial), Aether Gust (partial), Dramatic Accusation.

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Planeswalker +1 abilities and other typed-target effects now correctly prompt for targets again (regression where prompts were silently skipped and effects fizzled).
• X-cost activated abilities with a tap cost no longer softlock by trying to pay the tap twice.
• Token copies now respect the source's printed P/T overrides (Offspring 1/1 copies, rounded dynamic P/T).
• "A deck can have any number of cards named ___" lines are now silently accepted instead of misfiring as runtime statics.
• Mass-revealed cards (Duress, Telepathy) that get shuffled back into your library no longer remain visible to opponents when re-drawn.
• Commander and Brawl decks with Maybeboard entries no longer get downgraded to BO3 or lose their CMD badge — the maybeboard is dropped at game load instead.

🤖 AI
• AI will no longer cast Whitemane Lion / Stonecloaker on infinite loop when the only legal bounce target is itself.

entries.title: Cloud Sync: sign in to sync decks & prefs
entries.body:
🃏 Deck Builder
• New Maybeboard staging zone, always visible in Commander/Brawl and other forbidden-sideboard formats (your maybe-include cards no longer vanish into an unrecoverable sideboard); move controls are now labeled with their destination (→ Maybeboard / → Sideboard / → Main)
• List view now shows your commander

☁️ Cloud Sync (Optional)
• New: sign in with Discord or Google to sync your decks, preferences, and
  metagame feeds across devices via Supabase. Conflict reconciliation UI lets
  you keep cloud or keep local on mismatch; multi-device safety via atomic
  compare-and-set. Self-hosters without Supabase credentials see no change

🌐 Multiplayer & PWA
• Preview (v7) and release (v6) clients can now share the same lobby during a
  rollout — the protocol gate accepts the current version *and* the previous
• Fixed mobile lobby hosting and broker name filtering
• Fixed multiplayer AI seat deck validation
• PWA now self-heals when a new deploy lands while your tab is open — stale
  chunk loads trigger a reload (deferred mid-game so it never drops your P2P /
  WebSocket connection), and Cloudflare Pages now forces revalidation on entry
  points so you don't have to hard-refresh after a release

entries.title: Clash triggers work; fixed a draw-out crash
entries.body:
⚔️ Gameplay & Stability
• Fixed a 4-player Commander game-ender: Jace, Wielder of Mysteries / Laboratory Maniac / Blood Scrivener etc. were leaking a stashed "you win" effect on every non-empty draw, then draining it on an unrelated player's turn and eliminating the wrong opponent. Same defect class also fixed for doubled life gain (Boon Reflection, Rhox Faithmender, Heron of Hope, Angel of Vitality, Alhammarret's Archive) — "I lost the game out of nowhere" should be gone
• State-based actions now run on terminal player-loss reconciliation, so a player who would lose during a non-priority choice flow actually loses
• Activated abilities with modes (modal) now hide modes with no legal targets instead of letting you pick a dead option
• Batched triggers (e.g. "for each creature that attacked") now count the right subjects when only some attackers match the trigger's filter

✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Clash triggers now work — including the "if you won" outcome clauses
• Player-loss triggers (e.g. Withengar Unbound, Ramses, Assassin Lord, Blood Tyrant)
• Aura becomes-attached triggers, with correct self-host targeting
• Player damage-received triggers, with optional source filters
• "Skip your combat phase" effects (Stonehorn Dignitary) skip all combat steps correctly, no longer conflated with skipping just beginning-of-combat
• Phthisis-style "loses life equal to that creature's power plus toughness"
• Spellstutter Sprite now binds X to the targeted spell's mana value correctly
• Refurbished Familiar / Aclazotz-style "mandatory failure" tails (do-or-do-else)
• "Top creature card of your graveyard" and other zone-position references now honor the type filter

entries.title: On-device deck builder card search
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Ripple now works (cast a spell, reveal that many off the top, cast the matches)
• "Whenever this creature evolves" triggers now fire — e.g. Renegade Krasis, Watchful Radstag — distinct from the evolve enters-the-battlefield trigger
• Lots of newly-playable cards: Lair of the Hydra (creature-land), Inversion Behemoth and other "switch the power and toughness of..." effects, Tamanoa and other noncreature damage sources, Transguild Courier (all colors), Fleet Swallower, Silent Arbiter, and the Bracers equipment activation triggers

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Attack triggers that target "the player/permanents being attacked" now resolve against the right player (e.g. Gornog)
• Opponent-controlled damage-source triggers now fire correctly (e.g. Michiko's sacrifice effect resolving against the damage source's controller)
• The Earth King and other batched attack triggers now count only the matching attackers, not the whole attack

⚔️ Gameplay & Stability
• Fixed a class of game freezes where mass-effect triggers ("each/any" targets) created impossible target prompts that could never be answered
• Added the missing "top or bottom of library" choice prompt (and clash card placement) — previously these states had no UI and could soft-lock the game

🃏 Deck Builder
• Card search now runs entirely on your device against the local engine database (name + oracle text, colors, type, mana value, legality, sets) with zero network calls — faster, works offline, and matches exactly what the engine knows about each card
• Hover any eligible commander to see its full-card preview; bracket picker moved into the info rail beside the deck

🤖 Community
• New Discord /card bot: look up any card and see exactly how the engine parses it — the same breakdown as the in-app Alt-hover "ENGINE PARSE" overlay, with mana symbols, a coverage meter, and unsupported lines struck through

entries.title: Rotate flip cards; choose-objects quick-select
entries.body:
🃏 Draft
• Draft pods now resume correctly and hand off cleanly between matches
• Fixed match concessions and bot identities in draft pods
• Fixed draft tournament controls and how the AI is presented

✨ Quality of Life
• Flip cards (Kamigawa-style, where the other half is printed upside-down) can
  now be rotated 180° to read — hold Ctrl on desktop, or tap the Flip button on
  the mobile full-screen preview
• Proliferate and other "choose objects" prompts got All / None / My Side
  quick-select buttons, so you can grab just your own permanents in one tap
  instead of deselecting every opponent target

🌍 Localization
• Added Polish as the 7th supported language, with a CI gate that enforces
  every locale stays in exact key-parity and valid UTF-8
• Translated the per-category pacing slider labels/descriptions and a batch of
  previously-missed chrome (AI difficulty levels, settings options, deck pages,
  error fallbacks, phase labels); the draft set-picker error now localizes too

entries.title: Redirect spells (Bolt Bend) now work
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• "Change the target" spells now actually work — Bolt Bend, Redirect, and
  Misdirection were silently fizzling against any spell or ability on the stack;
  they now redirect correctly, including offering every legal new host when
  retargeting an Aura spell
• Retargeting got a board-click UI: for single-target redirects you just click
  the new target on the battlefield (with a banner naming the spell you're
  redirecting) instead of going through a modal

⚔️ Gameplay
• Scry and Surveil now let you order the cards you keep on top — drag to reorder
  with draw-position badges, instead of a plain top/bottom toggle
• Fixed a Commander soft-lock under Mindslaver-style turn control: when one
  player controlled another's turn, priority never passed and the game hung
  forever — turns and the stack now advance correctly

🌐 Multiplayer
• Reordered or partial Scry / Surveil / Dig selections are now accepted in
  multiplayer (they worked solo but the server was rejecting any non-default
  ordering as an illegal action)

🤖 AI
• Fixed AI game startup and draft-pod bot matches
• AI now evaluates "choose from zone" decisions from the right player's
  perspective when a turn is being controlled

🖥️ Interface
• Reworked the multi-opponent rail: each opponent's name gets its own row above
  their stats (no more name/life overlap on narrow screens), plus a new
  comfortable/compact density toggle
• Deck builder text-list preview now appears only when hovering a card's name,
  not anywhere on the row

entries.title: Wishboard support: Karn & the Wish cycle
entries.body:
✨ New Cards & Mechanics
• Karn, the Great Creator & friends — full "outside the game" wishboard support:
  search your exile/sideboard pool, exile face-up, and the AI knows how to wish too
• Balance and its family of equalization effects (sacrifice/discard down to the
  lowest count) now resolve correctly across all players
• Eminence triggers now fire from the command zone — your commander's passive
  ability works before it even hits the battlefield (Commander players, rejoice)
• Living Weapon equipment now spawns its 0/0 Germ token and attaches automatically
• Ghostfire-style "this is colorless" cards are now correctly colorless everywhere

🛠️ Cards That Now Work Right
• Angelic Arbiter — each clause now checks the right player: opponents are only
  locked out of casting/attacking if THEY attacked/cast this turn (previously it
  blocked everyone unconditionally and even restricted itself)
• Fixed parsing for: "untap all" follow-ups, "mana of that type" continuations,
  rounded starting-life effects, "create a token, then put +1/+1 counters" chains,
  compound counter clauses, comma-separated "each player sacrifices" effects, and
  keyword actions with a leading subject

⚔️ Combat & Gameplay
• Fixed a game-locking trample bug: a big trampler blocked by enough small
  creatures to exceed its power could no longer assign damage at all, freezing
  combat. You can now spread damage among blockers freely (CR 702.19b / 510.1c)
• Menace & "must be blocked by 2+" attackers now show live "needs N blockers"
  badges, and Confirm Blockers is disabled with an explanation until each block
  is legal (declaring zero blockers is still allowed)

🖥️ Interface
• The stack panel can now be docked on the left OR right — your choice

🌍 Localization
• New language foundation (react-i18next): pick your language in preferences
• All in-app text translated into Spanish, French, German, Italian & Portuguese

entries.title: Mobile-first deck builder redesign
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Redesigned the deck builder with a mobile-first, touch-friendly responsive layout and accessibility improvements (replaces the old desktop-only three-column view)
• Deck builder now defaults to Commander format and adds an edit button for the selected deck
• Fixed the first-turn draw in multiplayer games
• New card: Disarm
• "Becomes the target / flip a coin" style coin-flip result triggers are now supported
• Char and similar split-damage spells no longer drop their self-damage clause (e.g. "deals 4 to any target and 2 to you")
• Spells that put counters of a chosen color, and "sacrifice all" colored-permanent effects, now parse correctly (#1000, #1003)
• Faster, more stable menu: the card database now warms on the main menu and deck compatibility checks reuse the shared engine instead of cold-booting a second ~90MB instance (fixes the compat-check stall and memory spikes)
• Added a "Try Preview" badge on release builds linking to the preview site, and fixed the social-link cluster overlapping the top bar on mobile
• Fixed the debug keyword toggle (it was being wiped on the next layer recompute) and context-menu submenus now fly out horizontally

entries.title: New triggers: monarch, explore & dungeons
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• New trigger support across several mechanics: becoming the monarch, explore, dungeon completion, die rolls, and extra-land-play triggers (e.g. City of Traitors)
• Fixed blank/wrong card art on token-copies and Clone-style permanents — copies now show the art of the card they're copying (e.g. an MDFC back face in the legend-rule chooser)
• Fixed the in-game Sandbox "Create Card" autocomplete returning no results on the hosted site
• Graveyard mass-move effects now use the correct owner scope (#957)
• Spells filtering targets by power now surface their valid targets correctly (#933)

entries.title: New cards: Edgar Markov & Dragonborn Champion
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• New cards: Edgar Markov, Dragonborn Champion, and Scheming Aspirant
• "The Ring tempts you" triggers are now supported
• Treasures and similar mana tokens can now be tapped in bulk — a quantity stepper in the color picker lets you crack several at once in a single step
• Token-copies of real cards now show a "Copy" badge on the board, so they're distinguishable from the printed permanents they're copying
• Added a discoverable Sandbox Tools debug panel (including a "Copy Permanent" action)
• Fixed activation costs eating the wrong sources: tapped/tap sources are now preserved while paying for an ability (#958, #959, #960)
• Conditional mana replacement effects are now honored (#972)
• "Create or sacrifice a token" triggers now fire on both halves (e.g. Mirkwood Bats)
• Faerie Fencing's cast-time pump now applies correctly
• More parser fixes: targeted keyword grants, fixed-land subtype triggers, self-bounce upkeep triggers staying on the battlefield, and scoped life-loss wording

entries.title: Fixed a crash on low-memory browsers
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Fixed a crash ("memory access out of bounds") when starting a game vs the AI on lower-memory browsers
• New cards: The Ur-Dragon, Reaver Titan, Burning-Tree Shaman, Loyal Sentry, Relic Crush, and Ethersworn Canonist
• Frostcliff Siege now playable with full Siege mode-choice support
• Endure is now supported — grow a creature with +1/+1 counters or make a token army on resolution
• Modal double-faced spells can now be cast from their back face (e.g. Esika // The Prismatic Bridge)
• Abilities with a choice of costs now prompt you to pick which to pay (e.g. "{T} or {2}")
• Big batch of multi-target counter fixes: spells that distribute counters across several targets, or scale per target, now resolve correctly (fixes Kalonian Hydra, plus #834/#856/#892/#943/#870)
• Token-copy effects fixed: Second Harvest no longer copies itself, Brass's Bounty prompts replacements correctly, and Tireless Provisioner's token choice works
• Role tokens now correctly attach to their host (fixed 7 single-target Role cards, incl. Asinine Antics)
• Mass-goad effects now resolve (Disrupt Decorum, Parasitic Impetus)
• Library targeting fixes: target-player library peeks, Nashi's each-player exile, Qutrub damage-history targeting, Urza's Bauble
• "Whenever an opponent shuffles their library" triggers now fire (e.g. Cosi's Trickster)
• Many more card fixes: Celestial Mantle life doubling, Lolth emblem, Hullbreaker, Sudden Spoiling, Minsc & Boo, Ionize, Run Away Together, Fevered Suspicion, Refurbished Familiar, Midnight Tilling, Teval, Volcanic Salvo
• Multiplayer lobby moved to a Cloudflare-backed broker with TURN credentials for more reliable peer-to-peer connections, plus region flags and lobby refresh on server switch
• All-AI games now run fully locally instead of routing through multiplayer
• Sideways cards now rotate correctly in the preview
• Fixed commander/opponent HUD auto-follow focus quirks and game-over screen reconciliation

entries.title: Cultivate-style searches split correctly
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Cultivate-style searches now split cards correctly between the battlefield and hand (Cultivate, Kodama's Reach, Nissa's Pilgrimage, Boreas Charger).
• The Chain Veil and loyalty abilities work more accurately, including extra loyalty activations and targeted loyalty abilities.
• Tokens now use a dedicated art catalog, so generated tokens can show the right artwork more consistently.
• Multiplayer lobbies, player identity, P2P AI seats, and server-hosted drafts are more reliable.
• Stack entries and targeting are clearer, with better target arcs, higher-contrast highlights, and remembered publicly revealed cards.
• Prepared spells and prepared card copies now keep the right face, designation, targets, and action labels.
• “Each player discards their hand” effects now affect every player correctly (Windfall, Wheel of Fortune).
• “Target player sacrifices…” effects now let you choose the right player and victim (Diabolic Edict, Liliana of the Veil).
• Self-shuffle cards now return themselves to libraries correctly (Green Sun's Zenith, Beacon cycle, Nexus of Fate).
• Per-opponent target effects now fan out targets correctly instead of dropping or reusing the wrong target.
• Revealed-card references now use the revealed card instead of the source creature or spell (Yuriko, Mana Drain, Dark Confidant, Reanimate).
• Worship-style life-floor prevention now works, and attached damage prevention is correctly limited to the equipped or enchanted object.
• Combat and layer effects gained support for Silent Arbiter, Vedalken Humiliator, Winged Hive Tyrant, Hivestone, Ursine Champion, and Spacecraft subtype
cards.
• More triggered and replacement patterns now work, including Fastbond, Phyrexian Obliterator, Herald of Anafenza, Surveillance Monitor, and Patrolling
Peacemaker.
• More specialty card text is supported, including Power Artifact, Talara's Bane, Crackling Drake, Visions, and Urborg.

• “Unless you tap…” and “unless you exile…” costs now parse for cards like Koskun Falls, Command Bridge, and Rotting Giant.
• Hand-size comparison draw effects now work for cards like Kozilek, Iymrith, Damia, Slithermuse, and Balance of Power.
• AI now values Rewind-style untap targets better and avoids more self-harming choices.
• Autopass combat stops, summoning sickness visuals, and checkpoint player names were polished for clearer gameplay.

entries.title: Mana Drain pays at your next main phase
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Mana Drain now correctly gives you colorless mana equal to the countered spell's mana value at your next main phase.
• Tymna the Weaver now uses the correct X value for both life payment and card draw.
• Cumulative upkeep now works for supported costs, including Mystic Remora, Inner Sanctum, Polar Kraken, and Jötun Owl Keeper.
• Necropotence-style exile-and-return effects now work, including face-down exile handling for cards like Bomat Courier and Asmodeus the Archfiend.
• Multi-word keyword counters now parse correctly, unlocking cards like Avenging Huntbonder and Heightened Reflexes.
• “Can block an additional creature” and “can block any number of creatures” effects now work for activated and temporary abilities.
• Equipment and Aura triggers for becoming attached or unattached now work, including cards like Grafted Wargear, Umbral Mantle, and Assimilation Aegis.
• Exert triggers now parse correctly, unlocking cards like Trueheart Twins, Battlefield Scavenger, and Resolute Survivors.
• “Target player can’t play lands this turn” effects now work, covering Pardic Miner and related cards.
• “This creature can’t have counters put on it” now works for Melira’s Keepers and Tatterkite.
• Commander targeting is more accurate, including “target commander you own” and commander-related target filters.
• Delayed “next turn’s upkeep” triggers now parse correctly, improving cards like Arcane Denial and Bag of Holding.
• Mutagen tokens now have their printed activated ability.
• More static restrictions are recognized correctly, including “can’t draw,” “skip your draw step,” and “can’t be blocked except by Walls/artifact creatures/
  flying creatures.”
• CubeCobra cube URL loading is fixed.

entries.title: Major drafting upgrade: cube & pod
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Drafting got a major upgrade: single-player Cube Draft, quick draft access, resumable pod drafts, auto-picks, improved bot filling, and clearer pod hosting.
• New format support is available for Premodern and Tiny Leaders, with Limited now mirrored properly in frontend format pickers.
• 40-card free-for-all hosting is now supported for Limited-style games.
• Make an Example now works end to end, including the pile-separation UI and legal empty-pile choices.
• Evoke cards with non-mana costs now prompt correctly, including Solitude, Endurance, Grief, Subtlety, and Fury.
• K'rrik, Son of Yawgmoth now lets players pay 2 life for black mana symbols when casting spells.
• Thassa's Oracle now only wins when its devotion condition is actually met.
• Animate Dead-style Auras can now correctly target cards in graveyards.
• Ghostly Pilferer and similar cards now correctly check whether spells were cast from somewhere other than hand.
• Bloodchief Ascension and Suture Priest now make the correct player lose life from zone-change triggers.
• Chandra's Ignition and similar effects now correctly ask for the source creature and use that creature as the damage source.
• Colorless-hybrid mana costs now parse correctly, including Ulalek, Fused Atrocity.
• Disruptor Flute now only taxes spells with the chosen name instead of every spell.
• Trigger ordering prompts and stack labels are clearer, and interrupted mana-payment flows resume more reliably after ordering triggers.
• Deck import handling is more reliable for card names, printings, and Tiny Leaders leader eligibility.
• Attached non-Aura/non-Equipment battlefield objects display more correctly.

entries.title: Order simultaneous triggers (CR 603.3b)
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Players can now order simultaneous triggers correctly, with frontend and AI support for CR 603.3b trigger ordering.
• Manual spell payment is now wired through casting, so players can choose exact payment behavior instead of relying only on auto-pay.
• Devour now works as creatures enter the battlefield, prompting sacrifices and adding the right number of +1/+1 counters (e.g. Mycoloth, Predator Dragon).
• Suspend and Plot are much more reliable: self-exile costs work, granted Suspend gains its companion triggers, and time counters land on the right card.
• Evolve now fires as a real runtime trigger for printed and granted Evolve cards (e.g. Experiment One, Tyranid Prime).
• Abundance now supports its optional draw replacement, including choosing land/nonland and declining to use the replacement.
• Magecraft and other “cast or copy” triggers now fire when an instant or sorcery spell is copied.
• Retrace casting support has been added.
• Graveyard activated abilities are now offered when legal, including recursion and graveyard mana abilities (e.g. Teacher’s Pest, Jack-o’-Lantern).
• Blight now works both as an effect and as a cost, putting the correct number of -1/-1 counters on one chosen creature.
• X-spells with Improvise, Convoke, or Waterbend now calculate playable X values correctly without double-counting tapped resources.
• Cost reducers and increases now apply correctly when choosing alternative costs like Warp, Evoke, Overload, and Bestow.
• Several card-specific rules bugs were fixed, including Skullwinder, Liliana, Dreadhorde General, Braids, Exhume, Ajani, Callous Oppressor, Rite of Consumption, and Devour Intellect.
• Protection, commander, blocking, and loyalty edge cases are more rules-correct, including Serra’s Emissary, Lieutenant, Troll of Khazad-dum, and planeswalker loyalty resets.

• “Differently named” counts and “every creature type” effects now parse correctly, improving cards like Gimbal, Gremlin Prodigy and Maskwood Nexus.
• Lander tokens now have their activated search ability, rules text fallback, and better image lookup support.
• Replacement choices are clearer: competing enter-tapped/untapped effects now show outcome labels instead of raw rules text.
• Lone card-consuming actions like Cycling or Channel now ask for confirmation instead of auto-firing when they are the only available action.
• Vanilla token images now prefer vanilla token printings, avoiding misleading ability-bearing art.
• Gameplay help, shortcut guidance, combat overlay labels, dropdown readability, and multiplayer AI behavior all received usability fixes.

entries.title: New Commander bracket estimator (B1–B4)
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• New Commander deck bracket estimator (WotC B1–B4): the deck builder and My Decks now show a live tier estimate with a per-axis breakdown panel flagging which cards push your deck up a bracket
• Fixed an AI softlock where the opponent would freeze when forced to attack with a goaded creature (or one with "attacks each combat if able")
• Modal spells where an opponent picks the mode now work — e.g. "An opponent chooses one —" and "You choose one —" headers (previously every mode was unimplemented)
• Party mechanic fixed: cards now correctly count themselves toward your party and gate on "if you have a full party" (Burakos, Party Leader; Nalia de'Arnise; Linvala, Shield of Sea Gate)
• Multi-clause graveyard triggers now fire every clause (Syr Konrad, the Grim; Dreadhound; Scrap Trawler)
• Counterspells that name a list of legal targets no longer silently drop options (Louisoix's Sacrifice; Tale's End; Disallow; Voidslime; Squelch)
• Join Forces spells now work — every player can chip in mana and the effect scales by the total (Minds Aglow, Collective Voyage, Alliance of Arms, Shared Trauma)
• "Choose a player... choose a second player..." chains resolve each effect against the right player (Gluntch, the Bestower)
• Cards granting end-of-turn permission to play exiled cards now resolve correctly, even after the source leaves (Rocco, Cabaretti Caterer; Street Chef)
• Gate lands fixed: no more spurious replacement-ordering prompt, and "Add {G} or one mana of the chosen color" no longer drops the {G} option
• Flickerwisp-style delayed returns now actually return the card at the next end step instead of fizzling
• Volatile Fault's land search now routes to the destroyed land's controller, not the activating player

entries.title: Fixed the repeated-reload service-worker bug
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Fixed a service-worker bug that made the app reload itself repeatedly during the first turns of a game vs AI — installed PWAs (especially on iOS) now start games reliably, and the card database is properly cached for offline play
• Fixed a P0 softlock in two-seat games where duplicate action dispatch could freeze the game (#459)
• Vorinclex, Voice of Hunger now correctly doubles mana from Nykthos and other land-tap abilities, and its tap-for-mana trigger only fires for lands you tap (#460, #465)
• Scapeshift now sacrifices any number of lands rather than just one (#458)
• Cards that fetch "the creature with the greatest mana value" and similar superlatives are now parsed correctly (#463)
• Jhoira of the Ghitu's exile-from-hand activation cost now works (#462)
• Syphon Mind and Waste Not now count discards correctly across multiple players (#456)
• Declining Ponder's optional shuffle no longer skips the card draw (#455)
• Darksteel Mutation now properly grants indestructible while stripping the enchanted creature's abilities and types (#453)
• Kicker-conditional triggers now fire correctly when a spell was kicked (#461)
• AI and UI no longer offer to cast flash permanents when there's no valid target (e.g. conditional-flash creatures)
• AI multikicker decisions now respect the mana budget instead of over-committing (#454)
• Numerous parser fixes for compound effect clauses: Crew activation conditions, "repeat this process" loops, die-roll-powered pumps, monarch grants, and optional reveal-until destinations
• Mana payment UI now shows the engine's locked-in cost, including cost reductions

entries.title: Exhaust abilities now work
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Exhaust abilities now work — once-per-game activated abilities resolve and trigger correctly
• Room enchantments now trigger their abilities once fully unlocked (e.g. Duskmourn Rooms)
• The Plot mechanic is now supported — cards exiled to be plotted produce the right events
• Firebending now scales dynamically when its amount depends on game state
• Inkshield now creates the correct number of Inkling tokens, counting all prevented combat damage from multiple attackers as one batch (previously often made zero)
• Undying creatures sacrificed to edicts and "sacrifice a creature" effects now correctly return to the battlefield
• Greater Good now draws the right number of cards — equal to the sacrificed creature's power
• Birthing Ritual now correctly puts a creature onto the battlefield from the cards looked at, gated on the sacrificed creature's mana value
• Wedding Ring's triggered abilities now fire — opponents drawing cards or gaining life on their turn are tracked correctly
• Cards that choose from multiple zones at once (e.g. "a card from your hand or graveyard") now parse and resolve
• Mana spend restrictions ("spend this mana only to...") and static conditions on attached permanents now parse
• Debug mode now refreshes attacker/blocker eligibility live (e.g. clearing summoning sickness mid-combat)

entries.title: Fixed a Phyrexian-mana payment freeze
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Fixed a game-freezing hang when casting spells with Phyrexian mana costs (e.g. Vault Skirge) — the mana/life payment overlay now appears correctly instead of locking the board.
• Mana abilities that let you choose a color (e.g. Delighted Halfling's "add one mana of any color") no longer double-count under mana multipliers — they now produce the correct amount.
• Mana pool now shows restriction-distinct mana as separate pills, with a tooltip explaining each restriction.
• "Enters tapped" triggers now fire for permanents other than the trigger's own source (e.g. Amulet of Vigor now untaps each tapped permanent you control).
• Creatures can now activate tap abilities while summoning-sick under effects like Tyvar, Jubilant Brawler ("activate abilities as though creatures had haste").
• Odric, Lunarch Marshal now correctly grants each keyword only when a creature you control already has it, including the "the same is true for..." follow-up keywords.
• Alternative casting costs gated on a condition (e.g. Force of Despair's "only on a turn it isn't yours") are now offered only when that condition is met.
• Tombstone Stairwell now counts each player's own graveyard separately for its token count, and respects its "if on the battlefield" check.
• Expand the Sphere now proliferates the correct number of times when you put fewer than two lands onto the battlefield.
• Optional ("may") triggers that target based on the triggering player (e.g. Magnetic Mountain) no longer silently drop their effect when resumed after a choice.

entries.title: Mass-sacrifice effects no longer softlock
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Cataclysmic Gearhulk, Tragic Arrogance, and Planar Cleansing-style effects no longer softlock the game — the "each player keeps one of each type, sacrifices the rest" choice now renders a proper modal and the AI picks distinct permanents
• Cards that create a token copy controlled by a target player now work (e.g. Wedding Ring, Chain of Smog cycle) — the copy goes to the right player and no longer re-triggers its own ETB forever
• "Choose a player to..." chains now resolve correctly (e.g. Gluntch, the Bestower) — second and third chosen players are tracked instead of falling back to you
• "Any number of target players each discard/mill/lose life" effects now hit every chosen player, not just the first (e.g. Tinybones Joins Up)
• Milled-trigger cards now actually fire (e.g. Glowing One, The Wise Mothman, Zellix, Sanity Flayer, Mirelurk Queen)
• Karoo lands now resolve their enter-the-battlefield cost properly (Lotus Vale, Scorched Ruins, Mox Diamond, Soldevi Excavations, Heart of Yavimaya, Kjeldoran Outpost, Lake of the Dead, Balduvian Trading Post)
• Copy-spell cards now offer the optional "choose new targets for the copy" prompt instead of silently keeping the originals (Mirrorpool, Reverberate, Galvanic Iteration, and ~10 more)
• Brokers Ascendancy now puts counters on every creature and planeswalker you control, not just one
• Louisoix's Sacrifice can now target activated abilities, triggered abilities, or noncreature spells correctly
• X-cost counterspells with "unless they pay" now work (Syncopate, Condescend, Logic Knot, and 6 more)
• "Unless any player pays" effects now poll every player in turn order (Cleansing, Aether Rift, Rhystic Shield, Rhystic Tutor, and more)
• "Can't attack/block unless/if [condition]" restrictions now apply with correct polarity (Bloodcrazed Goblin, Lovestruck Beast, Orgg, Mogg Jailer, and others)
• Bargain cost-reduction now applies when you bargain a spell (Hamlet Glutton, Ice Out, Johann's Stopgap)

• Talon Gates of Madara can now be put onto the battlefield from your hand with its activated ability
• Animate Artifact now correctly animates an enchanted artifact into a creature with power/toughness equal to its mana value
• Doran, Besieged by Time's "+X/+X where X is the difference between its power and toughness" pump now works
• Giada-style "each other Angel enters with an extra counter for each Angel you already control" replacements now count correctly
• Damage prevention with a dynamic amount now works (e.g. Cover of Winter's "prevent X, where X is the number of age counters")
• Tornado-style cumulative upkeep ("pay 3 life for each velocity counter") now scales with counters
• Guide of Souls' "When you do" reflexive ability no longer fires when its energy cost is declined or unpayable

entries.title: Triggered mana resolves during auto-tap
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Triggered mana abilities now resolve during auto-tapped casts — spells that depend on bonus mana (e.g. Leyline of Abundance) no longer get silently dropped as uncastable
• The X-value chooser now counts multi-mana sources at full yield, so a board full of Sol Rings or filter lands lets you commit the X you can actually afford (e.g. Walking Ballista)
• "Whenever a player draws/casts their Nth card/spell during their turn" triggers now work, unlocking Ledger Shredder, Monologue Tax, The Council of Four, and similar per-turn cards
• Syr Konrad, the Grim's three-way graveyard trigger now fires on all of its conditions instead of only on creatures dying
• Springheart Nantuko's bestow landfall ability now correctly copies its host creature, with the 1/1 Insect fallback when unattached
• Coin-flip cards keep their optional follow-up prompts — Ral, Monsoon Mage now offers the "you may exile Ral" choice on a winning flip
• Betor, Ancestor's Voice now correctly returns creatures from your graveyard (filtered by mana value) rather than targeting the battlefield
• Gemstone Caverns now parses its luck counter and exile-a-card sub-ability
• Dalkovan Encampment's "create two Warrior tokens whenever you attack" ability now triggers properly
• "X {C} or X {C}" count-prefixed mana color choices now parse correctly
• Interactive triggers (target/modal prompts) now surface properly when a creature enters as a copy

entries.title: Multiplayer free-for-all targeting fixed
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Multiplayer free-for-all targeting fixed: clicking an opponent's HUD tab now scouts their board first and only commits a target on a second click, so abilities like Goblin Sharpshooter's "any target" no longer misfire — plus hover any opponent tab to preview their battlefield.
• You now receive priority during your own upkeep and draw step — activate abilities (e.g. Urza's Saga), respond to triggers, and honor phase stops in those steps.
• Approach of the Second Sun now correctly wins the game only on the second cast.
• Everybody Lives! now properly prevents every player from losing the game the turn it resolves.
• Multi-instance triggers no longer get silently dropped — two copies of the same triggered ability (e.g. two Boggart Pranksters attacking together) both reach the stack.
• Torment of Hailfire now repeats X times and offers the full lose-life / sacrifice / discard choice to each opponent.
• Several Battlebond "friend or foe" cards now work: Pir's Whim, Khorvath's Fury, Regna's Sanction, Virtus's Maneuver, Zndrsplt's Judgment.
• Tergrid, God of Fright now triggers off opponents both sacrificing and discarding, and keeps the permanents it steals.
• Crafty Cutpurse now redirects opponents' tokens to your control.
• Witherbloom, the Balancer and Sprout Swarm fixed — Affinity cost display and Convoke creature-tapping now work correctly.
• 20+ cards that grant abilities to other permanents now work (e.g. Inspiring Leader, Sedge Sliver, Criminal Past, the Rune cycle).
• Legendary Vehicles and Spacecraft (e.g. Hearthhull, the Worldseed) can now be chosen as commanders.
• Step-end mana abilities (Upwelling, Horizon Stone, Kruphix, Omnath) now resolve with proper player-choice ordering when several apply at once.
• Casualty copies — printed and granted (e.g. via Silverquill) — now resolve correctly, including retargeting the copied spell without freezing the board.

• Player-enchanting Auras and Curses now appear via a new HUD badge, with a hover preview and a dialog that renders full, readable card images.
• AI opponents no longer auto-pick Commander decks containing cards banned by the Commander Rules Committee (e.g. Mana Crypt, Jeweled Lotus).
• AI no longer hangs for seconds on huge boards — it instantly recognizes when blocking is futile (e.g. Scute Swarm armies), and mulligan decisions are now near-instant.
• Undo now reliably restores the clean point before an action instead of a mid-resolution state.
• Tokens created mid-turn now correctly have summoning sickness, and token art pulls the right image when tokens share power/toughness and color but differ in creature type.

entries.title: Mana that would empty can now be retained
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
 • Mana that would empty at end of phase can now be retained, replaced, or transformed — covers The Last Agni Kai, Drownyard Temple-style retention from spells, and color-swap effects (e.g. lost unspent mana replaced with a chosen color)
• Unspent mana now correctly persists across phase changes for the right set of effects, with turn-scoped and Players-scoped retention both honored
• ChangesZone ETB triggers (e.g. "when this enters from a graveyard") now respect the actual origin zone instead of misfiring on every entry
• Commander zone choice for the AI now always sends the commander back to the command zone, matching expected play
• CardPreview now shows granted keywords and the source of P/T modifications, so it's clear why a creature is 5/5 with flying
• Player choice modals now render with player avatars and seat colors for easier disambiguation in multiplayer
• Polished frontend affordances for castable spells (clearer visual cues for what you can play right now)
• Discord-reported bugs now deduplicate against already-closed GitHub issues to cut down on duplicate reports
• Fixed damage target controller snapshotting so damage attribution stays correct when control changes mid-resolution

entries.title: Deck builder keeps your commander slot empty
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Deck builder no longer auto-picks a new commander when you remove the current one — clicking Remove leaves the slot empty, and a per-card crown button (♛) lets you designate any eligible card with smart add/partner/swap resolution
• Hovering a creature's P/T now lists every per-source contribution alongside base stats (e.g. "3/4 (base 2/2) · +1/+1 from Lord · +0/+2 from Glorious Anthem"), with matching side-tables for granted keywords and other granted effects
• Leaves-the-battlefield triggers now show the dying creature's name as the source instead of a generic "(granted)" label
