• AI opponent deck selection now respects Commander bracket filters
• Commander partner and "background"-style pairings (CR 702.124 / 702.135) handled correctly in the deck builder, including combined-face card name resolution
• Fixed convoke payment actions, resolution-time mana cost payments, and Holdout Settlement's mana ability flow
• Fixed copy/retarget interactions: stack-ability copies retarget correctly in the UI, Chaos Wand cleans up its exile-until effect, and Chalice of the Void places counters via event-context targeting
• Fixed Reanimate-style riders that depend on the moved object's context, sacrificed-object context preserved through resolution, and delayed triggers binding to their parent target
• Fixed Advanced Reconstruction's random exile grant, optional-search decline handling, distributed-damage triggers, and defending-player artifact counts
• Gate lands now restrict color choices correctly; Eldrazi Spawn token/kicker parsing fixed; inline keyword-grant restrictions (e.g. "can't attack") parse correctly
• Legendary permanents flagged as legend-rule candidates in the UI when duplicates hit the battlefield

entries.title: Wish-cycle sideboard fetching works
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Cards that fetch from outside the game now work — "search your sideboard" effects (the Wish cycle, etc.) properly track and pull cards in, with a redesigned selection prompt
• "Protection from each color" / "protection from all colors" is now enforced — Akroma's Will, Iridescent Angel, Spectra Ward, Etched Champion, Favor of the Mighty (and "hexproof from each color" like Breaker of Creation) actually shield their creatures instead of silently doing nothing
• Maze's End works — it returns itself to hand as a cost and wins the game with 10 Gates
• Quick Draft got a big polish pass: a per-pack "Auto-pick" button, a "Choose Set → Draft → Build Deck → Play" progress map, animated card moves between pool and deck, a segmented difficulty picker, and a win/loss pip tracker between matches
• "Suggest Deck" in draft now builds a correct 40-card deck (it was producing 57-card decks), and "Auto Lands" sizes the manabase properly
• Draft bots now judge real card quality — removal, card draw, board wipes, tokens, counterspells, tutors, and stat efficiency — instead of a crude rarity/keyword count; Medium-difficulty bots now draft as sharply as Hard
• Beseech the Mirror, Beseech the Queen, Enlightened Tutor, and cascade no longer mishandle their exile-then-cast permissions
• Resuming or restoring a game no longer deadlocks on "name a card" effects (e.g. Petrified Hamlet's ETB)
• Asymmetric power/toughness counters (e.g. +1/+0, +2/+0) are now supported
• Parser fixes for "as long as you control N …" conditions and contextual "creatures you control get +X/+X" pump effects, including in animations

entries.title: Soulbond fully implemented
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Soulbond is now fully implemented — paired creatures, "as long as ~ is paired" abilities, pairing on ETB, and re-pairing when a partner enters
• Myriad now works — attacking creates the token copies attacking each other player, then exiles them at end of combat
• Bloodthirst X creatures now enter with the right number of +1/+1 counters when an opponent was dealt damage this turn
• Behold alternative casting costs are supported (Tarkir: Dragonstorm "Behold a Dragon" cards)
• Cards that pump themselves "whenever ~ attacks and isn't blocked" now trigger correctly and wear off at end of combat (e.g. Murk Dwellers)
• "{Z}" mana (one mana from a source that could make two or more colors) is now payable (Final Fantasy)
• Evelyn, the Covetous now tracks collection counters and grants the right "play exiled cards" permission
• Mathemagics now draws 2ˣ cards instead of 2; multi-option "choose one — A, B, or C" cards with 3+ choices now list every option (Master of Ceremonies, Turnabout, A Killer Among Us, Teferi's Realm)
• Intervening-if clauses referencing "that player" now resolve correctly (Tataru Taru, Price of Glory, Ghirapur Orrery), as do "if ~ has power N or greater" follow-ups (Cloud, Ex-SOLDIER)
• "As ~ enters, choose a creature type" effects now apply the chosen type to your creatures and creature spells (Arcane Adaptation, Conspiracy, Xenograft)
• Triggers that count your Nth draw each turn fire correctly even when multiple cards are drawn at once (Connive, Gift, batched draw steps)
• Storm copies and "discard at random" effects now prompt you to choose correctly instead of resolving silently
• Drafting sets with Special Guest, Mystical Archive, or The List slots no longer hangs at "Waiting for next pack" — those bonus cards now appear in packs
• Fixes for Elemental Spectacle's color-count, "can't cast" self-restrictions, combined attack/block requirements, compound legendary static grants, keyword-granting triggers

entries.title: Modular: Arcbound counters move on death
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Modular is now playable — Arcbound creatures (e.g. Arcbound Ravager) enter with +1/+1 counters and move them onto another modular creature when they die
• Annihilator now works — attacking with an Annihilator creature forces the defending player to sacrifice permanents
• Fabricate is now supported — choose +1/+1 counters or Servo tokens on entry (e.g. Cultivator of Blades)
• Undying and Persist now return creatures from the graveyard with the right counter (e.g. Geralf's Messenger, Murderous Redcap)
• Bloodthirst now works — creatures enter with +1/+1 counters if an opponent was dealt damage this turn
• Escalate is now supported, including modes with non-mana extra costs (e.g. Kari Zev's Expertise)
• You can now play lands and cast spells from the top of your library (e.g. Future Sight, Mystic Forge, Oracle of Mul Daya)
• Cards that copy a permanent now correctly keep its enters-the-battlefield effects and granted triggers (e.g. Callidus Assassin)
• Flash-granting and "you may cast" permissions with target conditions now apply correctly, and cast-from-exile permissions persist across turns
• Fixed Greater Good's draw-zero crash, the Undead Alchemist softlock, and Selvala, Heart of the Wilds' missing draw trigger
• Fixed prevention-shield interactions (Gatta and Luzzu), Skrelv's keyword-granting, Jeleva's exile count, Treasured Find, Tasha's Hideous Laughter, Blight Mamba regeneration, and Skycloud Expanse activation
• Fixed Trinisphere's cost floor and Pithing Needle's name matching
• "First main phase this turn" triggers now fire correctly (e.g. Ripples of Undeath)
• Opponent avatars no longer flicker on refresh and now show a hover preview; battlefield rows show a stack-collapse badge; full-art cards no longer clip the power/toughness box

entries.title: Foretell cards surface in hand (54 cards)
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Foretell now correctly surfaces in hand (54 cards) — fixes the bug where face-down foretold cards were hidden from their controller; same fix benefits Adventure, Plot, Suspend, and Warp casts from exile
• Combat-tax static abilities now actually tax: Archangel of Tithes, Propaganda, Ghostly Prison, Norn's Annex, Sphere of Safety, Windborn Muse, and Baird, Steward of Argive correctly pause combat for "{N} for each" payment
• Converge cards now resolve X to colors of mana spent instead of total battlefield permanents — Painful Truths, Bring to Light, Radiant Flames, Kaleidoscorch, Sweep the Skies, Infuse with the Elements
• Life-gain doublers now stack on triggered/conditional gain: Alhammarret's Archive, Boon Reflection, Rhox Faithmender, Phial of Galadriel, The Wind Crystal
• "Each opponent" effects fire on the right players when cast as a spell — Maddening Cacophony, Fractured Sanity, Tergrid's Shadow no longer hit the caster
• Reveal-until-find rest piles route to the right zone — Hermit Druid, Gamekeeper, Oath of Druids, the Consultations, Sacred Guide, and Spoils of the Vault correctly mill/exile the leftovers instead of bottoming the deck
• Treasured Find now exiles itself and returns the targeted card to hand (was inverted)
• Triggers like "Whenever an Elf you control dies, exile it" now exile the triggering subject instead of the source — fixes Serpent's Soul-Jar and similar typed-trigger anaphor cards
• Mulliganing is now simultaneous — every player decides keep/mulligan in any order, then bottoms in any order; massive speedup at multiplayer tables
• Serum Powder is fully playable — adds the "exile your hand and redraw without taking a mulligan" branch to the mulligan phase, with AI auto-preference
• Mulligan cap fixed for free-first formats (Commander/Brawl): you can now take the full 8 mulligans you're entitled to before reaching zero cards

• New Sandbox mode — multiplayer hosts can opt into debug actions, grant/revoke debug per player, with persistent in-room SANDBOX badge and public audit log
• Commander UI (commander column, commander-damage tracker) now renders in every commander-style format — DuelCommander, PauperCommander, Brawl, HistoricBrawl, not just classic Commander
• Stack entries for triggered abilities now show the source card name and ability description instead of a bare "Triggered" label — covers Prowess, Ward, Firebending, monarch/initiative, Start your engines!, and rad-counter triggers
• Phased-out permanents and players are now visually distinct: translucent sky-blue overlay (instead of just dimming) so phasing is no longer confusable with tapped/disabled
• Hand fan now scales gracefully past 7 cards — wide Commander hands stay on-screen and arc lift no longer launches edge cards off the top
• You can hover and zoom cards freely while your opponent is mid-dialog (the dialog overlay no longer eats board hover events)
• Deck-tile coverage bar hides at 100% — fully-supported decks no longer carry visual noise

entries.title: Player HUD shows Monarch, Energy & more
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Player HUD now displays Monarch, Initiative, City's Blessing, The Ring tempts you level, Energy counters, current Dungeon, and Rad counters
• Rad counters and toxic poison counters now actually do their thing — Fallout's irradiated mill/life loss at precombat, toxic creatures applying poison on combat damage
• "Each opponent" spells finally hit opponents instead of you (Maddening Cacophony, Fractured Sanity, Tergrid's Shadow, Bloodletting, and the rest of the class)
• Library-search-and-reveal effects send the unchosen cards to the right zone — Hermit Druid, Gamekeeper, Avenging Druid, Demonic/Aesthetic/Divining Consultation, Oath of Druids, Sacred Guide, and Spoils of the Vault no longer dump everything to the bottom of your library
• Multi-target damage chains resolve every hit (Cone of Flame, Banshee, Serpentine Spike), with proper rounding on fractional amounts
• Conditional-replacement damage now actually checks its condition before firing (Burning Hands, Stormscale Anarch, Establishing Shot, Scepter of Empires)
• Turn-long damage boosts work on global triggers (Rankle and Torbran, I Call for Slaughter)
• Rhystic Lightning's "if they do" alternative damage callback fires after the unless-pay choice
• "First player / second player" cross-sentence references resolve correctly (Oath of Mages)
• Enslave-style "its owner" damage anaphor wired up across phase triggers and Aura hosts
• Cabal Coffers, Vizier of Remedies, random-target spells like Zaffai, Thunder Conductor, and trap entry-history alt costs (Mystic Snake-shaped Traps) now play
• Post-combat main-phase triggers fire even when combat is skipped (Kona, Rescue Beastie and other survival triggers)
• Counterspell-and-then-do-X effects can now reference what they just countered

• Equipment that "unattaches as a cost" works, search effects now show selection constraints, exile-cast and graveyard-cast riders (flashback-class) accept any mana, cost-payment prohibitions land (Thalia class), and damage-prevention shields are now properly scoped per player
• Rematching a game preserves the original launch configuration

entries.title: Instant-speed loyalty abilities (Teferi)
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Planeswalkers can now activate loyalty abilities at instant speed when permitted (e.g. Teferi, Master of Time)
• Council's Dilemma / voting cards now work — each opponent gets a real choice prompt with correct per-vote rewards (Master of Ceremonies, Expressive Iteration, etc.)
• Countering a spell now properly tracks the countered object for follow-up effects ("when countered, exile it instead")
• Library search filters are smarter — supports total power/toughness constraints, mana value comparisons, prevalent creature type matching, and multi-filter seeks
• Prevention shields now correctly trigger follow-up effects (e.g. "if damage would be prevented, draw a card")
• Background commanders now properly trigger attack-based abilities
• Paying life as an activated ability cost is now supported
• Energy-based "unless" payments now work (e.g. "unless you pay {E}{E}")
• Sacrifice-based choices with "one or more" now prompt correctly
• Casualty granted to spells now resolves properly
• Scry replacement effects are now supported ("if you would scry, instead...")
• Mill count replacements work ("if you would mill, instead mill that many plus one")
• Static goad effects now force creatures to attack as required
• Flash creatures with cleanup-step sacrifice drawbacks now resolve correctly
• Delayed triggers now correctly snapshot their parent spell's targets
• Added support for mana-value-based power/toughness (e.g. "power and toughness equal to its mana value")
• Damage-source death triggers now work ("when a creature dealt damage this way dies this turn...")
• Zone-history trigger conditions are now parsed ("whenever a creature enters from your graveyard")
• Metagame decklists refreshed with latest meta data

entries.title: Bestow keyword fully implemented
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Bestow keyword fully implemented — cast creatures as Auras with bestow cost, illegal-target revert, unattach revert, and AI support
• Parser now handles anaphoric target references ("that creature", "the chosen permanent") across search and effect text
• Player/opponent life total conditions now parse correctly — unlocks cards like Game Over and Anya
• Cancel button added to casting cost choice modals (bestow, evoke, etc.)
• Debug click mode now works in graveyard, exile, and command zones, with object ID shown on hover
• macOS desktop build no longer blocks releases when Apple signing secrets are unavailable

entries.title: Art-source preferences: drag to reorder
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Art preferences now use an ordered priority chain — drag to reorder which art sources you prefer (e.g. "use this set first, then fall back to newest")
• Deck builder art picker lets you choose specific printings for individual cards via Scryfall
• Player avatars now appear on the HUD — shows your commander's art or a random planeswalker
• Mill animations — cards moving from library to graveyard now show a reveal animation
• Eliminated players in multiplayer no longer incorrectly retain priority
• Villainous Choice and other scoped player-branch effects now resolve correctly
• Fixed tap-creature costs and source-power-based damage calculations
• "Unless" trigger clauses now parse across many more patterns (pay life, discard, filtered costs)
• Library search filters expanded — mana value constraints, "no abilities", mana ability filters, top-N limits, and cost-paid references
• Kicker and spell-cast modal choice limits now parse correctly
• Conditional untap restrictions ("doesn't untap unless...") now recognized
• Oracle parser runs ~50% faster by eliminating millions of throwaway allocations per parse
• Deck compatibility status hidden during deck selection to reduce clutter
• Deck compatibility loading and coverage scanning improvements
• Reduced noisy parser warning logs for cleaner console output
• Updated vulnerable dependencies

entries.title: Face-down permanents show a card back
entries.body:
🔥 What's New
• Face-down permanents now render with a proper card back instead of a blank
• Damage assignment modal shows each blocker's power/toughness and the lethal damage threshold
• "May" triggered abilities can now be auto-accepted or auto-declined per game (no more repeated prompts)
• Progressive precon deck disclosure — deck contents reveal gradually rather than all at once
• Opponent HUD popover no longer renders behind other UI elements
• Equip abilities with restricted targets (e.g. "Equip legendary creature") now parse correctly
• Improved damage prevention and replacement effect parsing (damage counters, exile replacements)
• Commander modal DFC triggers now respect the cap on modal choices
• Fixed several targeting bugs (ETB targeting, counter assignment, sacrifice scoping)
• Fixed begin-game prompts and Urza's Saga chapter search
• Fixed Devourer opening hand reveal interaction
• Fixed compound restricted mana quality resolution

entries.title: Redesigned attack target picker
entries.body:
🔥 What's New

• Redesigned attack target picker with peek previews, bulk-assign, and improved dropdown behavior
• Improved combat arrow visuals and multiplayer blocker indicators
• Fixed ninjutsu hand action legality so ninjutsu activates correctly during combat
• Fixed spell cost reduction bugs (Morophon, Training Grounds, storm-granted discounts, target-dependent modifiers)
• Fixed Osgir creating correct cost-paid token copies
• Fixed join forces mana contributions
• Show discover choice prompt when resolving Discover
• Parse attachment lookback conditions, quoted token abilities, and manifest for Orochi Soul-Reaver
• Fix Esper Origins flashback transform and Irencrag trigger parsing
• Enforce PDH commander uncommon rarity requirement
• Restored game states now properly rehydrate before resuming

entries.title: Fixed "target opponent sacrifices" targeting
entries.body:
🔥 New Features
Engine & Rules
• Fix "target opponent sacrifices" not properly targeting the opponent — sacrifice now reads the chosen player from ability targets at resolution time
• Support spell alternative costs (e.g., "you may pay {cost} rather than pay this spell's mana cost")
• Support pay-X mana choices during spell/ability resolution
• Implement Sylvan Library's drawn-card choice mechanic (choose which drawn cards to put back / pay life for)
• Apply activated ability cost reductions (e.g., Training Grounds reducing activation costs)
• Fix player-scoped discard/draw chains resolving against the wrong player
• Preserve controller context for scoped player quantity expressions
• Fix counter movement copying counters instead of actually moving them
• Fix token copies incorrectly requiring targets for source set resolution
• Resolve villainous choice effects (opponent-chooses-for-you modal)
• Parse "enchanted or equipped creature" static ability patterns
• Parse attachment lookback conditions (e.g., "if enchanted creature...")
• Fix context-aware "they control" quantity parsing to respect scoped player

Draft System
• Add Draft landing page as a single entry point for all draft modes
• Add draft run system for threaded game sessions (play games mid-draft)
• Persist Quick Draft state across page reloads so progress isn't lost
• Show visual draft progress bar during pack picks
• Restore RNG determinism on draft session import
• Fix crash when bot tries to pick from an empty pack
• Improve draft mode descriptions on the landing page

Frontend & UI
• Redesign AttackTargetPicker with peek/collapse, bulk-assign buttons ("All → Opp N"), per-creature dropdowns with color-coded opponent dots, and hover card preview
• Fix AttackTargetPicker dropdown clipping behind scroll containers and hover target precision
• Unify player identity display — consistent "Opp N" naming with seat-colored text across HUDs, modals, and debug panel
• Fix missing card art for tokens and adventure spells on the stack
• Deduplicate draft pool sidebar entries and show count badges for multiples
• Allow commander drag in any direction to cast (was locked to vertical only)
• Handle ring bearer choice UI prompt
• Fix modal card images for tokens showing placeholder art instead of correct Scryfall images

AI Improvements
• Keyword-aware attack evaluation — AI now considers deathtouch, first strike, indestructible, and pump abilities when deciding attackers
• Smarter sacrifice outlet and fetch land timing policies

Deck Validation
• Allow nonlegendary uncommon creatures as commanders in Pauper Commander format

entries.title: Limited & Draft support added
entries.body:
🔥 New Updates
• Added major Limited/Draft support: draft data, pack generation, bot drafting, quick draft flow, limited deck building, draft routes, and draft UI. (Experimental!)
• Added multiplayer draft pods and tournament flow: P2P draft hosting/joining, server-hosted drafts, spectators, admin controls, timers, standings, Bo3 matches, sideboarding between games, crash recovery, and auto-picks for disconnected seats. (Experimental!)
• Overhauled the game board layout: grid layout is now the default, with improved hand/battlefield spacing, inline HUDs, commander/multiplayer opponent HUD fixes, compact mana pips, zone pile sizing, and better mobile sizing.
• Added and improved debug tooling: direct game-state manipulation, debug action dispatch UI, context menus, card-name autocomplete, Create Card support, and more reliable debug visibility.
• Improved rules and gameplay correctness for Commander zone replacement, Split Second, Offspring, Ravenous, Escape, Evoke, Escalate, Recover, Awaken, additional upkeep effects, sacrifice costs, attachment rules, copy/ETB interactions, and private-zone library ordering.
• Expanded mana and cost handling: hybrid and Phyrexian payments, source-qualified mana tracking, mana multipliers, Urza land conditional mana, paid mana source chains, hand-zone self-exile mana abilities, and better max-X calculations.
• Significantly expanded card parser coverage, especially for dynamic quantities, discover limits, modal mode costs, ordinal counter thresholds, target counts, life-total comparisons, toughness-based combat damage, conditional token branches, attachment filters, self-reference costs, and complex effect chains.
• Reworked parser diagnostics behind the scenes with typed diagnostics, snapshot coverage, and a diagnostic ratchet so parsing regressions are easier to catch.

• Improved AI reliability: bounded search latency, fixes for combat and target selection, all non-human seats can be driven dynamically, and fallback actions prevent stuck loops.
• Improved deckbuilding/card data behavior: unlimited-copy cards like Rat Colony are handled correctly, basic land names were consolidated, snow-covered lands were added, and draft pool data is now included in CI/deploy output.
• Improved mobile and interaction polish: better HUD centering, fixed synthesized hover behavior on mobile, upgraded blocker arrows, and game logs remain visible on victory/defeat screens.

entries.title: Token grouping controls & a faster stack
entries.body:
• Battlefield token grouping and creature grouping controls are improved.
• Debug export/restore is better, and restored games load more reliably.
• Stack auto-resolve is faster, so obvious pass-through stack actions should move along more quickly.
• Auto-pass behavior had test fixes/cleanup.

entries.title: Decayed creatures can't block, sacrifice on attack
entries.body:
🔥 New updates
• Decayed now works: decayed creatures can’t block, and when they attack they get sacrificed at end of combat.
• Equipment attach effects are parsed better, so cards that say to attach Equipment directly should behave more correctly.
• Tempting Offer effects are fixed: cards like Tempt with Discovery now correctly count each opponent who accepted the offer.
• Basic land type changes are more rules-correct. Effects that turn lands into Mountains, Forests, etc. now grant the right mana abilities at the right timing.
• Commander storm copy counts are now understood.
• Domain-style “number of basic land types” counting is more reliable.
• Energy gain with variable amounts works better.
• Distributed damage and distributed counters are supported better.
• Prevention effects that do something afterward are parsed better.
• Combat bonuses that scale based on how many creatures are blocking now work better.
• Combat tax effects that scale per attacker/blocker are recognized better.
• “When this blocks/dies” style combat trigger conditions are parsed better.
• Suspended/source-zone trigger conditions are parsed better.
• Conditional mana effects that grant spell keywords are parsed better.
• Spell cost reductions that depend on a target are parsed better.
• “For each” effects are improved for life gain, discard, counters, and combat life changes.
• Dynamic “where X is…” counter payments are parsed better.
• More dynamic card text is supported, especially cards using X, “for each,” energy amounts, counters, power/toughness checks, and conditional effects.
• More mtgish-backed card text now converts cleanly into the engine.
• Parser coverage improved for several classes of real card text, which should mean fewer unsupported cards and fewer partially-working cards.
• Attachment hover previews are improved.
• Attached cards now lift together better on the battlefield, making Equipment/Aura stacks easier to inspect.

entries.title: A large card-support import pass
entries.body:
🆕  Today’s improvements since last night

• A lot more cards should now work correctly thanks to a large card-support import pass.
• Kicker cards are much better supported, including tracking whether a spell was kicked and applying effects that care about that.
• Search/tutor effects now understand more restrictions, including colorless cards, colors, same/different names, mana value checks, and keyword-based filters.
• More “for each…” effects now work, including dynamic quantities and counter-payment based scaling.
• More death/graveyard triggers now work, including “creature died” and “creature put into a graveyard from the battlefield” wording.
• Cards that care about “with a counter on it” are now handled more accurately.
• Effects referring back to “that card,” “those cards,” or revealed/discarded cards are now better connected to the right object.
• Auras and static abilities that grant bonuses or keywords should parse more reliably.
• Choice/conditional card text is handled better, especially effects with “if,” “unless,” “and/or,” and negated conditions.
• Party-size style effects and several player-scoped checks, like life total, hand size, life gained/lost this turn, and turn duration, were improved.
• Fetch-land style prompts were cleaned up so lands like Polluted Delta should no longer show an incorrect mana choice.
• Planeswalker ability dialogs are now centered properly.
• The turn banner now shows the per-player turn number.
• Metagame deck feeds were refreshed.
• Attachment stacks on the battlefield are easier to interact with when hovering attached cards.
